Peter,

Here’s what this election boils down to:

_**Establishment-backed, career politicians against a conservative outsider with successful business experience.**_

Democrats have made it clear since day one of the Biden Administration that they don’t respect America’s place in the world. From Afghanistan, to the economy here at home, Biden and the Democrat Party have made it clear that they are here for power, not to lead.

Meanwhile, establishment RINO’s and their cable news lackeys are just as bad, if not worse.

_**Career politicians on both sides of the aisle in Washington are after the same thing – power and control. That’s why they won’t let the pandemic end. It’s not about your health, it’s about absolute submission.**_

That’s why 2022 is our _**last**_ chance to put a stop to this madness. That won’t happen if we elect another career politician or feckless TV-cable news pundit.

**That’s _exactly_ why I joined this race. I’ve been an outsider and a fighter my whole life, and that won’t change when I go to the Senate.**
[**DEFEND FREEDOM: DONATE NOW**](http://links.berniemorenoforohio.com/u/click?_t=e4b84e1dbdd94cb490475227943c7e8a&_m=3fc067303b8343aab63cdf735ca2dac0&_e=-FYfW8cWYblGCZNzxNIHKvpbLROWidktmj9EXMp1r9UomjZmICGyb6o8ewEyLgDKx-8WJyxcJ90swTa2d-hwtSSqklsqbJubn0H2oiy4w1higI6QWOTiVYmdlurogP8oU6578f8dc51m01jXoXo6uz8xjhR_5URONv-gYKQ_jqDQ1bhwdb_uBEOLlFdQgjI8THCvYrqPnWxcDYJV1KJOLjjoSMmiM4LavuyfTkjiyVaTywEsPo0lSfyhHO3I3WirAEzlsBaHW8vhn7lxneI7912hq_6EtxHqn8mDUQnwZYqcwKfW8NSJ0CPa94juFxn8R5GnoXbTEbUuyZ6Vh2vgFuDOWzfaiwfEa2KGEVWFMdCgj10n7fxl836a8P9soFItltEu1acmRkBikSZJE35zOkb8XE-5iYd6-CRk_XKOxDcyCUp31o014tfO5hM8EIds8rm2QbkZ9z69J5QlGAcU5yocKVd4XsCJAJeZrrhWhuY%3D)
Peter, America’s future is hanging in the balance. _**Will we choose freedom and liberty – or socialism and big government control?**_

I’ve seen the horrors of socialism and I’m determined to keep it from destroying America.

**Our End of Month fundraising deadline is coming up and we need to finish STRONG to keep our momentum going.[Will you pitch in before our 11:59PM deadline on August 31st?](http://links.berniemorenoforohio.com/u/click?_t=e4b84e1dbdd94cb490475227943c7e8a&_m=3fc067303b8343aab63cdf735ca2dac0&_e=-FYfW8cWYblGCZNzxNIHKvpbLROWidktmj9EXMp1r9UomjZmICGyb6o8ewEyLgDKx-8WJyxcJ90swTa2d-hwtSSqklsqbJubn0H2oiy4w1higI6QWOTiVYmdlurogP8oU6578f8dc51m01jXoXo6uz8xjhR_5URONv-gYKQ_jqDQ1bhwdb_uBEOLlFdQgjI8THCvYrqPnWxcDYJV1KJOLjjoSMmiM4LavuyfTkjiyVaTywEsPo0lSfyhHO3I3WirAEzlsBaHW8vhn7lxneI794-WbH4oSsZgmhDD_e5eOpzXNetWRJHU8rY_obKsgTzznk9stArlyNUa0MP6aQFYOF-BCuxlODgmnJpovb0VQMFwOMwtpWeFAMSrvwJ1D_oUsCn3u40knHTkdhUgGQECvlx3o3PhAAicEq_7Yb_5VlH_J_EXg7SMhaWqDY6XxPQX-avghFGcfj5C__1s-y3Kdfd-G3IIQpZ2BdyZ_WnvUT8%3D)**

Thank you,
Bernie Moreno

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Are you on Team Herschel?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you're with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215202:6pkD7Q2-N:m:1:3253819041:408944B963A5888BF0196FBA23548354:r)

---
Peter,

I've been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215202:6pkD7Q2-N:m:1:3253819041:408944B963A5888BF0196FBA23548354:r) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215202:6pkD7Q2-N:m:1:3253819041:408944B963A5888BF0196FBA23548354:r)
I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He's a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that's come across his desk in Washington.

He's pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That's just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you're with me, Peter. That's why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215202:6pkD7Q2-N:m:1:3253819041:408944B963A5888BF0196FBA23548354:r) **

I've been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I've ever been a part of. Peter, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you'll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215202:6pkD7Q2-N:m:1:3253819041:408944B963A5888BF0196FBA23548354:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215202:6pkD7Q2-N:m:1:3253819041:408944B963A5888BF0196FBA23548354:r)

clean_body: If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you're with me. Join Team Herschel today! | Peter, I've been on a lot of teams. From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, I know what makes a good teammate. We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win. Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia. I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He's a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that's come across his desk in Washington. He's pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government. This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That's just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. Georgians deserve better.America deserves better. As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you're with me, Peter. That's why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team. I've been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I've ever been a part of. Peter, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you'll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. name: Charlie Kirk
subject: We’re holding school boards accountable
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215425:64a-3Q2oN:m:1:3253819041:816253CE0732A514AE220DFC190D800F:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215425:64a-3Q2oN:m:1:3253819041:816253CE0732A514AE220DFC190D800F:r) Peter, School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organization has been holding them accountable. **_Until now_.** I'm proud to announce the newest initiative of Turning Point USA (TPUSA) -- our **_School Board Watchlist_**. **To help us stand up against Marxist teachers, radical superintendents, and anti-American curricula on behalf of the 50,600,000 students shaped by their school boards ' decisions, I need your immediate support. ** [**My goal is to raise $24,000 by August 31. Will you help me protect students as they begin a new school year -- and put control of their futures back in the hands of parents -- with your gift of $12, $25, $50, $100, or more?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215425:64a-3Q2oN:m:1:3253819041:816253CE0732A514AE220DFC190D800F:r) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215425:64a-3Q2oN:m:1:3253819041:816253CE0732A514AE220DFC190D800F:r) Leftists have taken over the vast majority of school districts in every state -- likely even your district! The 13,500+ school boards across the United States ultimately determine how our children's minds will be shaped ... and whether they learn the truth about America's powerful history, Founding Fathers, and role in the world or whether they embrace the toxic, socialist, America-hating lies of the radical Left. Turn on the nightly news and you'll see the horrors of what K-12 "learning" has become in modern America. As socialism and "woke" culture infiltrate our society, leftist school boards across the country are:
* **adopting Critical Race Theory (CRT) curriculum** , ensuring students are indoctrinated with this dangerous Marxist vision of race;
* requiring teachers participate in **discriminatory professional development disguised as "diversity training"** and putting Leftist ideology before education;
* **renaming schools because of their "racist" namesakes**, which include national heroes like Abraham Lincoln and George Washington; and
* continuing to **use COVID as an excuse to maintain online learning** , despite extensive evidence that in-person learning poses little to no risk to students -- and knowing that online learning leaves many students underserved.

[**That 's why TPUSA's School Board Watchlist will expose the corrupt and radical decisions school boards are making, and then equip parents and community members with the information they need to demand a better education for their students! But Peter, I need your support to do it.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215425:64a-3Q2oN:m:1:3253819041:816253CE0732A514AE220DFC190D800F:r) Right now, TPUSA is assembling the nation's **FIRST EVER** school district ranking system of any kind, focusing exclusively on school districts' acceptance or rejection of radical Leftist and anti-American curricula, textbooks, and policies. TPUSA's School Board Watchlist will expose: >>> Radical agendas being pushed by the nation's largest school districts >>> Leftist, anti-American, Marxist, and CRT curricula and textbooks >>> Corrupt boards and individuals who pursue anti-American policies >>> And more! We've published all of our findings at **[SchoolBoardWatchlist.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215426:64a-3Q2oN:m:1:3253819041:816253CE0732A514AE220DFC190D800F:r)** ... and we're using our TPUSA megaphones -- online, on campus, and over the airwaves -- to bring national attention to the secretive, disturbing agendas being pushed by Leftist school boards so they can no longer hide in the shadows. [**But to have the biggest possible impact, I 'm asking for your support of $12 or more. Please help us reach our goal of raising $24,000 by August 31.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215425:64a-3Q2oN:m:1:3253819041:816253CE0732A514AE220DFC190D800F:r) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215425:64a-3Q2oN:m:1:3253819041:816253CE0732A514AE220DFC190D800F:r) The time to fight back is right **NOW** -- before it's too late. Thank you for your support to put public education back in the hands of parents and the community, **NOT** politicized school boards. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044 [Unsubscribe](${Gears.unsubscribe\(\)})

name: Larry Elder | Recall Newsom
subject: Less than 21 days to recall Newsom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
With the election coming down to a "photo finish," we can't miss a single opportunity to get out every YES vote we can for the recall. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215538:JsAHaQ2NJ:m:1:3253819041:4A45D48FB0A41AC2BC345848E7DB963C:r)

---
Peter,

We're now counting down from just 3 weeks out from Election Day in the recall against failed California Governor Gavin Newsom.

Voting by mail has been going on for over a week now. Every day that goes by means thousands of more ballots are being returned with votes for, or against, the recall.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: POLL: COVID Vaccine mandate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215937:6lK8fQ2qN:m:1:3253819041:2933D2A36BBFB8E6D7A86EF26422088B:r)
---

Peter,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you 're reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we'd agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren't vaccinated, and that isn't their role.

**We 've lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215937:6lK8fQ2qN:m:1:3253819041:2933D2A36BBFB8E6D7A86EF26422088B:r)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215937:6lK8fQ2qN:m:1:3253819041:2933D2A36BBFB8E6D7A86EF26422088B:r)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 30TH

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215937:6lK8fQ2qN:m:1:3253819041:2933D2A36BBFB8E6D7A86EF26422088B:r)

---

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it's anyone's guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn't be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be "defeated" when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can't trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don 't wear them. **

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215937:6lK8fQ2qN:m:1:3253819041:2933D2A36BBFB8E6D7A86EF26422088B:r)**

Thanks for letting us know -

Thank you,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215937:6lK8fQ2qN:m:1:3253819041:2933D2A36BBFB8E6D7A86EF26422088B:r)
Jim Jordan

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58215937:6lK8fQ2qN:m:1:3253819041:2933D2A36BBFB8E6D7A86EF26422088B:r)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

Friend, I'll cut straight to the chase: our August fundraising deadline is tomorrow at midnight, and I need your help. We **__must__** protect our slim Democratic majority in the House of Delegates and secure another statewide sweep if we're going to protect the progress we've made over the past four years. Republicans are on the attack, recently announcing a six-figure ad campaign funded by out of state dark money, putting our narrow majority -- and the progress we've made on gun safety, justice reform, and women's reproductive healthcare access -- at risk. **[Please contribute as generously as you can before our August fundraising deadline Tuesday at midnight so we can keep Virginia blue!](https://act.myngp.com/el/3lbfmZHGeArS7ymvJE4SnvCGrHjpDjJSfT5gjdJ6f8Y=/O1HGPx3fDdQi09mLFDX5tIXJxcFItc4bl2g-kw6E4Fg=)** Let me be clear -- this first ad buy is only the beginning. Republicans will stop at nothing to fan the flames of divisiveness across our Commonwealth. [**I hope we can count on you to donate as generously as you can today so we can keep the progress going.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3lbfmZHGeArS7ymvJE4SnvCGrHjpDjJSfT5gjdJ6f8Y=/i2gIm0pzT3XLd-vLiLcMzCT7HwNyUnrIMemhYzyQiD8=) \- Ralph Northam

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Sorry to bother you on a Monday, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | |
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58216463:6XQk9Q2kN:m:1:3253819041:1C4C1721320D6A605A33E5388EBF5384:r)
---

I'm sorry to bother you on a Monday, but _**[I need a quick favor.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58216463:6XQk9Q2kN:m:1:3253819041:1C4C1721320D6A605A33E5388EBF5384:r "but I need a quick
favor.")**_

My team just let me know that we are still coming up a little short of our fundraising goal ahead of the big deadline tomorrow.

**Here 's why this is so important: we need to exceed our goal in order to have the resources necessary to help principled conservatives WIN BIG in the upcoming elections. **

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58216463:6XQk9Q2kN:m:1:3253819041:1C4C1721320D6A605A33E5388EBF5384:r)
---

I'm traveling all over the country to support Republican candidates in important races like Sarah Huckabee Sanders in Arkansas, Tim Scott in South Carolina, Ashley Hinson in Iowa and Lee Zeldin in New York.

The Democrats have their Big Money machine in overdrive collecting cash from bigwig donors, so we need to match their Big Money with support from real, patriotic Americans like you. They may have the Hollywood elites on their side, but I know we can defeat them if enough grassroots conservatives chip in $100, $50 or $25 dollars toward our big goal.
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58216463:6XQk9Q2kN:m:1:3253819041:1C4C1721320D6A605A33E5388EBF5384:r)
---
If we come up short, that will mean open borders, higher taxes, socialist policies and new restrictions on our ability to live out our faith. Our core American values are at stake, and **[I am counting on you to help us stop the Democrats before it is too late.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58216463:6XQk9Q2kN:m:1:3253819041:1C4C1721320D6A605A33E5388EBF5384:r "I am counting on you to help us stop the Democrats before it is too late.")**

All eyes are watching, so please help get us across the finish line. I'm counting on you.
---
Never Give an Inch,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58216463:6XQk9Q2kN:m:1:3253819041:1C4C1721320D6A605A33E5388EBF5384:r)

Mike Pompeo

Let me make this clear: I REFUSE to surrender to the Mask Mafia. I will end all lockdowns, forced vaccinations, and mask mandates Joe Biden or Anthony Fauci try to enact when I am in the Senate. Don't sit on the sidelines in this fight... == == == == == == == == == The Left is attempting to not only politicize the military but DRIVE OUT Trump supporters and America-First conservatives. This is a must win fight. In order to stop Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the Radical Left we must win back the Senate in 2022. And Ohio is a key state in Biden's election plans. Help me put an end to his Presidency and the Mask Mafia's rule over our country. == In Liberty, | | Mike Gibbons Candidate for US Senate | | | | | == | www.GibbonsforOhio.com | | Gibbons for Ohio | 1650 E 55th St, #603679, Cleveland, OH 44103 | | Sent by mailto:info@gibbonsforohio.com powered by

| Peter,

I just got the news that a far-right group has launched a major ad campaign against 23 Democratic Representatives — including me. Specifically, they are spreading misinformation about the work my colleagues and I are doing to lower prescription drug prices. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: URGENT: Betsy DeVos will be in New Hampshire TOMORROW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Friends – Tomorrow, right-wing billionaire and Donald Trump's former Secretary of Education, **Betsy DeVos, will be in New Hampshire to rally Trump's base.** DeVos and her family have donated hundreds of millions of dollars to Republican causes and candidates – and her visit is an unmistakable signal that the Trump Network is laser-focused on flipping New Hampshire red. During Betsy Devos' confirmation hearing back in 2017, she demonstrated a complete lack of understanding and support for the public education system, and it was clear she was completely unqualified to serve. I specifically questioned Ms. DeVos on whether she would enforce the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. **Not only did she refuse to say she would, but she also demonstrated that she was unaware that this landmark civil rights law was a federal law.** I'm reaching out today because it has been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, and I’m not done working toward a more robust public education system. But the GOP is already sinking millions into New Hampshire, and this visit will only boost their massive war chest. **With top Republicans fully invested in this race, it's bad news for our slim Senate majority.** I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, and New Hampshire’s State Senate and State House both flipped from blue to red last year. If we lose in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding our narrow majority. **[I hate asking for money, but my campaign is falling behind our August goal with less than 48 hours until our deadline. Will you please rush $5 or whatever you can afford right now to help us win in New Hampshire and protect our vulnerable Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34911580/303430782/565612021?refcode=e20210830_eom-devos&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzM4MmFiOC05ZTA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GIVEQPpIhQPjs35W03lgRe2Y9hqpgLKTqocMYAmmpuw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34911581/303430783/565612021?refcode=e20210830_eom-devos&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzM4MmFiOC05ZTA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GIVEQPpIhQPjs35W03lgRe2Y9hqpgLKTqocMYAmmpuw=)

Derek, right now, things aren’t looking good for Virginia Democrats.

Trump’s hand-picked candidates are threatening to take back Virginia. From the Governor’s office to the statehouse, Trump Republicans all across the Commonwealth are poised to sweep back into power.

Derek, we’re on the verge of Republicans getting a mandate to roll back every single policy Democrats have passed. They could roll back the minimum wage increase, legalization of marijuana, voting rights, Medicaid expansion, and so much more.

**[That’s why we’re coming to you right now. We’re at a crossroads for the future of Virginia, and we need your help to fight back. name: Michael Toppen
subject: The sky’s not falling, but it is getting a little lower
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
A quick update from Kirsten's Finance Director. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34913776/303437109/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWY5NTVmNi1hMjA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wunZYvXeLsWYyS_RREjmuc4A7yYILTDeXqSdMGOj_3Y=&emci=9c52908a-7607-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=45f955f6-a209-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12898431)

Friend,
Being Kirsten’s Finance Director, it’s my responsibility to have a finger on the pulse of our campaign’s financial health. That’s why I track our fundraising numbers so closely.
**Here’s my current takeaway: We’re still very well-positioned in this race, but we do have some ground to make up.**
Running for Congress is a Herculean task, and we need to let Kirsten know that we’ve got her back. Our campaign depends on building forward momentum among grassroots supporters like you.
So here’s my request to you: [**contribute what you can, and let’s ensure that Kirsten can focus on the issues at hand rather than the dollars and cents that make a campaign tick.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34913777/303437110/558373307?refcode= X_03021_EOM_C&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWY5NTVmNi1hMjA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wunZYvXeLsWYyS_RREjmuc4A7yYILTDeXqSdMGOj_3Y=)

Since we launched Never Again PAC three months ago, we've been overwhelmed by the support we've received from folks across the country. Thousands of you have stepped up to join our team because you understand how vitally important it is to defend our democracy from the Treason Caucus.

We're not powered by high-dollar donations. The work we do is only possible thanks to the support of everyday people chipping in what they can, when they can. People like Heather.

Heather is an Emergency Room/Trauma RN in New Hampshire. She's served on the frontlines of the COVID-19 pandemic and has seen firsthand the consequences of Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress not taking this pandemic seriously.

Heather's fed-up with their lies -- about the virus, the election, and more. That's why she joined our team to help us defeat these dangerous Republican members of Congress.

We count on Heather's support -- and yours -- to ensure we have the resources to defeat the Treason Caucus at the ballot box. We have the plans to win next year, but we need this team to help us put them into action.

Since we launched our campaign earlier this month, we’ve been working round-the-clock to construct a winning strategy with the input of our community. name: Team Malcolm
subject: Is there anything we can say to convince you to make a $3 contribution to Malcolm Kenyatta?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
What if we told you that Pennsylvania is Democrats' best chance of picking up a Senate seat?
#

Friends —
Is there anything we can say to convince you to make a $3 contribution to Malcolm Kenyatta's campaign before our end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight tomorrow?
What if we told you the fate of our Democratic Senate majority is on the line in 2022?
What if we told you that Pennsylvania is Democrats' best chance of picking up a Senate seat, and Cook Political has rated ours as one of only three toss-up races in the country?
What if we told you that we are just 235 donations away from hitting our end-of-month fundraising goal?
And what if you knew the $3 you could contribute would help make Malcolm Kenyatta — a real working person — the next U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania?
**So, what do you say?**
[Could you please make a $3 contribution to Malcolm's campaign before our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to a close? This is so important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34914902/303442155/-353695395?refcode2=0f85c44d-a409-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210830-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjg1YzQ0ZC1hNDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lr9S_1S20CjSIwgMU-xGtwpHSiNVeJKBTvmgEtnrpwU=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34914903/303442156/-353695395?refcode2=0f85c44d-a409-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210830-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjg1YzQ0ZC1hNDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lr9S_1S20CjSIwgMU-xGtwpHSiNVeJKBTvmgEtnrpwU=)**

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: I need to be blunt with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=wFo%2B6RnPDl003CLYpK81SlDJwRUxWpND&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
We're just a day away from our August fundraising deadline, and unfortunately, my fundraising team just let me know we're still $8,000 short of our goal.
I know you understand my need to be blunt: Democrats - including me - cannot fall short of big goals like these. Not this month, not the next - because if we do, our control of the Senate could be put in major jeopardy.
So, Friend, I need to ask you to make a donation. But before I do, let me give you just one significant example of why Democratic Senate control, at this moment, is so crucial.
Just recently, as a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I heard closed-door testimony from Donald Trump's former acting attorney general. It was chilling: He confirmed that Trump tried to exert presidential power and pressure to overturn the 2020 election. **Because Democrats control the Judiciary Committee, I will be using the full force of our committee to reveal the full extent of Trump 's wrongdoing - even if that opens the door to potential criminal charges for Trump.**
Now, if Republicans were still in control, we know what they would do: Defend the former president, sweep his attacks on democracy under the rug, and embolden the extremist and authoritarian elements that have infested the Republican Party.
That very control - our ability to pursue justice and pass bold legislation that will improve the lives of everyday people - could vanish if Democrats lose just a single Senate seat. Here in my state, the political ground could be shifting: This month, Republicans flipped a state Senate red, the first GOP flip since President Biden was inaugurated. **Now, we know why national Republicans have made my U.S. Senate seat a target - and Mitch McConnell will do whatever it takes to flip this seat, stop our progressive agenda, and cover up Donald Trump's grave abuse of his office.**
**So to be blunt once again, missing goals like this is not an option.[Can I count on you to rush a contribution of $5 or more right now to fight back against GOP attacks and protect this Senate seat? Whatever you give will be instrumental in building up the resources it will take to protect Democratic Senate control.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1066-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1066-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=nGjfWTOnYn8hnHPLZEVXINNrgjCa7flh&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

body:

Hi Peter --
In case you haven’t heard, Peter Franchot has a bold plan to bring our transit infrastructure into the 21st century by creating a world-class, integrated and statewide transit system that connects ALL corners of the state.
As part of his plan, he’s going to:
*
Break
ground
on
a

East-West

transit

World-class transportation would give all Marylanders the freedom to experience everything the state has to offer, and will also serve as a key driver for economic growth in the years to come.

body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you're with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58218930:JFUqFQ2dN:m:1:3253819041:9111C4F5E9B03F27367075BFEEEAC6CC:r)

---
Peter,

I've been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58218930:JFUqFQ2dN:m:1:3253819041:9111C4F5E9B03F27367075BFEEEAC6CC:r) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58218930:JFUqFQ2dN:m:1:3253819041:9111C4F5E9B03F27367075BFEEEAC6CC:r)
I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He's a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that's come across his desk in Washington.

He's pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That's just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you're with me, Peter. That's why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58218930:JFUqFQ2dN:m:1:3253819041:9111C4F5E9B03F27367075BFEEEAC6CC:r) **

I've been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I've ever been a part of. Peter, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you'll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58218930:JFUqFQ2dN:m:1:3253819041:9111C4F5E9B03F27367075BFEEEAC6CC:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58218930:JFUqFQ2dN:m:1:3253819041:9111C4F5E9B03F27367075BFEEEAC6CC:r)

[
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58218931:JFUqFQ2dN:m:1:3253819041:9111C4F5E9B03F27367075BFEEEAC6CC:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

Look, I know you’re tired of hearing about our end-of-month deadline. Frankly, I’m tired of writing about it. But we’re in an important moment for New Mexico and our country. We simply can’t afford to slow down now.
We’re on the verge of securing not one — but **_two_** — once-in-a-generation Build Back Better packages that will work in tandem to make major investments in addressing climate change, creating good-paying jobs, and protecting our public lands.
I worked hard to include measures to drastically reduce carbon emissions, expand Tribal access to clean water, and make sure billions are invested into making life better for New Mexico’s workers and families. If these legislative packages make it to President Biden’s desk, it’s going to change lives and livelihoods for generations to come.

clean_body: Hello — Tomorrow marks our end-of-month deadline, and we’re falling behind on our fundraising goal. That’s understandable given our focus has been elsewhere. But I’m asking for your help — can you help us catch up before midnight tomorrow? Grassroots donations like yours power our work. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Look, I know you’re tired of hearing about our end-of-month deadline. Frankly, I’m tired of writing about it. But we’re in an important moment for New Mexico and our country. We simply can’t afford to slow down now. We’re on the verge of securing not one — but two — once-in-a-generation Build Back Better packages that will work in tandem to make major investments in addressing climate change, creating good-paying jobs, and protecting our public lands. I worked hard to include measures to drastically reduce carbon emissions, expand Tribal access to clean water, and make sure billions are invested into making life better for New Mexico’s workers and families. If these legislative packages make it to President Biden’s desk, it’s going to change lives and livelihoods for generations to come. So we can’t afford to lose energy right now. I’m counting on you to support and be a part of this critical work. I’m hoping you’ll pitch in any amount that you can before midnight tomorrow: If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for being part of this campaign. It means a lot. —Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Elaine Luria

We still have time to meet our $25k fundraising goal, and as you can see, time is running out.
Time may also be running out for our Democratic Majority.
The President’s party typically loses seats during the midterm elections and Republicans are poised to gerrymander their way to gaining House seats -- they only need to gain _5 seats_ to take away our Democratic Majority.
And without a majority, we can say goodbye to legislation protecting the right to vote, initiatives to create a green economy, and any chance of holding insurrectionists accountable.
[**So, can you chip in before the clock strikes midnight tomorrow to help me defend my seat and our majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34917350/303453354/-1006850060?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_210830_FR_EOM3Clock_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTYzMGU1Yi1hYjA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3q6sSHPYV11idloa3R4Fw22ntaQ1MBZUKkTrZoe2znk=)

name: Hannah Nayowith via MondaireforCongress.com
subject: Reaching out in Mondaire’s place
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

I wanted to check in quickly to provide an update on our goal of 500 contributions. As of right now, we’re still about 200 contributions short.
Now, Mondaire has been hard at work on a number of important initiatives, including passing critical voting rights legislation and the $3.5 trillion budget. That’s a good thing, because it means he’s doing the job you elected him to do — and making real progress for working families across the country.
**But it also means he has less time than he usually would to conduct donor outreach as we ramp up for the 2022 primary, so I have to reach out in his place to ask for your support.**
[**Please, if you’re able, make a contribution of $5, $10, or $15 using this link. We’re only about 200 donations from our goal, so your support will go a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34918686/303458911/-376196102?refcode2=9f5ea462-ad09-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210830-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjVlYTQ2Mi1hZDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a6W4iUO2O0I0wCRm23iT54zOEWPviMPNv1RRK5Ms4-M=)
Thank you for your support. I can’t tell you how much it means to Mondaire and to everyone on our team.
All my best,
Hannah Nayowith
Campaign Manager, Mondaire for Congress

subject: We need to go all in to defeat DeSantis.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
We can’t afford another four years. |
---

**[Pitch in toward our end-of-month goal and help Charlie DEFEAT Gov. DeSantis!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34918720/303459058/-977189612?refcode=20210830_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDY5MDA2Zi1hZDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YS02-79_9LIouk8d14IcGtmb0VxKKN7aDhdLqiz3I5w=)**
Friend, I’ll get straight to the point:

Charlie’s up against a far-right Republican with national backing and big money behind him. **We’ve seen what a disaster Gov. DeSantis is already,** and we can’t afford another four years of him in Florida -- let alone in the White House.

clean_body: just bumping yesterday’s email from Eden and Megan. | | | = Hi! I’m just bumping yesterday’s email (below) from Eden and Megan... As Social Media Coordinator, you might not hear as much from me over email. But I had to reach out on my own because our social media donations have been lagging behind all month, which means we’re relying heavily on email contributions to help us close the gap toward our digital fundraising goal. Here’s a quick channel breakdown on where we stand: = This chart doesn’t show the dates of when gifts were received, but that social media total raised amount has been the same since the first week of the month. That’s why we’re really hoping that our email donation rate can increase and make up for the low social media donation rate and help us close the $4,721 gap on time. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ******=**** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** Thank you so much for helping us out! Jimena \---------- BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE ---------- From: Eden and Megan <hello@barriertoentrypac.com> Date: August 29, 2021 at 2:32 PM ET Subject: an urgent favor for us To: Supporter <dpwillis67@gmail.com> We hate to email you on a Sunday afternoon, Peter, but honestly, we’re panicking a little bit -- so we have to ask you an urgent favor. This month completely flew by, and our end-of-month deadline is on Tuesday -- which means we have only 2 days left to raise $5,400 for our digital fundraising goal. = __= Trust us, we knew going into this fight that building a grassroots movement from the ground up wasn’t going to be an easy feat. But as young progressive women in 2021, we know that if we want to see meaningful social change, we have to step up and take bold action. Barrier To Entry PAC is all about empowering the working class, holding our government accountable to serving ALL people, and ensuring that Democratic political campaigns reflect those same inclusive values. That’s why when we say that this is a people-powered movement, we mean it. And we simply can’t succeed without the support of everyday, grassroots folks like you. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | ****=**** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** Thanks for standing with us! We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space. Pitch in today to help provide necessary support and resources for working class candidates today! >> ____= | || || Barrier To Entry PAC PO Box 6623 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States | |

Friends, I'm checking in before tomorrow's end-of-month deadline, because I’m about $1,400 shy of our fundraising goal and Michael suggested I reach out to you. Here's why this deadline is so critical: Republicans in Congress and across the country are laying the groundwork for the 2022 midterm elections. They're resorting to punishing members of their own party who stand up to Donald Trump, attempting to bury the truth about January 6th, and passing restrictive voting laws across the country. They only have to flip five seats in the House and one seat in the Senate to reclaim the majority, and experts say that they're well-positioned to win big in 2022. body:
What do I tell her? |

https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/august-end-of-month?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210830_liam_aug-eom-fwd
Friend,

Being a campaign manager is a very exciting job. On every campaign, you get to meet great supporters who are looking for a change and I even get to work hand in hand with candidates who are dedicated to helping not only the people of their state, but they work toward defending our American values in Washington.

I can say that I have never met a more dedicated candidate than Tina Ramirez.
Which is why I became worried when I received a text message from her this morning. She was reviewing our August End-of-Month and noticed that your name was absent from the list of supporters who have already stepped up.

I replied and let Tina know that you have been her #1 supporter since she launched her campaign for Congress and not to worry. But I am reaching out to make sure you saw the email she sent yesterday, it is forwarded below.

In case you missed it, I’ll give you a brief recap.

Our team has set an August End-of-Month goal of $16,000 and we only have ONE MORE DAY to crush this goal and show the nation how strong our movement is. Can we count on you to step up Friend?

Please take a moment to contribute ANY AMOUNT in the next 15 MINUTES and I’ll be able to let Tina know that you stepped up! (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/august-end-of-month?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210830_liam_aug-eom-fwd)

CONTRIBUTE $250 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/august-end-of-month?amount=250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210830_liam_aug-eom-fwd)

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. body:
Peter,

Derek has had a busy month in both Washingtons. He voted to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act through the House last week, visited the Quinault Indian Nation with Interior Secretary Deb Haaland, and even joined President Joe Biden in the Oval Office to witness the signing of a law he co-sponsored to ensure our veterans get the care they've earned.

Derek is working hard to deliver more results to hard working Americans. **But here 's the problem:** the midterm elections will be here before we know it, and Republicans are doing (and spending) whatever it takes to regain control of Congress. If we want to keep making progress, we need to hold on to our Democratic majorities.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f340acd43fc040218806eddba99fb12c&_e=qux7K8Mbc2XurZeZ8K8TFbZrFx7ZYmlHlSb9Uo8cbp6J5zXdsl08zRo-1mbXpADoyDutSEkBDSDV3_As_xKM8kLlEMSRWHot4-M1u21WP-2qgyKlcqs3ZljcQKaaYX9ZZwb1kSNjf8Wszr_Ln5qpcYKB3ceyqLgbdD0J0aSR1gTu_Lhx75gMv4czjZE85YmgfbGZKGO3lbAtU5Dik7rRqfkxSiDnaIWYdFD5zbqlcFTIIUQ3-sHuChYpcB7ARw53u63UHve7TGePVPvPWir5y9ijdDrOyQUAdAcrkPCy3dvGleiY81YoS1jwlm2azf_W)

**The world is less secure under Joe Biden**
Dear Friend,
Every time I sit down to write to you it seems like the world has become more chaotic since the last time we touched base.

The past two weeks have taken it to another level, and there is only one person to blame: Joe Biden.
[**Stand Against Biden’s Tragic Foreign Policies >>**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f340acd43fc040218806eddba99fb12c&_e=qux7K8Mbc2XurZeZ8K8TFbZrFx7ZYmlHlSb9Uo8cbp6J5zXdsl08zRo-1mbXpADoyDutSEkBDSDV3_As_xKM8qn1pGHcP2_oVR457oHTnYzMB7zFq1Y1jIVhszQllDuenGeSpNM1zTwkvocsVnD7Xas1XYunOD5JrMgLQ-c8DE63-LyFMygh1IXET7D-dZh-2zVuPV1BWN1nETbL7MZt78MWQ309JkW3ARclD8Nfr3Tdt3YFvUm6oJepqcbBQGkNX6NviM3D7nTeKqprj6_1zgAWUKDnF0N2x1qvWO0GWXixQX3EabLpYli7GQ49u39b)

America’s withdrawal from Afghanistan could not have been worse.

We _failed_ the thousands of Americans abandoned to fend for themselves under Taliban rule.

We _failed_ our allies who sent soldiers to Afghanistan to support our mission.

We _failed_ the people of Afghanistan who risked their lives to help us.

We _failed_ the Americans serving there, and we emboldened our enemies like never before.

**Make no mistake: The world is less secure under Joe Biden.**

We must, and I repeat, **must,** take back the House in 2022. Biden is too incompetent to lead.

**My liberal opponent thinks he’s going to flip this seat blue and help Pelosi keep her majority.** Will you help me show him just how wrong he is?

[**Keep this Seat Red >>**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f340acd43fc040218806eddba99fb12c&_e=qux7K8Mbc2XurZeZ8K8TFbZrFx7ZYmlHlSb9Uo8cbp6J5zXdsl08zRo-1mbXpADoyDutSEkBDSDV3_As_xKM8uUk1Klm7olxhwk5Y_gPbcv5-eaNrTh0NB-XzUih_oY3BGjsKmY0EjfeJwGrFaw25knXD3JBbEtg_WWqx0wBd9LMdn0v5qC1eVpZNP57c3ySI-Xr3ev8a_2SGve37IZ7EzWpMLYdTteQfF61e4SUkererFoQNO3SOGJwwgaQBqHoRw2g9r2l5XYs840fkMg2VdLaQkApjQ8jm4Ec49cCUDgFwS2mKMY_kHXNIF3u75OE)

With the shocking events of the past few weeks, our fundraising took a backseat and we are still $12,180 short of our fundraising for August.

Will you help us close the gap today by following this unique link?

[https://secure.winred.com/timburchett/august-end-of-month/dpwillis67@gmail.com-donation=UNKNOWN ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f340acd43fc040218806eddba99fb12c&_e=qux7K8Mbc2XurZeZ8K8TFbZrFx7ZYmlHlSb9Uo8cbp6J5zXdsl08zRo-1mbXpADoyDutSEkBDSDV3_As_xKM8t3P624mDaXVktoOkRszd40PtfCawhDB_PiB9c7CLHeHVVV5zDmgp6HwEir9mE4x8Ddfkhaav7dUVUUvdClj8jWM4NLGv3sEnUJIZQ6CYDqjYHHbZaiGJdVjgXf_SP2F6k8O4zN6koi94YBMh9O_-SnXh-JtDQIqK5NZXbOM7rAdDNZsslFDYsk6n4-LVbMgUvUO2wMm8pn9x5nLY7XVvAYHpiJDP7gtgJmcIlCAW2H5YjAe2unEKzGO4y2_T7PSNPOuS4WKOYtnqYd8T5ceMsI%3D)

Unlike my opponent, I don’t have the luxury of reaching out to deep-pocketed, special-interest liberals who want to infiltrate our conservative communities with their radical values.

[But I do have patriotic supporters like you, Friend, and together we can turn this country around if we reclaim our majority and serve as a check on Joe Biden.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f340acd43fc040218806eddba99fb12c&_e=qux7K8Mbc2XurZeZ8K8TFbZrFx7ZYmlHlSb9Uo8cbp6J5zXdsl08zRo-1mbXpADoyDutSEkBDSDV3_As_xKM8mFq82lRCu_nhhlvnkHXus8fhDHGCrp6DCicRKXMG5dp_wrN6fTFB7mBCQpk4RtVRI0LahxNEPPxvNeE-dZ1vKnR2MGt8olIjx84bg2VaKroGXIeiVlqBzqO-BsSZ40LGjyicaphCMwZliuMsXVC5ZzL7uRmaUGbpdPGkJsNZsUN8D1DS6SchjGab4trHH82DfuQG92_IFBw9af-OwlKQb6gtVr8k7RtjVEGVrX2roHh)

clean_body: | | | The world is less secure under Joe Biden Dear Friend, Every time I sit down to write to you it seems like the world has become more chaotic since the last time we touched base. The past two weeks have taken it to another level, and there is only one person to blame: Joe Biden. America’s withdrawal from Afghanistan could not have been worse. We failed the thousands of Americans abandoned to fend for themselves under Taliban rule. We failed our allies who sent soldiers to Afghanistan to support our mission. We failed the people of Afghanistan who risked their lives to help us. We failed the Americans serving there, and we emboldened our enemies like never before. Make no mistake: The world is less secure under Joe Biden. We must, and I repeat, must, take back the House in 2022. Biden is too incompetent to lead. My liberal opponent thinks he’s going to flip this seat blue and help Pelosi keep her majority. Will you help me show him just how wrong he is? With the shocking events of the past few weeks, our fundraising took a backseat and we are still $12,180 short of our fundraising for August. Will you help us close the gap today by following this unique link? Unlike my opponent, I don’t have the luxury of reaching out to deep-pocketed, special-interest liberals who want to infiltrate our conservative communities with their radical values. I know you understand the importance of the next election, and I hope you’ll take the time to help us meet our August fundraising goal, keep this seat red, and take back the House in 2022. - Thank you for your support as always. Tim Burchett | Our campaign to take back the House in 2022 is already in the works. Please chip in today to help us oust Nancy Pelosi and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. Stay in Touch 👇 | | ---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

body:
What if you knew you had the power to kick Ron Johnson out of the U.S. Senate. Wouldn’t you do it?
#
$10.
If you knew contributing $10 would send Mandela Barnes to the Senate and add one more vote for a progressive agenda that works for all of us, wouldn’t it be worth it?
If you knew $10 would take Ron Johnson out of the Senate, flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat, and expand Democrats’ majority in the chamber, wouldn’t you immediately make that donation?
We know that $10 doesn’t sound like the kind of money that can win one of the most important Senate races of the cycle, but we are here to tell you it’s more than enough.
Because by the time you got to this point in the email, someone who shares your hopes has already chipped in $10 to elect Mandela Barnes. Now we hope you will do the same. Because there’s only one way we win: together.
How about it?

Peter,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3fcc8938b17e423f9f16d4bc91e7ab4a&_e=vjD24xv-kmzbpPG-jTPxdQ0oDTQbfMoMJS9rG4_WH_pw9FcXJC5YRoP3O3CuVP_Nsz2_V7PU6em_qPvRsghZIwpqTzX5OS_UA31-5PSGNfyPsbR_i91wAzAJhe4bDRqWFkqLfiEAoGp8hEUBOe4YjeS8kOAbp9oYd7qQ8H9gLPowfQZxqIiH6jUYhkPOm5xjsHvgcE-mF5xgb7VRqOM6BoEJvec5KLdE1T6wzTW5cFLtixJirm29ps_GmUpQ8IwQlh0NfwJWipkDeyIXDfST3NkMOGhGo0EK3fbb3tclNBOMoncIXiVJaL76sgAB10Vy9t6tRwEzVnWLNE4gAv3qltwgna8R9yQk_ZtpW8vLlE6pDmDT_tBHSZVSAzvLcjPkpp6I-BkmxhFcLXARCbFlLvdhtRGFEzZVrIfwB5jXplVNjhnwhRRb3KTFSDUNQ8CCbd5rqGjALgUVDv6r9slBsSvNHrP7AOQB6FRwKE0xfQ8%3D) **

I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Peter. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

Thanks,

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Georgia on my mind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220353:JIudUQ2FN:m:1:3253819041:4D47F9BDB700F67490862C5457AB2949:r)

---
Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220353:JIudUQ2FN:m:1:3253819041:4D47F9BDB700F67490862C5457AB2949:r)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220353:JIudUQ2FN:m:1:3253819041:4D47F9BDB700F67490862C5457AB2949:r)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220353:JIudUQ2FN:m:1:3253819041:4D47F9BDB700F67490862C5457AB2949:r)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220353:JIudUQ2FN:m:1:3253819041:4D47F9BDB700F67490862C5457AB2949:r)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220353:JIudUQ2FN:m:1:3253819041:4D47F9BDB700F67490862C5457AB2949:r)
Herschel Walker

P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. **[Please help my campaign get off to a critically important start by donating $10, $20, or even $50 today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220353:JIudUQ2FN:m:1:3253819041:4D47F9BDB700F67490862C5457AB2949:r)** Thank you.

[** CHIP IN NOW -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220353:JIudUQ2FN:m:1:3253819041:4D47F9BDB700F67490862C5457AB2949:r)

[
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220354:JIudUQ2FN:m:1:3253819041:4D47F9BDB700F67490862C5457AB2949:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: marcolopez.com
subject: Donald Trump's rally in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | |
---
| | **BREAKING:
DONALD TRUMP HOLDS RALLY IN ARIZONA TO DEFEND GOP'S SHAM "ELECTION AUDIT" AND KEEP ARIZONA RED**
---
_**Friend, without a massive surge of grassroots support, we won't have the resources we need to fight back against Trump's lies and defend our state:**_
---
**[Donate $5 or more now to flip battleground Arizona blue and defeat Trumpism once and for all!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34923945/303477333/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk157-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWY1ODA2Yi1iYjA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wk3zZdS4z4JgTNItz-uwWRmehRQ1X96KIHbY3eSwaHg=)**
---
Friend, the 2020 election is long over. Donald Trump lost, Democrats won. But not everyone is able to let go – and it could spell BAD news for Arizona:
**Donald Trump recently made his first visit to Arizona since the election, holding a rally with his base of extremist supporters to defend the GOP's sham "election audit," challenge President Biden's victory and keep battleground Arizona red.**
It was shameful when the Arizona GOP welcomed QAnon conspiracy theorists Marjorie Taylor Greene and Matt Gaetz to defend this sham audit. It's clear that state GOP "leaders" like Doug Ducey and Kelli Ward aren't focused on what actual Arizonans need. They'd rather push baseless conspiracy theories with Donald Trump and his cronies than tackle the real challenges facing our state.

**With Arizona at the center of our country's fight to defend democracy, it's obvious we CANNOT hand our state's future over to Trump and his base.** **The only way to stop Trumpism from running rampant across Arizona is by kicking his supporters out of power and electing a Democratic governor.**
Marco Lopez is the strong leader Democrats need to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona's governorship blue. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms that we can win – but POLITICO reports that Republicans are getting ready to spend BIG to defeat Marco and keep this battleground red. **And at this critical moment, we're falling short of the resources we need to fight back and win this race.**

name: Team Nikki
subject: In times of crisis, Ron runs away
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

As COVID hospitalizations remain near all-time highs, Ron DeSantis went to New Jersey this weekend to raise money from a major Trump donor.

Nikki wrote to you last night that she doesn’t have a ton of time to focus on fundraising right now because Florida is in crisis. Evidently, DeSantis doesn’t care. Help us keep the pressure on Ron by making a donation today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-desantis-nj830]

For as long as we can remember, Floridians have always stepped up in times of crisis. Our leaders have put politics aside to help those in need.

Not Ron DeSantis. He’s traveling the country to raise money while ICU doctors and nurses are working around the clock to save lives. It’s unconscionable.

Friends, we need your help to stop DeSantis and compete with the MILLIONS he’s raising from Trump’s biggest donors. Help us finish August strong and fight back by making a donation today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-desantis-nj830]

Thanks for fighting with us.

—Team Nikki

body:
We need to get rid of this fraud |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f79de4cde3&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

It's time to pull the plug on His Fraudulency, Joe Biden.

The guy who never should have been President in the first place, has messed everything up to the Nth degree.

Afghanistan debacle.

Border crisis.

Inflation.

We have had enough of his lies and his radical, failed Socialist policies. It's time to #FIREBIDEN!

[That's where we come in.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=0f06d3b45c&e=ba6e67b849)

My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC - I also served in Afghanistan as an infantry officer. We are America First patriots supporting Trump and actually FIGHTING Biden - pressuring Congressmen and Senators to remove him from office!

At this point, is there any real doubt that His Fraudulency has been a complete disaster?

_A wave of prominent Republican lawmakers on Thursday called for President Joe Biden to be impeached or to resign, arguing his decisions created an environment ripe for crisis that indicates he is not capable of leadership.

“Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Antony Blinken, Lloyd Austin and General Milley should all resign or face impeachment and removal from office,” Tennessee Sen. Marsha Blackburn tweeted.

“This is the product of Joe Biden’s catastrophic failure of leadership. It is now painfully clear he has neither the will nor the capacity to lead. He must resign,” Missouri Sen. Josh Hawley said in a statement.

They join a chorus of other Republicans calling for Biden’s resignation, impeachment, or removal by the 25th Amendment, as well as the resignation of other top officials in his administration, as Taliban forces took control of the country amid a chaotic U.S. exit._

[Will you help us pressure lawmakers to #FIREBIDEN?](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=cc1e978547&e=ba6e67b849)

---
| Unfortunately, that's not all this incompetent President has unleashed on us.

Gas prices are at an 8 year high and spiking, thanks for Biden's anti-energy "Green New Deal" policies. It's part of a general spike in prices- known as inflation, which is defined as too many dollars chasing too few goods.

_**In other words, the Federal Government is printing money like crazy but the country isn't producing enough. Welcome to Socialism.**_

_And of course, we have all seen the grizzly images of the humanitarian crisis at the Southern border._ Tens of thousands of unaccompanied children, criminals and gang members, and illegal immigrants streaming across our border.

Not only has Biden refused to enforce Federal law, but he actually STOPPED construction on Trump's border wall, which was actually working to stop illegal immigration!

He has refused to enforce Federal immigration law, for which the Supreme Court has already smacked him down. He is spending us into oblivion and causing inflation, paying people NOT to work.

It's time to end this nightmare. Time to use impeachment, or the 25th Amendment, to #FIREBIDEN.

| Now, this won't be easy. There are some weak-kneed "Republicans" who will resist. That's why Drain the DC Swamp PAC needs to pressure those weak Republicans and soft Dems to impeach him and remove him!

Who knows, maybe if he's impeached he might resign like Nixon did. God knows he should.

**We cannot trust the politicians to do the right thing- many of them, anyway. They won't see the light until they feel the heat!**

It's time to block ALL of Biden's nominees to anything. It's time to block ALL his legislation. It's time to remove this demented fool before he destroys the country.

The 14 American soldiers killed in Afghanistan due to Biden's incompetence and lies deserve nothing less. _**He MUST be held accountable, and if the establishment politicians won't do it, we will make life difficult for them!**_

[Help us pressure these guys into doing the right thing for the country.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=9b8f83a6ae&e=ba6e67b849)

clean_body: We need to get rid of this fraud | | | | | Hi Peter, It's time to pull the plug on His Fraudulency, Joe Biden. The guy who never should have been President in the first place, has messed everything up to the Nth degree. Afghanistan debacle. Border crisis. Inflation. We have had enough of his lies and his radical, failed Socialist policies. It's time to #FIREBIDEN! My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC - I also served in Afghanistan as an infantry officer. We are America First patriots supporting Trump and actually FIGHTING Biden - pressuring Congressmen and Senators to remove him from office! At this point, is there any real doubt that His Fraudulency has been a complete disaster? A wave of prominent Republican lawmakers on Thursday called for President Joe Biden to be impeached or to resign, arguing his decisions created an environment ripe for crisis that indicates he is not capable of leadership. “Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Antony Blinken, Lloyd Austin and General Milley should all resign or face impeachment and removal from office,” Tennessee Sen. Marsha Blackburn tweeted. “This is the product of Joe Biden’s catastrophic failure of leadership. It is now painfully clear he has neither the will nor the capacity to lead. He must resign,” Missouri Sen. Josh Hawley said in a statement. They join a chorus of other Republicans calling for Biden’s resignation, impeachment, or removal by the 25th Amendment, as well as the resignation of other top officials in his administration, as Taliban forces took control of the country amid a chaotic U.S. exit. | | Unfortunately, that's not all this incompetent President has unleashed on us. Gas prices are at an 8 year high and spiking, thanks for Biden's anti-energy "Green New Deal" policies. It's part of a general spike in prices- known as inflation, which is defined as too many dollars chasing too few goods. In other words, the Federal Government is printing money like crazy but the country isn't producing enough. Welcome to Socialism. And of course, we have all seen the grizzly images of the humanitarian crisis at the Southern border. Tens of thousands of unaccompanied children, criminals and gang members, and illegal immigrants streaming across our border. Not only has Biden refused to enforce Federal law, but he actually STOPPED construction on Trump's border wall, which was actually working to stop illegal immigration! He has refused to enforce Federal immigration law, for which the Supreme Court has already smacked him down. He is spending us into oblivion and causing inflation, paying people NOT to work. It's time to end this nightmare. Time to use impeachment, or the 25th Amendment, to #FIREBIDEN. | | Now, this won't be easy. There are some weak-kneed "Republicans" who will resist. That's why Drain the DC Swamp PAC needs to pressure those weak Republicans and soft Dems to impeach him and remove him! Who knows, maybe if he's impeached he might resign like Nixon did. God knows he should. We cannot trust the politicians to do the right thing- many of them, anyway. They won't see the light until they feel the heat! It's time to block ALL of Biden's nominees to anything. It's time to block ALL his legislation. It's time to remove this demented fool before he destroys the country. The 14 American soldiers killed in Afghanistan due to Biden's incompetence and lies deserve nothing less. He MUST be held accountable, and if the establishment politicians won't do it, we will make life difficult for them! Swampers always betray you the first chance they get, and every single time thereafter. Time to ramp up the pressure! It won't stop at Biden either. We need to impeach Harris and the rest of this failed Woke Socialist bunch. | Thank you! Respectfully, | | Jarrin Jackson Chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC Combat Infantry Veteran P.S. We must defeat these enemies of the Republic!! | "DONATE NOW!" | | | | Copyright © 2021 Drain the DC Swamp PAC, All rights reserved. Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Fellow Conservative, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=96cea9fb30ce43ada9ea9195fc9daa3a&_e=My5N9Xfb2tuxodgeSW69geiLRSkKcBOaSogdGWwrO2zG9I5LObD2UuFmKzdz5d4geL210YH-XDURbgiPrXMdvMVOelHMjHkTwePg-15xgtSwb-ihWmee5TiLGADsiJiSbBQxvNJRK-2HbI88ks50ShDtwRC5Bro_R1Zieids_D6kTHUzPdaqMheY5ibqsXT9_obxNhGN_ZG6wXN1jeE3UWcc3uS0pnEmA9um5EMxd33UD5ggDCc5lLja8GlasPMTI-PJcCz2K4pAUbTwb4vPVVv463xPfszRxJcL8FXLx-QBcP0BOwyf55M8IGb1C6YAnvJLCoqxTFckDrIbo64NuLlGZwKYP3_mfPeYun3Y9hu5kO4GjI4X3PBe2sdTjmKUqCqCghhBpp9tzOLghwU3v5y-rOd76uMjYxkukhAmjlFhZ2wlzq93UbZ8Mi7kUKg8p0htVNUEj4JZLwbl1tiF8w%3D%3D) **

I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Fellow Conservative. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=96cea9fb30ce43ada9ea9195fc9daa3a&_e=My5N9Xfb2tuxodgeSW69geiLRSkKcBOaSogdGWwrO2zG9I5LObD2UuFmKzdz5d4geL210YH-XDURbgiPrXMdvMVOelHMjHkTwePg-15xgtSwb-ihWmee5TiLGADsiJiSbBQxvNJRK-2HbI88ks50ShDtwRC5Bro_R1Zieids_D6kTHUzPdaqMheY5ibqsXT9_obxNhGN_ZG6wXN1jeE3UWcc3uS0pnEmA9um5EMxd33UD5ggDCc5lLja8GlasPMTyYi6Qg7i_neHfL5yHIKS7QfXGCOSCAYX1rmnDALIT7OOavNdyolSRqUbK_0ecpizONm74TM6CI981BKQhEFAUky5MrJjtLixBTQpmRWPH9adj8ynRB9Hg4b5u_pqw0yh8ZJck-VhIkHtLkYQITE3ONDeU1WmMMDL9ntRT721LrsWgr02DGhKvzABJ55CewNwrNU_BUpXYppDuI5EmSwvQg%3D%3D) **

I’ve been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I’ve ever been a part of. Fellow Conservative, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=96cea9fb30ce43ada9ea9195fc9daa3a&_e=My5N9Xfb2tuxodgeSW69geiLRSkKcBOaSogdGWwrO2zG9I5LObD2UuFmKzdz5d4geL210YH-XDURbgiPrXMdvMVOelHMjHkTwePg-15xgtSwb-ihWmee5TiLGADsiJiSbBQxvNJRK-2HbI88ks50ShDtwRC5Bro_R1Zieids_D6kTHUzPdaqMheY5ibqsXT9_obxNhGN_ZG6wXN1jeE3UWcc3uS0pnEmA9um5EMxd33UD5ggDCc5lLja8GlasPMTQRV3KHUtLutNCOsL_TCd4MHNvExAncW9imDn2xv6vmEaVigX8sEUHXXjJ5LlB5O6lFd3_lJ_1VP4mRUuVcjjRXXoaP4QSpw4r2AlWEpqFi8oXF9VOTtqeR79XsgA1eW0YUFrW8BVJPV1SU_cidlhsG1wTvwr1tZN49Y7gVwo-BZjdBCbCY3NZmp9LdUGhN8-AoIHgnXDbQ9HnTC1Gz4X4g%3D%3D)

Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help close the gap? Fellow patriot,

Out of 435 members of the House of Representatives, do you know how many members are women?

A. 57
B. 119
C. 267

If you guessed B - 119 women, then you would be right. But out of those 119, **_only 31 are Republican women._**

I’m hoping we will add at least one more in 2022. You see, we have a chance to make history here in South Texas. Not only can we send the first Republican from Texas’ 15th district, **_but we also can send the first Hispanic female Republican from Texas to Congress in its history._**

| [**Let’s make history ⇒**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=94d3f46479c046cebd67b3b72ae98740&_e=ZndUjE6DuhcfaIZ2dag9GW_A2x4daiptJpgNeDzv1uHPpJSFtgwD0gV693rlHkSlKtug76SatK8SeyyQ0Fot3XRpYIXc63hdUMiBx7I9fTy24RUSRrvWgvie7_ehoYD0pGg4PZOu_Ir9uDid1VbRQLegSgMloh9DzEheZkQ4me0vwPN0KPrSHOd0ziEWMz2rnyu8bUE7Qhe3Hq6qS30hKek5IM5lTD7JU1tfhwoD5-2XbJ3ARrJsKX3JwTeZ8FsGgD-TzgW5L0EjpP67WqfysreqRTeSF-xADvrVVf1iq5D1D1ecVMN9rUIhJdJkNbZdjP1ODM-7TMjz__L0AGQpuEzBU1tE0oOoD2tLBq79Fdn9Ao4o402jVq4QOCFXA7alDFSCMFGiu9zUNdNMu97mAk8Y9bGEhlGlabuncra35HAWFVVmTqvwdH7SC9Ik9rMz0KwC2MxdX7BVDduO4zDP-UzlrD4nEh-4GngIYGgI4SU%3D)
---

The Democrats are closely watching our race since their stronghold in South Texas is slipping through their hands. Liberals took Hispanic and Latinos for granted – assuming we would always show up and blindly vote for their candidate. **_But that’s not happening anymore._** Their views are not our views. We are pro-life, pro-jobs, pro-2nd Amendment, pro-God, and pro-America and we are not one-issue voters.

[**This week marks the mid-point in the third quarter of our campaign’s FEC fundraising deadline and I’m asking you to chip in $10 or more to my campaign today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=94d3f46479c046cebd67b3b72ae98740&_e=ZndUjE6DuhcfaIZ2dag9GW_A2x4daiptJpgNeDzv1uHPpJSFtgwD0gV693rlHkSlKtug76SatK8SeyyQ0Fot3XRpYIXc63hdUMiBx7I9fTy24RUSRrvWgvie7_ehoYD0pGg4PZOu_Ir9uDid1VbRQLegSgMloh9DzEheZkQ4me0vwPN0KPrSHOd0ziEWMz2rnyu8bUE7Qhe3Hq6qS30hKek5IM5lTD7JU1tfhwoD5-2XbJ3ARrJsKX3JwTeZ8FsGgD-TzgW5L0EjpP67Wqfysl3jQcHpZ3YWHqo5hzDSnNBwwTQxYv65O90sOBe2zKiflvwGkJph4k5WYcPZGiCCFcwmtVWaocl3zdhzpFtKR0pieDSbI3LqnCbP4bBBEpXH_M_pQFCiL8pYokkIB1KAdnJWQZakkyoz3JNhn6FgVAS94GEdqZKKYfL-9vgk6R1P1pFzSusLatKK9FTzSgz0q0Qpv3XiR67Y6KOuTfgMszw%3D) You might have heard me say in previous emails to you that I ran against Democrat Vicente Gonzalez in 2020 and fell short by **just 6,588 votes.**

This time around, I know we can win and help Republicans pick up one of the FIVE seats needed to win back the House and make history by electing the first Republican in 118 years from Texas’ 15th district.

[**So, if you’re interested in making history by helping to send a Republican Hispanic woman to Congress, please consider contributing $10, $25, or even $100 today, and let’s flip a blue seat RED.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=94d3f46479c046cebd67b3b72ae98740&_e=ZndUjE6DuhcfaIZ2dag9GW_A2x4daiptJpgNeDzv1uHPpJSFtgwD0gV693rlHkSlKtug76SatK8SeyyQ0Fot3XRpYIXc63hdUMiBx7I9fTy24RUSRrvWgvie7_ehoYD0pGg4PZOu_Ir9uDid1VbRQLegSgMloh9DzEheZkQ4me0vwPN0KPrSHOd0ziEWMz2rnyu8bUE7Qhe3Hq6qS30hKek5IM5lTD7JU1tfhwoD5-2XbJ3ARrJsKX3JwTeZ8FsGgD-TzgW5L0EjpP67WqfyssC_FGxj3iE7b2XizYhDC-sS1JE1QIAAeWgvi-HipvvSkzHMPFFX4KqwlLz330_P0drXTYfQITbx2DDsw_xXp0f8h28WOogtWqoLTbCvY4myviXyNYc542RIaGhOSNlWR2n9E8keHi8Xd1WFR3165IbM7IdqwYPlwlpSiFEgA_kKV5LxlxCECSZFRNCOALgKHl5RTMiup-4U9Xl3VoBmM_E%3D)
