subject: FWD: Sorry to bother you on a Monday, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | | Did you miss my email yesterday? We are just ONE DAY away from the most important deadline of the year, and I need your help.

Check out my note below, and please **[CHIP IN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58219772:6yqB0Q2lN:m:1:3253819041:D44C660BA73C1BB41A16A4AD68A6390A:r "CHIP IN")** whatever you can to help us defeat the radical Left.

-Mike

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Mike Pompeo** <mike@cavpac.com>
Date: Sun, Aug 29, 2021 at 11:52 AM
Subject: Sorry to bother you on a Sunday
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58219772:6yqB0Q2lN:m:1:3253819041:D44C660BA73C1BB41A16A4AD68A6390A:r)
---

I'm sorry to bother you on a Monday, but _**[I need a quick favor.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58219772:6yqB0Q2lN:m:1:3253819041:D44C660BA73C1BB41A16A4AD68A6390A:r "but I need a quick
favor.")**_

My team just let me know that we are still coming up a little short of our fundraising goal ahead of the big deadline tomorrow.

**Here 's why this is so important: we need to exceed our goal in order to have the resources necessary to help principled conservatives WIN BIG in the upcoming elections. **

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58219772:6yqB0Q2lN:m:1:3253819041:D44C660BA73C1BB41A16A4AD68A6390A:r)
---

I'm traveling all over the country to support Republican candidates in important races like Sarah Huckabee Sanders in Arkansas, Tim Scott in South Carolina, Ashley Hinson in Iowa and Lee Zeldin in New York.

The Democrats have their Big Money machine in overdrive collecting cash from bigwig donors, so we need to match their Big Money with support from real, patriotic Americans like you. They may have the Hollywood elites on their side, but I know we can defeat them if enough grassroots conservatives chip in $100, $50 or $25 dollars toward our big goal.
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58219772:6yqB0Q2lN:m:1:3253819041:D44C660BA73C1BB41A16A4AD68A6390A:r)
---
If we come up short, that will mean open borders, higher taxes, socialist policies and new restrictions on our ability to live out our faith. Our core American values are at stake, and **[I am counting on you to help us stop the Democrats before it is too late.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58219772:6yqB0Q2lN:m:1:3253819041:D44C660BA73C1BB41A16A4AD68A6390A:r "I am counting on you to help us stop the Democrats before it is too late.")**

All eyes are watching, so please help get us across the finish line. I'm counting on you.
---
Never Give an Inch,
---

body:
The fact that President Biden and his administration still refuse to take responsibility for surrendering to the Taliban... [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=4503c22ae1e448a8b34e49953f7a3bf1&_e=KvpNv82wbZy0u_6t7q3DrhgCV1E7IrZmI_1_EnCyGaI4eJ6o0pb1MVUmJ5sYX9mBQT3wzNnDaR3lSkN8WBRuxf9fvfWOhWkbSOEhJU1BgxobxQiEGreMZujRI3fVfBvRXFp59M33vapgazkGAfXIAC0xDBf3a06yEg2OYFQy3b4Mk2H2pp1Dird1lb1J7JgSqoa6UQCmHy7SfYWmR67uuzw95vGmhnj8P6ehgz5kFdga_4K20vtWZXjkK4JQHCZq2wUvI4-6aiTCKBsyIoKojeiQSaSsgWpBw8QJ6GLgMGVBw2OxKc3vE5da2ej2DV_wXOpOMyt-IuPK8LtkeAXIbMz8VBe5hTV_IGaJl_93a41wd27qjJom4Bc7T72uL-1-l-XhuOdSuFtRZP4vLUSd7iLVV2Gh4bz9c_5o-ay7jDo67qz4syQw9dkmHoA6YShvybJdmHtKvc8F1Gv1orpAhA%3D%3D) Friend, The fact that President Biden and his administration _still_ refuse to take responsibility for surrendering to the Taliban proves that Democrats are not fit to lead America. It’s beyond shameful –– and Congressman Gallagher isn’t letting them off the hook for abandoning our allies and empowering our enemies. _But here’s the bottom line, Friend:_
**When America’s leaders are weak,****_America_****is weak. That’s why we’re counting on dedicated patriots like yourself to stand up with Mike.** [**STAND WITH MIKE: DONATE NOW**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=4503c22ae1e448a8b34e49953f7a3bf1&_e=KvpNv82wbZy0u_6t7q3DrhgCV1E7IrZmI_1_EnCyGaI4eJ6o0pb1MVUmJ5sYX9mBQT3wzNnDaR3lSkN8WBRuxf9fvfWOhWkbSOEhJU1BgxobxQiEGreMZujRI3fVfBvRXFp59M33vapgazkGAfXIAC0xDBf3a06yEg2OYFQy3b4Mk2H2pp1Dird1lb1J7JgSqoa6UQCmHy7SfYWmR67uuzw95vGmhnj8P6ehgz5kFdga_4K20vtWZXjkK4JQHCZqTwRaMER5Xc-f5UFCwpsb196tyebkqGO27dKKmbmrcm4tRXqWgXrVmMQ54_Z-sV0K-0iEMvrHDekuI_6qmhvOSdziJJCKJIjV7NShHPHqUadx220prPwgBXtiT2A7axptRb1JEgJlTm_tpzePLeJVZ3P5vWe3trir16ADycn1cgPUiI_Z29IBo4FnEo7joMyv2XtE8mmqxsobQsbIiqSE7Q%3D%3D) **Together, we will:** 🇺🇸 Protect our freedoms 🇺🇸 Restore strong, patriotic leadership in Congress 🇺🇸 Stand up to our enemies who have been empowered by the Left The truth is, carrying out this mission will be easier said than done. **→ Border Crisis**
**→ Inflation Crisis**
**→ Labor Crisis**
**→ Gas Shortage**
**→ And, now a crisis in Afghanistan. **

The blame for each and every one falls solely on Joe Biden himself because he’s directly caused them.

Joe Biden is destroying America and has betrayed the American people, and for that reason, **he must be****IMPEACHED!**

clean_body: We’re not sure why anyone found Biden to be... | | Friend, did you catch this headline from the Post Millennial? According to a recent CBS poll , a majority of Americans no longer find Biden “competent, focused or effective at his job.” We’re not sure why anyone found Biden to be ‘competent' in the first place, considering we’re amidst a: → Border Crisis → Inflation Crisis → Labor Crisis → Gas Shortage → And, now a crisis in Afghanistan. The blame for each and every one falls solely on Joe Biden himself because he’s directly caused them. Joe Biden is destroying America and has betrayed the American people, and for that reason, he must beIMPEACHED! Friend, we can’t make that happen unless conservatives like Jeff Bartos can take back control of Congress. 🚨 AUGUST END OF MONTH DEADLINE 🚨 | | ---|---|--- Friend, it looks like the honeymoon phase between Biden and the mainstream media is finally coming to an end...or they decided even they can’t cover for the disaster that is his presidency. We need to take advantage of this momentum and work to start getting Biden out of officeー Thank you, Team Bartos | | | Paid for by Bartos for US Senate | | 1152 Mae Street #129, Hummelstown, PA, 17036 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Jessica Morse
subject: How to Survive a Blitz
body:
| | | |
---
Dear Friends,
The last few weeks have felt like living through “Apocalypse’s Greatest Hits”: The Caldor Fire narrowly missed my old neighborhood of Pollock Pines but is astonishingly burning across granite and is currently bearing down on South Lake Tahoe; a monster hurricane is bludgeoning the Gulf; the COVID-19 Delta variant is returning the grim necessity of mobile morgues; America’s longest war came to a heartbreaking, devastating, and abrupt end. On top of all this, Californians are navigating a recall election that feels as senseless and serious as a neighbor driving a car into your living room.
Like many of you, I feel heartbroken. These crises are deeply personal. It’s okay to feel scared. It’s okay to feel angry. It’s okay to cry. It’s not okay to quit.
A friend recently reminded me of the tactics needed to survive a blitz. When overwhelming forces storm every gate, centuries stand guard at their respective posts while surge support from the middle bolsters the weakest points.
This onslaught of crises feels nothing short of a blitz. Decide today if you’re guarding a post or are the surge team. If you’re guarding a post, pick a crisis and focus your energy, creativity and resources on ameliorating that suffering. Or be part of the surge and donate a little to each crisis. Your action will not only make a tangible impact for those in need, but will also help you better cope with the relentlessness of our unprecedented times. Here are a few areas to support:
Caldor Fire Evacuees: [**El Dorado Community Foundation**](https://u16460731.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=qgoVdeQlpz6CpGaA3-2FPr8gty2wvtczgwzaJVavTQ3rHU8Vm4ME1jCiQWHkBYyBMA4Pzdu3t25-2BOgt625CW9TIrIZSfqBF-2Btjrpd1HCWR63U-3Dd95G_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz66iNb0gZ5wIPcD6OEMs9qCzZZ3nXe4zu0XaqYhFDNwDv0XOA0Qy2y2EuPJcKGTe6dwMCZgpGjfrkM9DayuR5IYEgkN8lbrHA4aQnrvBAmpg18w7w-2BC-2FqDJRrZ1mKl6DWx6xmPt02vDm7mXVm5qnTqQVdPc-2BApYTC0Zi0DtaUW2YnzuCKHOLYBXShyIhtNIqchrPZM0eHVljKEV1L-2FjYsb3dbhX01rJrZakGzfJD-2BDQfdo2BS-2BlsimH5igQTiPVb9XK5AJMdeLljHr6zornTKRvB5zAmRVNUc8H-2F-2B8E9htaYiG9Y0X0rcJmUnM9zOicdpsrkIAGKQJkKoPrcSiiaGhIwCpGuYNmMXN7VmYQIfKB4KqfdioALOOJAkMVH0WnO42ylfHZcin-2FDDFDpy2wnw710ml81HRzorbas-2FH1iajfOdSqUZ3xM77ATOs1cd0jEMks1vR3QaNn-2B6S8xCoEJT-2B2TvU-2BHnMD66TBUJKWnRH-2BiT3mH0YFPEg8dxT1ZMQl84tAjP5VDj-2FA-2Bt-2FMwhGfesL5NJ-2FG2NhWoZQawFPQPPe37l3z9yquyKI9Ocd3GVG0xlkBAJFxShU9sVPP4CTPHXR64l7bUr-2Fe6D3VzhGGAfEb1qE6KXVOsOYL5mfo2Y8jEBj2RY6Jfa6Veqhhgq-2FDDSPFSQH1dAvwqc6nOIvEZfL9-2FaKLBOHXLrnzASh7WDhlzP-2FVqsSjHygubjTM39xu58Eu-2F-2FjUsn1FjDeGWMTu8V8Jy4-3D)
California Recall: I’ll be launching [**this Canvass**](https://u16460731.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=rf6U8ijtGmaHDE08oAvVWvGEB0RL-2FWje35-2FBQqcz7p4whQ9WS1tArj3Vv5i50fV2T0LHpJIFoMgYSZ0RVD0eAQ-3D-3DJ7UG_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz66iNb0gZ5wIPcD6OEMs9qCzZZ3nXe4zu0XaqYhFDNwDv0XOA0Qy2y2EuPJcKGTe6dwMCZgpGjfrkM9DayuR5IYEgkN8lbrHA4aQnrvBAmpg18w7w-2BC-2FqDJRrZ1mKl6DWx6xmPt02vDm7mXVm5qnTqQVdPc-2BApYTC0Zi0DtaUW2YnzuCKHOLYBXShyIhtNIqchrPZM0eHVljKEV1L-2FjYsb3dbhX01rJrZakGzfJD-2BDQfdo2BS-2BlsimH5igQTiPVb9XK5AJMdeLljHr6zornTKRvB5zAmRVNUc8H-2F-2B8E9htaYiG9Y0X0rcJmUnM9zOicdpsrkIAGKQJkKoPrcSiiaGhIwCpGuYNmMXN7VmYQIfKB4KqfdioALOOJAkMVH0WnO42ylfHZcin-2FDDFDpy2wnw710ml81HRzorbas-2FH1iajfOdSqUZ3xM77ATOs1cd0jEMks1vR3QaNn-2B6S8xCoEJT-2B2TvU-2BHnMD66TBUJKWnRH-2BiT3mH0YFPEg8dxT1ZMQl84tAjP5VDj-2FA-2Bt-2FMwhGfesL5NJ-2FG2NhWoZQawFPQPPe37l3z9yquyKI9Ocd3GVG0xlkBAJFxShU9sVPP4CTPHXR6y53rshQ5ePbBJE-2FJJOd3Lcjfgeu5aJ04Z7toi9ZilBF7wuhOD333bPqTYbpJ1BDtE52iA-2Bxui-2BvZGqklzS8OLcy7rQDhUK0yWnKYkDmTlRY60DaWK4KE2ZvZVYOUKrY0rG-2B33BWWIeBdu9Hb72vLJQ-3D) next Saturday in Roseville, I hope you'll join or pick one near you.
Afghan Refugees: [**World Relief Sacramento**](https://u16460731.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=rf6U8ijtGmaHDE08oAvVWqIOI9cB1bpPFOqBxr5Vu4s5IlnJ9gYv08b1Cs1dbkIaFLsD_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz66iNb0gZ5wIPcD6OEMs9qCzZZ3nXe4zu0XaqYhFDNwDv0XOA0Qy2y2EuPJcKGTe6dwMCZgpGjfrkM9DayuR5IYEgkN8lbrHA4aQnrvBAmpg18w7w-2BC-2FqDJRrZ1mKl6DWx6xmPt02vDm7mXVm5qnTqQVdPc-2BApYTC0Zi0DtaUW2YnzuCKHOLYBXShyIhtNIqchrPZM0eHVljKEV1L-2FjYsb3dbhX01rJrZakGzfJD-2BDQfdo2BS-2BlsimH5igQTiPVb9XK5AJMdeLljHr6zornTKRvB5zAmRVNUc8H-2F-2B8E9htaYiG9Y0X0rcJmUnM9zOicdpsrkIAGKQJkKoPrcSiiaGhIwCpGuYNmMXN7VmYQIfKB4KqfdioALOOJAkMVH0WnO42ylfHZcin-2FDDFDpy2wnw710ml81HRzorbas-2FH1iajfOdSqUZ3xM77ATOs1cd0jEMks1vR3QaNn-2B6S8xCoEJT-2B2TvU-2BHnMD66TBUJKWnRH-2BiT3mH0YFPEg8dxT1ZMQl84tAjP5VDj-2FA-2Bt-2FMwhGfesL5NJ-2FG2NhWoZQawFPQPPe37l3z9yquyKI9Ocd3GVG0xlkBAJFxShU9sVPP4CTPHXR66AZRgQ0GcZ1SXNWEG-2Fz7-2Fh6FWHozrANxM4ct8-2F-2BZ7hEU7T50DhinS5hF1zzFpU2ZZf3BYR8PfhlbeK1WBTi9qKJT0tQcE3fi18tz07TH1pqrWIsGdS-2FMYPxnZeS-2FdOEhQRUVB9rExj5vyX7vyWDG-2Fc-3D)**** is supporting local Afghan resettlement.
For me, I’ve got my post. The wildfire crisis is both my full time job and immediately upon my doorstep. The Caldor Fire swept into my old neighborhood in Pollock Pines last week, and impacted scores of family and friends. My spare room and sofa are going on week two of fire evacuees safely hunkered away from the Caldor Fire (one friend is pregnant and could have the baby any day, adding to the excitement). With South Lake Tahoe and Meyers now evacuated, tens of thousands of Californians will need your help.
I’ve also been canvassing to stop the Recall every weekend. The Recall is one crisis we can control. So take a few minutes, vote “no” on your ballot, mail it back, then text 10 friends and remind them to also vote "no."
I’m so grateful for the courage and resilience of friends standing at each post. From firefighters on the frontlines of the Caldor Fire to friends organizing airlifts to evacuate Afghan refugees, we are in this together and have the courage, grit and resilience, to meet this moment head on.
In solidarity,
Jessica

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friends, The last few weeks have felt like living through “Apocalypse’s Greatest Hits”: The Caldor Fire narrowly missed my old neighborhood of Pollock Pines but is astonishingly burning across granite and is currently bearing down on South Lake Tahoe; a monster hurricane is bludgeoning the Gulf; the COVID-19 Delta variant is returning the grim necessity of mobile morgues; America’s longest war came to a heartbreaking, devastating, and abrupt end. On top of all this, Californians are navigating a recall election that feels as senseless and serious as a neighbor driving a car into your living room. Like many of you, I feel heartbroken. These crises are deeply personal. It’s okay to feel scared. It’s okay to feel angry. It’s okay to cry. It’s not okay to quit. A friend recently reminded me of the tactics needed to survive a blitz. When overwhelming forces storm every gate, centuries stand guard at their respective posts while surge support from the middle bolsters the weakest points. This onslaught of crises feels nothing short of a blitz. Decide today if you’re guarding a post or are the surge team. If you’re guarding a post, pick a crisis and focus your energy, creativity and resources on ameliorating that suffering. Or be part of the surge and donate a little to each crisis. Your action will not only make a tangible impact for those in need, but will also help you better cope with the relentlessness of our unprecedented times. Here are a few areas to support: Caldor Fire Evacuees: California Recall: I’ll be launching next Saturday in Roseville, I hope you'll join or pick one near you. Afghan Refugees: **** is supporting local Afghan resettlement. For me, I’ve got my post. The wildfire crisis is both my full time job and immediately upon my doorstep. The Caldor Fire swept into my old neighborhood in Pollock Pines last week, and impacted scores of family and friends. My spare room and sofa are going on week two of fire evacuees safely hunkered away from the Caldor Fire (one friend is pregnant and could have the baby any day, adding to the excitement). With South Lake Tahoe and Meyers now evacuated, tens of thousands of Californians will need your help. I’ve also been canvassing to stop the Recall every weekend. The Recall is one crisis we can control. So take a few minutes, vote “no” on your ballot, mail it back, then text 10 friends and remind them to also vote "no." I’m so grateful for the courage and resilience of friends standing at each post. From firefighters on the frontlines of the Caldor Fire to friends organizing airlifts to evacuate Afghan refugees, we are in this together and have the courage, grit and resilience, to meet this moment head on. In solidarity, Jessica

subject: Courage

body:
Taking on the gun lobby, extremist lawmakers in Congress and the National Shooting Sports Foundation is going to take a LOT of courage
#

Friends, with our end-of-month fundraising deadline rapidly approaching, Gabby Giffords has a question for you:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21-eom?refcode=em210830-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=758_3935704_SInOtN&akid=758%2E3935704%2ESInOtN)
Because taking on the gun lobby, extremist lawmakers in Congress and the National Shooting Sports Foundation is going to take a LOT of courage.
**So if you are feeling up to the challenge and you want to join us in our fight to pass background checks and END gun violence in our communities, then please...**
[**Make a $3 contribution to Giffords before tomorrow’s big end-of-month deadline. We are on the way to hitting our $100,000 fundraising goal but we will only make it over the finish line if YOU step up now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21-eom?refcode=em210830-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=758_3935704_SInOtN&akid=758%2E3935704%2ESInOtN)

– The team at Giffords

name: Rep. Pat Fallon
subject: US Judge reclaims 'Remain in Mexico' policy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fallon for Congress
body:
[](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/NEtHYOiJUWgHRxj6qKYjAQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRjD3weP0UgYWUyMmNkOTQ1MWJkZTA1MDEyMDliN2IzNWM1N2FiYmREOmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9hc3lsdW0tY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1QgphJx73LGHAI9i8UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)
Peter,
Progress at the border! **Federal Judge Matthew J. Kacsmaryk recently ordered that President Trump’s “Remain in Mexico” policy be reinstated!** This policy mandates that those seeking asylum in the U.S. must remain in Mexico while their application is processed.
**This is great news** , but the fight to secure our border continues! Common sense measures like this one will be challenged by the progressive establishment in Washington as **Democrats seek to fling open our borders.** **Indeed, the Biden Administration has already appealed this common sense decision.**
**_[>> RUSH IN $35 TO SECURE OUR BORDER! <<](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/NEtHYOiJUWgHRxj6qKYjAQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRjD3weP0UgYWUyMmNkOTQ1MWJkZTA1MDEyMDliN2IzNWM1N2FiYmREOmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9hc3lsdW0tY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1QgphJx73LGHAI9i8UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)_**
[](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/NEtHYOiJUWgHRxj6qKYjAQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRjD3weP0UgYWUyMmNkOTQ1MWJkZTA1MDEyMDliN2IzNWM1N2FiYmREOmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9hc3lsdW0tY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1QgphJx73LGHAI9i8UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)

Illegal immigration advocates say this policy is inhumane, but consider the alternative - **nearly 70% of asylum seekers in the U.S. fail to make their court date for their asylum hearing. They just disappear into the United States.**
So our options are either continue to play catch-and-release with illegal immigrants or hold asylum seekers in custody until their court dates. **Neither of these is as good a solution as simply processing asylum claims _before_ asylum seekers come here.**
But **Democrats aren’t interested in the true facts on the ground**. They only want to ensure that they appear to the media and to their woke base as welcoming of all migrants -- legal and illegal.** It’s that kind of naive and opportunist thinking that brought us the border crisis in the first place.**

[**_> > TAKE THE BORDER CRISIS SERIOUSLY <<_**](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/NEtHYOiJUWgHRxj6qKYjAQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRjD3weP0UgYWUyMmNkOTQ1MWJkZTA1MDEyMDliN2IzNWM1N2FiYmREOmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9hc3lsdW0tY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1QgphJx73LGHAI9i8UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)

**As long as Democrats control both Congress and the presidency, they will continue to push the lie that everybody who applies for asylum is doing so out of only the purest motives, and deserves to be turned loose within our borders.**
We must reclaim control of our borders, and the only way to do it is to end Democrat control of Washington! **With Republicans in charge, we can bring back President Trump’s common sense measures to police our border.** [**_Will you help us?_**](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/NEtHYOiJUWgHRxj6qKYjAQ~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRjD3weP0UgYWUyMmNkOTQ1MWJkZTA1MDEyMDliN2IzNWM1N2FiYmREOmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9hc3lsdW0tY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1QgphJx73LGHAI9i8UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)

_Pat Fallon_

# Hello Fellow Patriots and Campaign Volunteers!

Below is a list of ways to volunteer. Please reply with the option or options you are interested in and we will provide you with more information.

**We will be planning another Volunteer Pizza Party ----So stay on the lookout for that email!!**

**#1. DOOR KNOCK **

-You can door knock for one day only, one day a month, one day a week or every day! YOU Decide how much time you can offer. *The campaign will provide a door knocking list, materials and further detail.

**#2**. Spend some time in one spot **collecting CANDIDATE PETITION FORM Signatures**. (IE: a store, the beach etc.)

-We need 2,568 Signature to get Melissa Martz on the ballot. Any registered voter can sign the form. This is not a vote and is just to get on the ballot. *The campaign will provide materials and further detail.

**#3. SEND Fundraising emails. **

-The campaign will provide the generic email and an email list. The campaign will provide materials and further detail.

Thank you to each one who has already donated their time, energy and talents! It is going to take each one of us doing our part to see the difference made in this 2022 election. We are unified and we are ready to take our Country back!

STAY FREE,

Melissa Martz Campaign
[www.melissamartz.com](https://melissamartz.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4170e64cfef2b4eb82baf8e12&id=41256aed10&e=77bc5297c6)

time is running out | | | **With time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're still falling $12,541 short of our goal. That's why Sen. Raphael Warnock is reaching out with an urgent message:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34930250/303499613/683353327?refcode=20210830_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OThmNzlkMy1jYjA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-PFC9_9j8bAuBwEq09zkQbs0HNNc7POK78iUSnoHafA=) [**Before tonight's critical midnight deadline, will you answer Raphael's call and give $10 or more so we can hit our midnight goal, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34930255/303499620/683353327?refcode=20210830_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OThmNzlkMy1jYjA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-PFC9_9j8bAuBwEq09zkQbs0HNNc7POK78iUSnoHafA=) Friend, **we have ZERO room for error**. With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell – and now, NBC News reports that the GOP is making Raphael their TOP target for defeat. Thanks to Democrats' _razor-thin_ Senate majority, we've been able to make huge strides in defending voting rights, supporting working families and rebuilding our country's economy. **But the GOP is launching attack ads to smear Raphael and turn Georgia red – and if they're successful, we'll hand our majority to Mitch McConnell, and our entire progressive agenda will go up in smoke.** Raphael doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money – which means the only way we can fight back against Republican attacks and win this race is if grassroots supporters like you chip in now. **But with just hours to go until our midnight deadline, we're still falling short.** **So please, friend, Raphael is counting on you:[ Will you give $10, $20 – split between my campaign and Seth Moulton's – so we can reach our can't-miss goal, keep Georgia blue and defend our Senate majority? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34930256/303499622/683353327?refcode=20210830_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OThmNzlkMy1jYjA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-PFC9_9j8bAuBwEq09zkQbs0HNNc7POK78iUSnoHafA=)** [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34930257/303499623/-2107361499?refcode=20210830_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OThmNzlkMy1jYjA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-PFC9_9j8bAuBwEq09zkQbs0HNNc7POK78iUSnoHafA=)
Thank you for your support in our fight for justice. – Team Warnock

clean_body: time is running out | | | With time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're still falling $12,541 short of our goal. That's why Sen. Raphael Warnock is reaching out with an urgent message: = = Friend, we have ZERO room for error. With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell – and now, NBC News reports that the GOP is making Raphael their TOP target for defeat. Thanks to Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority, we've been able to make huge strides in defending voting rights, supporting working families and rebuilding our country's economy. But the GOP is launching attack ads to smear Raphael and turn Georgia red – and if they're successful, we'll hand our majority to Mitch McConnell, and our entire progressive agenda will go up in smoke. Raphael doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money – which means the only way we can fight back against Republican attacks and win this race is if grassroots supporters like you chip in now. But with just hours to go until our midnight deadline, we're still falling short. Peter,

Andrew Garbarino here. My team told me they recently reached out to you about Joe Biden’s sinking approval rating and my 2022 race for re-election.

But I wanted to take an extra minute and reach out to my top supporters personally about something else that’s on my mind.

It hasn’t dominated the news cycle lately, but the threat of the HR4 ‘voting’ bill looms large in Congress. The Senate version of HR4 will EASILY pass if the Democrats vote to get rid of the filibuster.

And if the GOP doesn’t take back the House in 2022, HR4 will be just the start.

**But if we can manage to hold competitive seats and take back a handful for the red team, we can focus on election security, voter ID, and SAVING SMALL BUSINESSES.**
[**HELP ME HOLD NY-02**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=1809d75e1e0b4b80a6f549be5947e1e0&_e=VXhXfQmBSAvDeV5ynrhGqDJ8THxYpOBUtRH2w2w5x236QxUVQgk5QrkG4hHCPxCfvLx6SeLtC3Eba8lPc2eqi6INKtkvxY_yLdkLFpd5GJJhJfJmfpZFia8kjeU0-pwQNGSrIdrwKxthgKzoAmmpZfek0WVhsyF2biciqbYExYLr-zPjwydoqHuZNMfSPhWJSY0km0qv3K2GNAzQozY4HMIumDI6nuHxo-9aNkX2m2QSAqjCwywOI72FUBkwXK67hLGI8rHCYlBqk-xAIPeVi5naQjmzlg0Y_D-B_LRZSnpfZx112sGIwVW_76_-gnlCEpw_5WHZ419pxA9j8NtHhL_BohTo3IQsFEpNQh_Pl1YJBgKK8sAyMnTm53KP-raHKeUB-U8EzFSq19Rm0fG74Bf9cX9wyjee_S-98a2aIFLTvqFkeXJt7W8nfyskFcSltWRLZkssqBpocpfL4uBDh_5qkR9kz-bHQpeI481I72uX4yfYA4MqC6G8DzUJpxBg)
As I’ve said before, our small business community, which is crucial to our economy, has been totally forgotten by Congress and Joe Biden. And our problems will only worsen if the Democrats maintain control of the two chambers after 2022.

Peter, this is why you elected me -- to fight for you and your values in DC. While I’m busy doing that, _[**will you rush ANY amount now to help me reach my END OF MONTH goal?**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=1809d75e1e0b4b80a6f549be5947e1e0&_e=VXhXfQmBSAvDeV5ynrhGqDJ8THxYpOBUtRH2w2w5x236QxUVQgk5QrkG4hHCPxCfvLx6SeLtC3Eba8lPc2eqi6INKtkvxY_yLdkLFpd5GJJhJfJmfpZFia8kjeU0-pwQNGSrIdrwKxthgKzoAmmpZfek0WVhsyF2biciqbYExYLr-zPjwydoqHuZNMfSPhWJSY0km0qv3K2GNAzQozY4HMIumDI6nuHxo-9aNkX2m2QSAqjCwywOI72FUBkwXK67hLGI8rHCYlBqk-xAIPeVi5naQjmzlg0Y_D-B_LRZSnoIpUa2PO-tGV6uzXNnkL5nXpspG026z_5mjXx7dlzUKIkNiD_gRwFLf-pGx59pbtEzYUzFo0uH_JwQO8NL4QUFZeTQPRo4kT0EJ0uzP1MYQGOq-npTPJdcbv4-CfwrAndARWPEYD-EjJbxSE7584qhwtLvdG4Mw3Jqx_6Om0QMXAl8mgS9i8jurEzBcyRYGhv-fUKsVEdp_y-_2TKkdAuY)_

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: re: the perfect moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
With more candidates joining this race by the day, it's not an exaggeration to say that tomorrow is the single most important deadline our campaign has faced so far.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210830-2461-header&t=1&akid=2461%2E434096%2E6pITDd)
Peter,
With just ONE day to go before our big end-of-month fundraising deadline tomorrow, our finance team wanted me to reach out directly.
**According to the records we have on file, you've never chipped in to John Fetterman's campaign to fight for us in the U.S. Senate... _yet!_**
[**Any chance you could send $5 our way right now to get your first generous donation on the books?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28863?refcode=em20210830-2461&t=2&akid=2461%2E434096%2E6pITDd)
Take a look at your full record from our files: 👀
**_Peter's Official Team Fetterman Record_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2021 Donor:** No — not yet! **2021 Total:** $0.00 **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28863?refcode=em20210830-2461&t=3&akid=2461%2E434096%2E6pITDd)**
---
We're just a day away from our deadline to raise $84,172 directly into the Flip Pennsylvania Fund — and with more candidates joining this race by the day, it's not an exaggeration to say that tomorrow is the single most important deadline our campaign has faced so far.
**So, Peter, if you've been waiting for that perfect moment to make your first-ever donation to John's grassroots campaign, I'm emailing you today to say that NOW is that time.**
[**Will you donate $5 to help close the gap on our goal for the Flip Pennsylvania Fund before it's too late? We're really hoping to see an uptick in donations before our deadline, so we hope you'll chip in if you can.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28863?refcode=em20210830-2461&t=4&akid=2461%2E434096%2E6pITDd)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28863?refcode=em20210830-2461&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2461%2E434096%2E6pITDd)**
Thank you so much for being a part of this! I'll make sure to keep you in the loop as we fight as hard as we can to reach this big goal for the campaign.
Eric
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate.
P.S. Is this correct, Peter? Our records indicate that you've never chipped in John's campaign since he announced he's running to flip this open PA Senate seat. [**If your budget allows, will you quickly donate $5 before tomorrow's deadline to get on the record as an official grassroots donor to John's campaign? We wouldn't ask if it weren't so important.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28863?refcode=em20210830-2461&t=24&akid=2461%2E434096%2E6pITDd)

clean_body: With more candidates joining this race by the day, it's not an exaggeration to say that tomorrow is the single most important deadline our campaign has faced so far. Peter, With just ONE day to go before our big end-of-month fundraising deadline tomorrow, our finance team wanted me to reach out directly. According to the records we have on file, you've never chipped in to John Fetterman's campaign to fight for us in the U.S. Senate... yet! Take a look at your full record from our files: 👀 Peter's Official Team Fetterman Record Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com 2021 Donor: No — not yet! 2021 Total: $0.00 Suggested Donation: $5 We're just a day away from our deadline to raise $84,172 directly into the Flip Pennsylvania Fund — and with more candidates joining this race by the day, it's not an exaggeration to say that tomorrow is the single most important deadline our campaign has faced so far. So, Peter, if you've been waiting for that perfect moment to make your first-ever donation to John's grassroots campaign, I'm emailing you today to say that NOW is that time. Thank you so much for being a part of this! I'll make sure to keep you in the loop as we fight as hard as we can to reach this big goal for the campaign. Eric Eric Stern Deputy Campaign Manager John Fetterman for U.S. Senate. P.S. Is this correct, Peter? Our records indicate that you've never chipped in John's campaign since he announced he's running to flip this open PA Senate seat. | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: BREAKING: Pelosi and Cheney are after my phone records!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JrofBXxHG-YcwcJpKv2hleVjNwES8Ez0T-NpYqIbUzItCzFq_cUUXIhRc5p_LYxD0lN_VYRabUo0PtAwrxl2L1uGdYm6u-MOvvPC8u2bG5D5gvtTf2vqFXZ6w0ZqbZSk5A09h1TDSX4taM-dMKJJFzrT3_qtr3OxAdQ7ND5bjUrwtCtMS5ENlHUZZFLKW2t0&c=BBf5igpk7ywscgBGR-UfLsMOMDTMrC0ZbjlVRGD9clqY9J5Uvm02PQ==&ch=mZujPca5K8D_yHgwonZl4tlOgZn9VW5BwnbvcbpcW2v2H6BrJq_G6A==)
---
| Peter,
---
| We knew that Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney's new January 6th Commission would be a political witch-hunt...and now we have the proof to back it up.
Because I'm one of President Trump's most loyal supporters in Congress, these Never-Trump politicians are coming after my PHONE RECORDS as a part of the Jan. 6 Commission!
Make no mistake about it - this isn't about getting down to the truth. This is about punishing anyone who dares stand against their preferred, America-Last agenda, and sending a threat to those of us bold enough to step out of line in the future.
---
| | | [STOP THE WITCH HUNT >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JrofBXxHG-YcwcJpKv2hleVjNwES8Ez0T-NpYqIbUzItCzFq_cUUXIhRc5p_LYxD0lN_VYRabUo0PtAwrxl2L1uGdYm6u-MOvvPC8u2bG5D5gvtTf2vqFXZ6w0ZqbZSk5A09h1TDSX4taM-dMKJJFzrT3_qtr3OxAdQ7ND5bjUrwtCtMS5ENlHUZZFLKW2t0&c=BBf5igpk7ywscgBGR-UfLsMOMDTMrC0ZbjlVRGD9clqY9J5Uvm02PQ==&ch=mZujPca5K8D_yHgwonZl4tlOgZn9VW5BwnbvcbpcW2v2H6BrJq_G6A==)
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JrofBXxHG-YcwcJpKv2hleVjNwES8Ez0T-NpYqIbUzItCzFq_cUUXIhRc5p_LYxD0lN_VYRabUo0PtAwrxl2L1uGdYm6u-MOvvPC8u2bG5D5gvtTf2vqFXZ6w0ZqbZSk5A09h1TDSX4taM-dMKJJFzrT3_qtr3OxAdQ7ND5bjUrwtCtMS5ENlHUZZFLKW2t0&c=BBf5igpk7ywscgBGR-UfLsMOMDTMrC0ZbjlVRGD9clqY9J5Uvm02PQ==&ch=mZujPca5K8D_yHgwonZl4tlOgZn9VW5BwnbvcbpcW2v2H6BrJq_G6A==)
---
| | |
---
| With the America-Last Democrats and RINOs threatening Trump supporters in Congress and sending out calls to violate our privacy, it's clear that this is an urgent time for every single patriot.
We have to resist their shakedown tactics - try as Pelosi and Cheney might, [they aren't going to erase our movement!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JrofBXxHG-YcwcJpKv2hleVjNwES8Ez0T-NpYqIbUzItCzFq_cUUXIhRc5p_LYxD0lN_VYRabUo0PtAwrxl2L1uGdYm6u-MOvvPC8u2bG5D5gvtTf2vqFXZ6w0ZqbZSk5A09h1TDSX4taM-dMKJJFzrT3_qtr3OxAdQ7ND5bjUrwtCtMS5ENlHUZZFLKW2t0&c=BBf5igpk7ywscgBGR-UfLsMOMDTMrC0ZbjlVRGD9clqY9J5Uvm02PQ==&ch=mZujPca5K8D_yHgwonZl4tlOgZn9VW5BwnbvcbpcW2v2H6BrJq_G6A==)
They may be targeting me right now - but it's really YOU and everyday Trump-supporting patriots that they're ultimately after! The way we stop their vendetta is by sending a strong message RIGHT NOW that we won't let this witch hunt go on any longer.
[Can I count on you to join me in taking a stand?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JrofBXxHG-YcwcJpKv2hleVjNwES8Ez0T-NpYqIbUzItCzFq_cUUXIhRc5p_LYxD0lN_VYRabUo0PtAwrxl2L1uGdYm6u-MOvvPC8u2bG5D5gvtTf2vqFXZ6w0ZqbZSk5A09h1TDSX4taM-dMKJJFzrT3_qtr3OxAdQ7ND5bjUrwtCtMS5ENlHUZZFLKW2t0&c=BBf5igpk7ywscgBGR-UfLsMOMDTMrC0ZbjlVRGD9clqY9J5Uvm02PQ==&ch=mZujPca5K8D_yHgwonZl4tlOgZn9VW5BwnbvcbpcW2v2H6BrJq_G6A==)

| | | [JOIN THE FIGHT >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JrofBXxHG-YcwcJpKv2hleVjNwES8Ez0T-NpYqIbUzItCzFq_cUUXIhRc5p_LYxD0lN_VYRabUo0PtAwrxl2L1uGdYm6u-MOvvPC8u2bG5D5gvtTf2vqFXZ6w0ZqbZSk5A09h1TDSX4taM-dMKJJFzrT3_qtr3OxAdQ7ND5bjUrwtCtMS5ENlHUZZFLKW2t0&c=BBf5igpk7ywscgBGR-UfLsMOMDTMrC0ZbjlVRGD9clqY9J5Uvm02PQ==&ch=mZujPca5K8D_yHgwonZl4tlOgZn9VW5BwnbvcbpcW2v2H6BrJq_G6A==)

Peter,

Growing up on government assistance and moving over 50 times, I saw first-hand how the radical Democrat's socialist government programs left diverse communities crippled and destitute.

But with faith, football, a Christian education and the will to seek positive opportunities, I was able to make something of myself, despite a dysfunctional family, poverty, and violent neighborhoods.

I continued my journey as a Commissioned Officer with a rank of Lieutenant in the Army Reserve, earned a bachelor’s degree in theology and a master’s in divinity, and served overseas as a Sergeant in the Army.

**Now, my passion is in reforming the systems that are currently broken that have been neglecting and suppressing Arizona residents for decades.** Empowering our families with school choice, improving our educational system, and expanding and improving business opportunities will help all Arizona families thrive.

[**That’s why I’m running for Congress right here in Arizona’s 9th District as a proud African American patriot and Republican, Peter - and that’s why I’m contacting you today.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d757062b4cae4d419a49debde44485f2&_e=TS648q42P8ppfJvEMjdVYFZCfg034lv88C0xmqbmJ-P35gngqkrE6TPesrVP5h32p3fW5PppIdegqyaeC3MUAFHU_c2ILLPIhZ--V9AACBEvn_5ZTWloxBmH3NwPz5HpsDVtnRsFTvYw4ZYgZoxs6hyGjmkY8OUFt-p-_-J2EwfiPPAHRRJER382V9grjQ_1tsu9yH7dt5kNQSiDKwgWqWEhrefDITf96Cgcu6kQ5QY9VzS-tkMS04LITdhOWa3VMneowuEcPLUN-dbSmKu4dbv89ln1MtW0sionhuA2k2V4HlKCBfbnPdvMNj1stXz8PDcymYoY5WhQ_EpBHocTjhwJD6Iji0jyxVq4dM1fu-fqo8LTNIaONg6NMhFV5AMVO0VSzSw27-WXP2QS1prqLQ%3D%3D)

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Help PA families climb to the top
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Recently, my son and I visited Pikes Peak in Colorado, before he went back to college. My youngest is at her very first semester in college. It still feels weird to say that. We hiked the thirteen-and-a-half miles to the top in the thin Colorado air. If I wasn’t feeling my age with now two kids in college, I was definitely feeling it by the top of the peak.

Dear Friend, Recently, my son and I visited Pikes Peak in Colorado, before he went back to college. My youngest is at her very first semester in college. It still feels weird to say that. We hiked the thirteen-and-a-half miles to the top in the thin Colorado air. If I wasn’t feeling my age with now two kids in college, I was definitely feeling it by the top of the peak. The hike up that peak relied on teamwork. Many of the obstacles in my life were only overcome with help and support of other people. I never gave up, and neither did the people who believed in me. But, for working and middle-class families those mountains have gotten even higher and there's a lot less help on the journey... [Donate to make sure families like yours and mine still have a fair chance at the American dream](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34932370/303508883/-531595162?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDYzZGEyYy1kMTA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9f3bxKqoWwRvSCGYiDljbRhdr6KzhcfHcZHlAp-cdNw=) Sending two kids to college isn’t cheap. Like most people, my kids don’t come from generations of wealth - one set of grandparents owned a bar, the other a Pennsylvania dairy farm. Their mother and I had to work full time, raising two kids, while I attended law school at night. I’m still paying off my student loans. As soon as the kids were born, we started saving for their college educations to give them a leg up--and our savings are still only going to cover half. But we still know we’re the lucky ones. It’s never going to be easy. It isn’t supposed to be. But it shouldn’t be impossible--with peaks that are too high and no help to be found. Families should be able to travel their path without being thrown off a cliff by an unexpected medical bill. Kids should be able to dream about their future--going to school, starting a business, learning a trade--without being told that the costs to even begin are too high to even consider trying. I’ve never been a quitter. Determination has gotten me pretty far. And, I'm not giving up on PA families like ours either. With the right leadership, empowered communities, and good, secure jobs, we can still dream big and climb that path before us. With a little help, we can do anything. [Who’s with me? clean_body: Recently, my son and I visited Pikes Peak in Colorado, before he went back to college. My youngest is at her very first semester in college. It still feels weird to say that. We hiked the thirteen-and-a-half miles to the top in the thin Colorado air. If I wasn’t feeling my age with now two kids in college, I was definitely feeling it by the top of the peak. Dear Friend, Recently, my son and I visited Pikes Peak in Colorado, before he went back to college. My youngest is at her very first semester in college. It still feels weird to say that. We hiked the thirteen-and-a-half miles to the top in the thin Colorado air. If I wasn’t feeling my age with now two kids in college, I was definitely feeling it by the top of the peak. The hike up that peak relied on teamwork. Many of the obstacles in my life were only overcome with help and support of other people. I never gave up, and neither did the people who believed in me. But, for working and middle-class families those mountains have gotten even higher and there's a lot less help on the journey... = Sending two kids to college isn’t cheap. Like most people, my kids don’t come from generations of wealth - one set of grandparents owned a bar, the other a Pennsylvania dairy farm. Their mother and I had to work full time, raising two kids, while I attended law school at night. I’m still paying off my student loans. As soon as the kids were born, we started saving for their college educations to give them a leg up--and our savings are still only going to cover half. But we still know we’re the lucky ones. It’s never going to be easy. It isn’t supposed to be. But it shouldn’t be impossible--with peaks that are too high and no help to be found. Families should be able to travel their path without being thrown off a cliff by an unexpected medical bill. Kids should be able to dream about their future--going to school, starting a business, learning a trade--without being told that the costs to even begin are too high to even consider trying. I’ve never been a quitter. Determination has gotten me pretty far. And, I'm not giving up on PA families like ours either. With the right leadership, empowered communities, and good, secure jobs, we can still dream big and climb that path before us. With a little help, we can do anything. = Thanks, Eugene We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to. | Eugene DePasquale is considering running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. clean_body: An update for you | | | | | Hey team, I hope my emails are making it to your inbox because this is pretty urgent. I just took a look at where we’re at with our August fundraising goal and, I have to say, we might not be on track to hit it before the deadline. The good news is that right now, this email could totally change that projection but I need your help. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Raising $20,000 may seem daunting off the bat, but let me tell you why it’s worth it. Not only will this be one of the closest Governor’s races in the country but Nevada also cannot risk losing a fighter like Steve! Reaching our goal for August will help the campaign keep our ads on the air, continue to talk to people from all corners of the state, and so much more. I, like you, know how important all of those things are to run a successful campaign. If we want to win this election, we need to step up now. The best possible way you can help our campaign right now is by chipping in to our August fundraising goal. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for your support, I’ll keep in touch! In solidarity, Eva Black Finance Director Steve Sisolak for Governor | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for by Steve Sisolak for Governor Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We can’t wait any longer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
Peter,

We wanted to send you a short but important note today.

Over the past couple of weeks, protecting Raphael Warnock's Senate seat has been a priority for us after CNN announced his seat was the second-most likely to flip in 2022. We're sure you understand how crucial it is for Democrats to hold this seat after a historic victory in Georgia last year.

We cannot allow Mitch McConnell and the Republican party to win this seat.

We need to defend this seat now \-- and we want you to know that we intend on keeping it at the top of our 2022 Defense Fund, but we need to know you are with us.

If you believe keeping Raphael Warnock in the Senate is absolutely crucial, then we are personally asking you to stand with us today to stand up to the right-wing extremists and Republicans who have their eyes set on this vulnerable Georgia Senate seat.

Will you give $5, $10, $15, or whatever you can now to ensure Raphael Warnock stays in the U.S. Senate and continues fighting for voting rights, Social Security, and Medicare? Here's the link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ProtectWarnock](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34932389/303508929/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210830_GEN_FDR_C&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRhNDMzZTEyLWQxMDktZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZAa0uLVe8ZRlpzjM4PTl_U_f9VnPFWPXmMN9AeU22t0=)**

Thank you in advance for prioritizing this crucial Democratic seat with us. We are so grateful to have you on our team.

\- When Democrats Turn Out

---

I know from personal experience that if you are not a jihadist, radical Islamic terrorists consider you livestock. I lost two legs and a finger when they blew me up.

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of August 30th: Election fraud bill passes the House, must stop it in the Senate
body:
| |
---
This week, we need to stop H.R. 4, a.k.a. the “Pelosi Power Grab Act,” in the Senate, as well as give our Senators two other messages. We also need to start making our plans for actions in September.

**Action items for this week include:**
* Local: Get ready for September’s local events
* National: Give your Senators three important messages
* Social Media: Share a graphic about the “Pelosi Power Grab Act”
* Reminders and other sign up forms

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---

[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjQyLTRiMjNjYmM5N2VkMTRhYmE5NTIxMjk2MzRiYmE0ZTc2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL3RlYS1wYXJ0eS1wYXRyaW90cy1ob2xkaW5nLW5hdGlvbndpZGUtc3RvcC1tZWRpY2FsLW1hbmRhdGVzLXByb3Rlc3RzLXdlZWtlbmQvP21pZD00NDI1NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=a7_crxymwwKiXSTL8rf0kw)

[At least 82 Just Say No protests were organized for this first round of nationwide protests to oppose medical mandates!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjQyLTRiMjNjYmM5N2VkMTRhYmE5NTIxMjk2MzRiYmE0ZTc2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL3RlYS1wYXJ0eS1wYXRyaW90cy1ob2xkaW5nLW5hdGlvbndpZGUtc3RvcC1tZWRpY2FsLW1hbmRhdGVzLXByb3Rlc3RzLXdlZWtlbmQvP21pZD00NDI1NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=ryoD8HeHbxN6e8CMjopaQQ) We had another 170 patriots who weren’t able to organize one this time around, but signed up to host a future protest.

Medical mandates like forced vaccination will create what some are calling vaccine apartheid. There will be two classes of citizens, one free and one oppressed. This is unconstitutional and unAmerican, period.
|
---
**Gear up for September’s local action
**
The tyrants don’t stop, so neither can we! Get ready and make your plans for local action in September.

**School Board Meetings**
Now that most schools have started or are starting soon, it’s time to get back to your local school board’s September meeting.

You can still use our [**school board how-to guide**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjQyLTRiMjNjYmM5N2VkMTRhYmE5NTIxMjk2MzRiYmE0ZTc2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYXR0ZW5kLXNjaG9vbC1ib2FyZC8_bWlkPTQ0MjU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=g1fpAjlH-0UxEy__V_sDdQ) to help you navigate attending a meeting, as well as the two training webinars we recorded on the topic. You can find the first one [**here**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjQyLTRiMjNjYmM5N2VkMTRhYmE5NTIxMjk2MzRiYmE0ZTc2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVudC53ZWJpbmFyamFtLmNvbS9nby9yZXBsYXkvMTMva3l3a3pmcmhrcmkyczE_bWlkPTQ0MjU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=VQviR1cY2bpKTt4xPLvsNA)**,** and the second one [**here**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjQyLTRiMjNjYmM5N2VkMTRhYmE5NTIxMjk2MzRiYmE0ZTc2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVudC53ZWJpbmFyamFtLmNvbS9yZXBsYXkvMjYvMzN3cHlmbG5iOTNmeHdmcnc_bWlkPTQ0MjU3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=2EHtAAY5EdLU_w6tpfnrVA)**.**

**Late September Just Say No Protests**
Start planning now for another round of nationwide protests to Just Say No in late September! Many of our protest organizers this time around were brand new, but now they know what to do.

While we don’t have the exact date yet, now is the perfect time to start thinking about where you’d want to hold it, who will help you organize it, and what kind of protest you want it to be. You can even send out an email or post on social media to give people some notice that another protest will be happening in about a month.

Our [**how-to guide**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjQyLTRiMjNjYmM5N2VkMTRhYmE5NTIxMjk2MzRiYmE0ZTc2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5uZXQvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy1ob3d0by1ndWlkZT9taWQ9NDQyNTcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=ByOrcONBeJ7H2kt2mTwLRQ) will be useful again, and we’ll make sure to update it as well.

Don’t wait to start planning! A month is a lot shorter than it sounds.
|
---
Last week, a suicide bomber in Kabul killed 13 brave U.S. service members and more than 200 innocent Afghan civilians, including women and children. This was the worst single-day loss of American troops since 2011.

In the words of the Wall Street Journal, the attack came as the U.S. "scrambled to have its military and diplomatic troops out of the country" by Joe Biden's arbitrary deadline.

Biden's embarrassing retreat from Afghanistan has been marked by chaos. The utter lack of planning and the unwillingness to listen to his own intelligence reports cost the lives of 13 U.S. service members and countless innocent Afghan citizens.

This will be his legacy. The American people and our allies deserved better. Joe Biden is a disgrace.

Our thoughts and prayers go out to the 13 brave service members who made the ultimate sacrifice for our nation and their families. Their service and sacrifice will NEVER be forgotten.

**Give three messages to your Senators

Nancy Pelosi is the worst of the worst. She will use any means necessary, no matter how shady and corrupt, to force her anti-American, radical leftist policies through the House.

Last week was no different. The Democrats on the House Rules Committee passed a rule that said, if the rule passes, then the $3.5 trillion left-wing spending bill and the “Pelosi Power Grab Act” (a.k.a. H.R. 4) are considered passed as well.

That’s right. Instead of having actual votes on the $3.5 trillion spending bill and on the federal takeover of our elections, they simply voted on a “rule” and considered the other two bills as passed.

This is similar to what Pelosi did with Obamacare all those years ago, and it’s absolutely unAmerican and dirty, and spits on the idea of representative government.

Therefore, we are now dependent on a 50-50 Senate where Kamala Harris is the tiebreaker to reject these grave threats. We need to all call both of our Senators, Republican or Democrat. My finance director Kierra always keeps me in the loop about where we are in our fundraising goal, especially since we don't take corporate PAC money, and I have to admit this month it's been a little bit difficult because so many people are out of town and away from their email.
Not only are we in a race against the clock to raise another $12,272 to before the August 31st deadline, but we also need to respond to these attacks immediately!
As of this morning, we're still over $8,000 away from our August projection and we really need your help to close that gap before the deadline tomorrow. [**Will you please chip in as much as you can so we can report back that we reached our goal?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8Vle6BtEBk2ltEs5m8GojBmXZ1fCWmY1TR0rGjMPLyk=/ZG2RuDqo61BRnZpN8h9lRgFim4y1qGLhxTAT3q_rbMM=?refcode=E11026-20210830-NumbersGuy-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)

| | Derek, this is the only thing you need to remember about the Virginia governor’s race: **Recent polling shows a dangerously close race, with some polls showing a VIRTUAL TIE.** | [Chip in to help Terry pull ahead →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34933003/303511022/-2023814932?refcode=20210830.5_VAP_8ET&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGZkZTM4Mi1kMzA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rx-OLP_b2wwjrcezlIfKcTqWyIt3qAf9IOS9I004adE=)
---
We knew this would be a tough battle when we got started, Derek — and we’ve been ready for a fight since the beginning.

But we did not expect polls to be _this tight,_ and we’re getting nervous.

In a race as tight as this one, grassroots fundraising can make all the difference — it’s what allows us to operate our voter mobilization efforts and turn out voters in every corner of Virginia.

But to keep those programs running, we’ve got to hit our fundraising benchmarks — and right now, we’re focused on our million dollar goal for August.

We have less than 36 hours to go, Derek, so we haven’t got a moment to lose.

name: =?utf-8?Q?House=20Freedom=20Fund?=
subject: Biden Must Go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Biden should go, but he won't. So we need to defeat the Left next year. | | | | |
---
Can't read this? [Click here.](https://mailchi.mp/housefreedomfund/biden-must-go?e=b2c16e6198)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
| Peter,

**Joe Biden has to go.**

He is unfit for office, unable to discharge his basic duties. The worst part of Biden’s bungling in Afghanistan isn’t the mistakes that have already cost the lives of 13 Americans and untold numbers of Afghan partners. The worst part is: _he’s only getting worse._

**The evidence is all around him. Joe Biden is in rapid decline. Every week, he creates new crises, and every week, he grows less capable of managing them.**

We all see and grieve what’s happening in Afghanistan. President Biden has stumbled into the greatest international embarrassment for the United States since the end of the Vietnam War.

**But that's not all.**

▶︎ Biden also created a border crisis that is enriching drug cartels.

▶︎ He’s siding with racist, anti-American propaganda like Critical Race Theory against patriotic parents and communities.

▶︎ His public health officials have thrown away their credibility in the fight against Covid.

▶︎ His wasteful spending is saddling working families with the worst inflation in decades.

▶︎ And Biden’s failure in Afghanistan will only embolden Russia, China, Iran, North Korea, and Jihadist terrorists around the world.

In just seven months, Joe Biden has single-handedly made America poorer, sicker, more divided, less respected and less safe than we were under President Donald Trump.

[**Help us fight back right now!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=ac98da0f2e&e=b2c16e6198)

We cannot afford another year of this, let alone four. Joe Biden has not just “lost a step” – he’s losing his grip. For the good of the country, he has to step down. _**But we know he won’t.**_

Democrats, then, need to either remove him through the 25th Amendment or impeachment. _**But we know they won’t, either.**_

Democrats always put their party first. They have been complicit all along in Biden’s descent and are themselves unfit to lead. All Americans – from servicemen to schoolchildren – are paying the price for the Democrats’ duplicity.

[**If they won’t own up to their mistake, our only recourse is to give them the beating they deserve next election day.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=44df3c7cc1&e=b2c16e6198)

That’s where House Freedom Fund comes in.

The crises Biden has created this year won’t be solved by any old politician with an “R” by his name. HFF _**only supports principled conservative leaders **_committed to making America great again – and ready to fight.

_**And we win. **_Last November, despite Democrats winning the House of Representatives, HFF candidates won 86% of their races. Our vetting process is the best in American politics. And when we find a conservative worth supporting, we fight for them to the last vote.

We know that fighting conservative representatives one day can turn into fighting conservative senators, governors, and presidents. Your contribution to House Freedom Fund is an investment in a future when our leaders will make America proud again.

[**Please give to HFF today as generously as you can.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=9ea24b068e&e=b2c16e6198)

**Joe Biden and his enablers have to go. They won’t go willingly. The next step is up to us.**

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
House Freedom Fund

---
|
---
| **END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN**

|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Our Commander-in-Chief is compromised
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden's incompetence costs American lives |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1c223812c8&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

In 27 years in the Army, I saluted the Commander-in-Chief.

But this C-in-C either has no idea what is going on around him which demands use of the 25th Amendment to remove his executive authority, or he has committed crimes on par with a standard that demands impeachment.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=07878f5033&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who refuses to criticize Biden. He is weak and vulnerable, just like Biden!**

It is becoming clear that,. one way or another, Biden is compromised.

This week, 13 young servicemen and women gave their lives to defend our citizens trapped in Afghanistan because of Biden's follies. They deserve to be remembered and honored.

Instead, Biden's Democrats try to meekly defend his incompetence and deadly confusion.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4c29b3d09e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Even this weekend, with the bodies of the dead soldiers returning home, Biden couldn't be bothered. He was checking his watch in the ultimate act of disrespect.

Townhall reports:

_President Joe Biden and First Lady Jill Biden were at the Dover Air Force Base Sunday morning for the dignified transfer of 11 of the 13 service members who lost their lives on Thursday. While there, the president actually checked his watch. And he wasn't subtle about it, not even close to it._

Biden doesn't care about those he killed. As for me, I say, _Rest in peace, heroes.

Here they are:

For the Marine Corps, the deceased are:

Marine Corps Staff Sgt. Darin T. Hoover, 31, of Salt Lake City, Utah.

Marine Corps Sgt. Johanny Rosariopichardo, 25, of Lawrence, Massachusetts.

Marine Corps Sgt. Nicole L. Gee, 23, of Sacramento, California.

Marine Corps Cpl. Hunter Lopez, 22, of Indio, California.

Marine Corps Cpl. Daegan W. Page, 23, of Omaha, Nebraska.

Marine Corps Cpl. Humberto A. Sanchez, 22, of Logansport, Indiana.

Marine Corps Lance Cpl. David L. Espinoza, 20, of Rio Bravo, Texas.

Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Jared M. Schmitz, 20, of St. Charles, Missouri.

Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Rylee J. McCollum, 20, of Jackson, Wyoming.

Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Dylan R. Merola, 20, of Rancho Cucamonga, California.

Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Kareem M. Nikoui, 20, of Norco, California.

Staff Sergeant Darin T. Hoover, Cpl. Hunter Lopez, Cpl. Daegan W. Page, Cpl. Humberto A. Sanchez, Lance Cpl. Jared M. Schmitz, Lance Cpl. David L. Espinoza, Lance Cpl. Rylee J. McCollum, Lance Cpl. Dylan R. Merola, and Lance Cpl. Kareem M. Nikoui were assigned to 2nd Battalion, 1st Marine Regiment, 1st Marine Division, I Marine Expeditionary Force, Camp Pendleton, California._

Everyone in our country should be remembering their names today, and every other day!

No, they were not famous, but they should be. They should be honored as the heroes that they were. Serving at a dangerous and dusty airport in Afghanistan, while folks like you and I sit in the lap of luxury.

_**God bless our protectors. Always. **_
---
|
---
| **The Washington Examiner reports that one of the mothers of the dead Marines puts the blame squarely on Biden:**

_The mother of one of the slain Marines in Kabul last week said that people who voted for Joe Biden are responsible for her son's death._

_Kathy McCollum, mother of 20-year-old U.S. Marine Rylee, who was killed in the suicide bombings in Kabul along with 12 other service members, said on SiriusXM radio that “dementia-ridden” Biden is to blame for her son's death along with all who supported him.

“Twenty years and six-months-old, getting ready to go home from freaking Jordan to be home with his wife to watch the birth of his son, and that feckless, dementia-ridden piece of crap just sent my son to die,” McCollum said in the radio interview with host Andrew Wilkow on “The Wilkow Majority” show._

Biden's incompetence will go down in history. He's the worst President we ever had, and he should be impeached for what he's done.

_Here's my thing: I will hold Biden and his sycophants accountable. I will vote to impeach and investigate his corrupt regime. Democrat Darren Soto will not._

The American people have had enough and want him to be challenged. I will do that, as a part of the oath I took to the Constitution!

The Dems control all of the Federal government right now. We need to change Congress to hold Biden accountable! [Help me put a check and balance on Biden and Pelosi!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f16c5cf0eb&e=afa21b7626)

[Will you help me win my congressional seat](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d917f4ddb5&e=afa21b7626)? I got more votes here than any Republican ever had. It's a red-trending seat in a red-trending state! Now is the time!

Biden will destroy this country entirely if we don't stop him. Help me stand up to "Joke Biden"!

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a2403fd36e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d5d8ffbc8b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5e760a4306&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=71897870fb&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---

Humberto A. Sanchez, 22, of Logansport, Indiana. Marine Corps Lance Cpl. David L. Espinoza, 20, of Rio Bravo, Texas. Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Jared M. Schmitz, 20, of St. Charles, Missouri. Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Rylee J. McCollum, 20, of Jackson, Wyoming. Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Dylan R. Merola, 20, of Rancho Cucamonga, California. Marine Corps Lance Cpl. Kareem M. Nikoui, 20, of Norco, California. Staff Sergeant Darin T. Hoover, Cpl. Hunter Lopez, Cpl. Daegan W. Page, Cpl. Humberto A. Sanchez, Lance Cpl. Jared M. Schmitz, Lance Cpl. David L. Espinoza, Lance Cpl. Rylee J. McCollum, Lance Cpl. Dylan R. Merola, and Lance Cpl. Kareem M. Nikoui were assigned to 2nd Battalion, 1st Marine Regiment, 1st Marine Division, I Marine Expeditionary Force, Camp Pendleton, California. Everyone in our country should be remembering their names today, and every other day! No, they were not famous, but they should be. They should be honored as the heroes that they were. Serving at a dangerous and dusty airport in Afghanistan, while folks like you and I sit in the lap of luxury. God bless our protectors. Always. | | The Washington Examiner reports that one of the mothers of the dead Marines puts the blame squarely on Biden: The mother of one of the slain Marines in Kabul last week said that people who voted for Joe Biden are responsible for her son's death. Kathy McCollum, mother of 20-year-old U.S. Marine Rylee, who was killed in the suicide bombings in Kabul along with 12 other service members, said on SiriusXM radio that “dementia-ridden” Biden is to blame for her son's death along with all who supported him. “Twenty years and six-months-old, getting ready to go home from freaking Jordan to be home with his wife to watch the birth of his son, and that feckless, dementia-ridden piece of crap just sent my son to die,” McCollum said in the radio interview with host Andrew Wilkow on “The Wilkow Majority” show. Biden's incompetence will go down in history. He's the worst President we ever had, and he should be impeached for what he's done. Here's my thing: I will hold Biden and his sycophants accountable. I will vote to impeach and investigate his corrupt regime. Democrat Darren Soto will not. The American people have had enough and want him to be challenged. I will do that, as a part of the oath I took to the Constitution! The Dems control all of the Federal government right now. We need to change Congress to hold Biden accountable! ? I got more votes here than any Republican ever had. It's a red-trending seat in a red-trending state! Now is the time! Biden will destroy this country entirely if we don't stop him. Help me stand up to "Joke Biden"! | | Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter | | P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - ! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill. | | PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. name: #teamMia Volunteers
subject: LESS THAN 24 HOURS LEFT!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2021, FPPC# 1437973
body:
https://tinyurl.com/JoinTeamMia [https://tinyurl.com/JoinTeamMia]Dear Peter,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/one%20day.png]This is the moment we have been waiting for! We are ONE day away from Election Day, tomorrow, on August 31st. It goes without saying that the day before Election Day is full of support, energy, and momentum and I’m grateful for the folks who showed up for our Get Out The Vote weekend!
THANK YOU, #teamMia for bringing your all on the last weekend of this campaign. You all have continuously been champions of civic engagement in AD-18! Our presence was felt across the district as we knocked on doors and made calls all weekend long, urging voters to VOTE for Mia Bonta!
This final weekend exceeded my expectations and it couldn’t have happened without the amazing support from our allies. I would like to send a HUGE thank you to our labor groups, the ALC, SEIU-UHW, and Local 2015. Also, our phenomenal Assembly Members Gipson, Wicks, and Low, and similarly, Oakland Councilmember Taylor and San Leandro Councilmember Simon. And our young people, thank you to the Young Davis Dems and the MLK Freedom Center! Lastly, thank YOU – everyone who showed up.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/locations.jpg]#teamMia, this is it. Now we need to make sure every voter who said they would vote for our campaign actually turns in their ballot! Every single vote counts.
See the image for the list of all in person polling places tomorrow and check in with your friends and family to make sure they voted or have a plan to vote!
Also see the list of ballot drop boxes across the district here. [https://www.acgov.org/rovapps/maps/ballotdropbox_map.htm?electionid=244] And turn in your ballot, before it’s too late!
Just because we have less than 24 hours before Election Day doesn’t mean we’re taking our foot off the gas! We are working till the last hour, and we could use your help. Please sign up with the following links to help us Get Out The Vote today and tomorrow!
Monday GOTV Canvass @ 1:30pm and 3:30pm [https://www.mobilize.us/mobilize/event/408764/]
Election Day GOTV Canvass, ALL DAY LONG! [https://www.mobilize.us/mobilize/event/408764/]
We also need help calling voters to let them know tomorrow is the big day. Sign up to phone bank here [https://www.mobilize.us/mobilize/event/405218/?rname=Alison&share_context=event_details&share_medium=copy_link] or email volunteer@miabonta.com [volunteer@miabonta.com] to get set up ASAP!
You all make this possible and because of your work, our win will be a reality. I will be the representative that AD-18 needs to address our problems and serve the community.
Yours in Service,
Mia Bonta
Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2021, FPPC# 1437973
1241 High St, Oakland, CA 94601 | 415-891-9751 | volunteer@miabonta.comhttps://www.facebook.com/miabonta [https://www.facebook.com/miabonta] https://twitter.com/MiaBonta [https://twitter.com/MiaBonta] https://instagram.com/mia.bonta [https://instagram.com/mia.bonta] https://www.linkedin.com/in/mialisabonta/ [https://www.linkedin.com/in/mialisabonta/]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b2129a39-d409-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/321d054e-d509-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTk0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjFkMDU0ZS1kNTA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VsSGFzkIDDGZgN7g43Bj2xamD5sKosUOaM0KtYLmLWs=&id=125147074 .

name: Ras for Iowa
subject: local control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34934140/303514614/-858979165?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210830eom3_rfi_active_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjlhMDBjYi1kNTA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2jSoUFVNtuxr0xIUvGn-CWo2WdWLcUrvY2kiXKOTBmI=)
---
Team, **Governor Kim Reynolds is ripping local control away from communities across Iowa.** First, she took $95 million in federal funding meant for our schools and sent it back to the federal government, leaving school districts without additional funding to address this ongoing pandemic. Second, she signed a bill into law that makes it easier for private charter schools to form without input from local school districts. Then, she banned school districts and local governments from requiring masks to keep our kids and their teachers safe. **Ras knows that not all communities across Iowa are the same, so we can’t approach our problems with one-size-fits-all answers.** Not every county is the same. Jasper County is different from Black Hawk County, is different from Ringgold County, and so on. Iowa has a heritage of self-sufficiency and home rule, and Ras believes our government should empower our communities to have local control, not take it away like Gov. Reynolds has. **[If you want to see Iowa return to its roots with a governor who emphasizes local control and lets the people lead the way, pitch in $10 or more to support Ras ahead of our end-of-month fundraising deadline tomorrow.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34934141/303514615/-858979165?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210830eom3_rfi_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjlhMDBjYi1kNTA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2jSoUFVNtuxr0xIUvGn-CWo2WdWLcUrvY2kiXKOTBmI=)** **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Team, Governor Kim Reynolds is ripping local control away from communities across Iowa. First, she took $95 million in federal funding meant for our schools and sent it back to the federal government, leaving school districts without additional funding to address this ongoing pandemic. Second, she signed a bill into law that makes it easier for private charter schools to form without input from local school districts. Then, she banned school districts and local governments from requiring masks to keep our kids and their teachers safe. Ras knows that not all communities across Iowa are the same, so we can’t approach our problems with one-size-fits-all answers. Not every county is the same. Jasper County is different from Black Hawk County, is different from Ringgold County, and so on. Iowa has a heritage of self-sufficiency and home rule, and Ras believes our government should empower our communities to have local control, not take it away like Gov. subject: An urgent request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Erica wanted me to contact you today with an urgent request.
#
Erica wanted me to contact you today with an urgent request.
Our August fundraising deadline is tomorrow, August 31 at midnight. But right now, we’re behind on meeting our benchmark _by more than 37%._
**So today we’re launching a 48-hour emergency fundraising goal of $10,000 to try to close the gap.**
It’s called the **AmERICA Fund** — because you can’t spell America without "Erica."
[**_Can you rush a donation of $5 or more to our emergency AmERICA Fund to raise $10,000 in the next 48 hours? Erica Smith is counting on as many online supporters to give what they can during this critical moment._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13022?refcode=em20210830-393&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=393%2E3698%2E7qkhAS)
**[Send $5 to the AmERICA Fund »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13022?refcode=em20210830-393&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=393%2E3698%2E7qkhAS)**
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13022?refcode=em20210830-393&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=393%2E3698%2E7qkhAS)
Working in campaign finance, I’ve definitely noticed a "Summer Slump" in fundraising for Democratic Congressional campaigns across the country.
But not all campaigns are funded like ours. Over 50% of our campaign fundraising comes from online supporters like you. Erica doesn’t accept campaign donations from corporate PACs, special interests, or the fossil fuel industry.
That’s what makes your donation today so urgent.
[**_Please rush a donation of $5 or more to the AmERICA Fund today, and help our campaign raise the $10,000 we need in the next 48 hours. We can only do this together._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13022?refcode=em20210830-393&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=393%2E3698%2E7qkhAS)

Thank you so much for your support,
Jayla
Jayla Gilliam
Finance Director, Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

Below are Cawthorn’s direct quotes from a recent GOP event. They are more extreme than anything he’s said before -- and go even further than Trump’s worst.
* * *
“[Democrats] do not have your best interests at heart... **we all need to be storing up some ammunition**.”
* * *
“If our election systems continue to be rigged... it’s going to lead to one place, and that’s **bloodshed**.”
* * *
“[I’m] willing to defend liberty at all costs... [I would] dread having to **take up arms against a fellow American**.”
* * *
Says the January 6 insurrectionists are “**political hostages** ” and references “**trying to bust them out**.”
* * *
And finally, a question from the crowd in reference to January 6: “ _When are you gonna call us to Washington again?_ ”

“We are actively working on that one...**We have a few plans in motion that I can’t make public right now**.”
* * *

We’re appalled, Peter. And we’re clearer than ever on what’s at stake in this race.
Cawthorn has never stopped spreading conspiracy theories and provoking his base -- **and now he’s planning to mobilize far-right extremists again.**
Here’s the truth: the insurrection was an act of domestic terrorism. Joe Biden won the most votes ever and was elected President. And January 6th is one of the darkest days in American history.

clean_body: | = | | BREAKING: Madison Cawthorn was just caught on camera planning another January 6th event and encouraging more violence. = | | | = Below are Cawthorn’s direct quotes from a recent GOP event. They are more extreme than anything he’s said before -- and go even further than Trump’s worst. “[Democrats] do not have your best interests at heart... we all need to be storing up some ammunition.” “If our election systems continue to be rigged... it’s going to lead to one place, and that’s bloodshed.” “[I’m] willing to defend liberty at all costs... [I would] dread having to take up arms against a fellow American.” Says the January 6 insurrectionists are “political hostages ” and references “trying to bust them out.” And finally, a question from the crowd in reference to January 6: “ When are you gonna call us to Washington again? ” “We are actively working on that one...We have a few plans in motion that I can’t make public right now.” We’re appalled, Peter. And we’re clearer than ever on what’s at stake in this race. Cawthorn has never stopped spreading conspiracy theories and provoking his base -- and now he’s planning to mobilize far-right extremists again. Here’s the truth: the insurrection was an act of domestic terrorism. Joe Biden won the most votes ever and was elected President. And January 6th is one of the darkest days in American history. = ** | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = ** \-- Team Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you.
