Peter,

Joe Biden has embarrassed our country and made us the laughingstock of the world. A few months ago I wrote to you saying that 2021 is a repeat of 1979 – if we weren’t sure then, we definitely are sure of the comparisons now.

**Joe Biden is Jimmy Carter 2.0 - but much, much more dangerous.**

And right now, Republicans are fighting to stop Biden and Democrats from tripping over themselves and bringing further embarrassment on our great nation.

President Trump is right - what’s happening in Afghanistan is _“the greatest embarrassment in the history of our country.”_ **He’d tell you himself, only unlike the Taliban, President Trump is banned on Twitter.**

**Shameful.**

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. Derek - I know my team has already emailed you a few times, but this is incredibly important, so I wanted to personally reach out. **Our midnight deadline is just a few hours away, and we’re still $1,414 short of our rapid-response goal.** I'm hoping you can help us make up the gap before it's too late, but first I'll explain why reaching this goal is so critical.

Mitch McConnell and the GOP will stop at nothing to flip the Senate. They only need _one_ seat to do it, and with CNN naming me one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators, Nevada is one of their top targets. Now, McConnell's handpicked candidate (a Trump-supporting extremist who election forecasters say _could win_) has entered the race against me.

The GOP and outside spending groups have _already_ spent over $1 million to defeat me. This is starting to feel a lot like 2016, when nearly _$50 million_ was spent to buy this seat. We managed to win by a slim two-point margin, and here's what that tough race taught me: **your grassroots support makes a critical difference.**

**That's why I'm urgently asking for your help before tonight's midnight deadline, Derek. This is my chance to show the GOP that our team has what it takes to keep Nevada blue and defend our Democratic Senate.** _Please, will you join me?_

**[Split a donation $25 or more between my campaign and Common Good VA before our midnight deadline to meet our critical rapid-response goal, protect Nevada's Senate seat and defend our Democratic Senate majority!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGjIhcyMR8UP-sAtzv7VOK0YHwaSan5cpzpSpLDS1h5TrTR3gRfF45Y1NwkAO2bMRbvhiIHyS9l9zQ-R0A5NTvh2FIGZrcDDiM10N_u1uU4rBeqbwQDlX2oojlY118Ihxm32-YxXnQ7lUar5QmKmok7gtrXhvp5Ge9NJaYLIh2lv_RNsLET6BXaYQAMZrfdEe-1PsICOC4Ya0dSofGjp9I1tH6tiLb3U-l_9lPm1DmLVcv_MwVtTwu7nTWQOGqoZoqVAfkQ3Xe2tqgUOgAa-5ZHOoDU-INEbD-0G7-PoU_5GF5BtcsJla6FsLp9hz4-oCkA/3ew/1ZIw1hJHQj6IveQ6mYI-ew/h1/Agef2AZdAeCs4pPhHM-903R4hkcsaS9ipkusNHS5TOE)**

I can't thank you enough for helping us defend the Senate, Nevada and our country. We can build back better thanks to dedicated grassroots supporters like you.

_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!

Catherine **[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGjIhcyMR8UP-sAtzv7VOK0ajBh8cvzIJNKDIkveylO8x_kJ_ibdiud8I8WVb4nTcUmp7kD-xQ-6H8eQtjNj647ZE3rTeQzApcQ1dktR3gsIXRgRrJOLBWpjAyUX7LdE5tNnGrt-PRShbStsCf-3NowhvMWIJCTSUa_uORGieg7gFWZjGBF9oOlbc7910UNwHRrl7D1IU5zuZteq6Cj8FwRHEBso3CkYkQUy6nhZiyLo1vVjfStbs3CgrU7Z45mi8cSBTzmcHYyAIW-BR503qFpHB7sCA7pOUE7oMlOqPyYKQ/3ew/1ZIw1hJHQj6IveQ6mYI-ew/h2/yT359WhJYs4g8r18Btm3n2MogNsLJzqDSNdEL_z4E5M)
** **P.S. I really mean it when I say this grassroots team – including you – has the power to make or break this race. With Senate control on the line, any amount you can give before midnight will make a critical difference.[Please, split a donation of $10, $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Common Good VA to win in Nevada and defend our Senate majority.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGjIhcyMR8UP-sAtzv7VOK0agjx1NXPd-EumOEY_aCUQpvVSg1iO2RDWnjgDDAPjcUj7meVOksC9eWv_taeDzGTk3jOPOVd4qdTjG0p6gECOmcFCEYBQt2IknmOcstpCAfGf6TVqopZwoZJiyfacEFyRKn8bmx-9bIl7jNlzacGP3xadwdhmvpo0MzxpNRVCaNelppnR7vHm8QLzPcs4k1WLHuADJhg5YGyEts8Fg3KgOs5599FvFkapXx1iF5xjdvww5ZiqKdOS1PMkLfGMfQtA4luh55HYW-AVc_HnzguRD/3ew/1ZIw1hJHQj6IveQ6mYI-ew/h3/_AoxmRubjAhNPMzsj4QvDTfZIaFYRQFiqheaw-MeKM8)** | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGjIhcyMR8UP-sAtzv7VOK0ahrir-s5cu46i_2ptQKhECSCtmdqBQtXQh55AJIH0IQXXmBSkBzTGN2aHXjhfd0khqsJDQ58Y3XGM77VWfqjW8-sB93m6L-8V0HKZI3EgZxTzzdWX2-7hgWe3fRmvsfod57oXyBIW6fFVILrlOXx_RI8UiG_tp5d_ppIVJ0LjB0CajbTEE9LHS4aA6-J6SJNBltuE3ES2V8CWyBLBSHVa4p8RIpKDOa_0HiB2Bb3kRNt2gAKHHX1s-3YDJEsHfAhiaCot0PaHpHEibnnee3KbI/3ew/1ZIw1hJHQj6IveQ6mYI-ew/h4/2sKd_aLcnL9E1vWepkVHlRosXD9NAF31PgLAjuMXdCs)

Forget global warming. This is global heating.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/_a-dsDggR7Bg/Si9KeGpMSHRQdVM1NnQ2NGFTcE1XSjRadS9SY0RLb2dPZE9VQVlHczFGTldCc0VXWFd2dWltU0tjSWt5dVFyWGdOajlGb1dqVmNjV05EV1VPaFFkQ0NsWDdrVXBab04zM1c1bURoSmNJdms9S0/VjdLRlpYWkZ1bGhEeUlGTzlVa2dJeHNkK1h2UnJ0SURhRmNycnJRb0FKST0S1) Friend, No matter where you live, you've felt the impact of the climate crisis in some way this summer. Temperatures soared to deadly new heights, droughts devastated crops, and wildfire smoke turned skies hazy from coast to coast. It even rained on the peak of a Greenland ice sheet for the first time in recorded history. And just this weekend, Hurricane Ida, one of the worst storms in U.S. history, devastated Louisiana, upending countless lives. But we're turning the tide here in Washington state. Just this year, we've passed landmark laws to fight the climate crisis. We're doing exactly what science tells us we need to do. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34935906/303520251/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTVkYzNkMy1kYjA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zgIxy8l9npzZ9KPeUUqcU8V1zG4jkBYVGNRIwltyAG4=&emci=45c35047-9606-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=e55dc3d3-db09-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=15759664)

| | Derek,

When I first ran for Richmond City Council in the 1990s, I'm not sure I could have imagined how far Virginia would come in the next couple of decades. And more recently, in the past couple of years since taking the majority in the General Assembly, our progress has grown even more. From abolishing the death penalty to being the 38th state to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment to becoming the first state in the South to pass our own comprehensive Voting Rights Act -- I'm so proud of the voters and leaders of our incredible Commonwealth for fighting for our shared values.

The fact is, so many of the big steps that we’ve taken to make Virginia a thriving and welcoming state for everyone were unthinkable just a few years ago. And let me tell you this, friend -- if we don't hold on tight to our Democratic leaders in Richmond, it could all be taken away.

That’s what Glenn Youngkin, Todd Gilbert, and the rest of the Virginia GOP are trying to do. That’s what they’re campaigning on -- rolling back all the progress Virginia has made.

Now, I’m going to be honest with you. We have a great slate of candidates running this year. I believe that my friends Terry, Hala, and Mark have a good shot of winning their races -- but they can’t govern alone. If we want to protect Virginia’s progress, they need a majority in the House of Delegates, too.

My team and I have been staying in contact with the statewide campaigns and the staff over at the Democratic Party of Virginia HQ to get updates on how things are going. The DPVA staff asked me to reach out to you with this important request: **[Will you split a donation between the Democratic Party of Virginia and my team to ensure our Virginia Democrats have the resources they need to win?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34935907/303520252/1872418789?refcode=ris_20210830_e_f_us_na_na_eom8nd&refcode2=rti&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTVkYzNkMy1kYjA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zgIxy8l9npzZ9KPeUUqcU8V1zG4jkBYVGNRIwltyAG4=)**

We need to make sure not only that we send Terry, Hala, and Mark back to Richmond, but that we send them back with another wave of Democratic Delegates. I hope you’ll join me in supporting the Democratic Party of Virginia today.

Thank you for all of your support and please, stay safe and healthy.

Tim

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: The number of people donating is just as important as how much we raise.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I wanted to pause for a moment to share a bit about why these emails are so important for our campaign.
#

Cheri is asking you to pitch in $3 or whatever you can spare to support our fight to give North Carolinians new representation in the Senate. Our fundraising goals aren't just about how much money we raise — they’re about how many people contribute to help reach them.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34936018/303520411/-928165870?refcode2=f5aeea0b-dc09-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210830-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWFlZWEwYi1kYzA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-5MOovVi__PTBWgjMFuwas6TpXe3Z66KVUKWgZh_kE=)**
Friends -
I know our campaign has sent a number of emails about tomorrow’s deadline, and I wanted to pause for a moment to share a bit about why these emails are so important for our campaign.
You see, North Carolina has a history of setting records for the most expensive Senate races in the country.
In fact, the 2020 Senate race here was the most expensive Senate race in United States history on Election Day last year, and political analysts expect this race to be one of the most expensive races in 2022. That’s because this is an open seat and a top target for both Democrats and Republicans.
So we know we’re going to be up against millions in outside spending, and that means we need to start raising the resources now to fight back.
When we launched this campaign, I committed to making it a true grassroots, bottom-up effort. That’s why we’re rejecting corporate PAC money, and instead, we count on lots and lots of people like you to power this fight.
Now, this may surprise you, but emails just like this one are one of our number one sources of donations. We know not everyone can donate every time, but when we all give a little bit whenever possible, it adds up in a big way.
Can you be someone who steps up today?
**[Please donate $3 or any amount you can afford before tomorrow’s critical deadline. This is important because every donation sends a message about the power of our grassroots campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34936019/303520412/-928165870?refcode2=f5aeea0b-dc09-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210830-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWFlZWEwYi1kYzA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-5MOovVi__PTBWgjMFuwas6TpXe3Z66KVUKWgZh_kE=)**
You are the reason we have a chance at flipping this seat. Together, let’s expand our Senate majority and make meaningful change.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34936020/303520413/-928165870?refcode2=f5aeea0b-dc09-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210830-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWFlZWEwYi1kYzA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-5MOovVi__PTBWgjMFuwas6TpXe3Z66KVUKWgZh_kE=)**

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Help us meet our goal!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
**I’ll be blunt. It’s almost the end of the month, and we’re still far away from our August target.** It’s incredibly important that we continue to reach our goals every month so we can build the war chest we’ll need to successfully take on Jay Obernolte.

The election may be a year away, but Every. Month. Counts. A good campaign raises more and more money every month to spend on crucial interventions like voter registration and important expenses such as our staff and our tech. **If we can’t reach our goals, Jay Obernolte will easily outspend us and all of California’s 8th will lose out.**

[**I’m running for Congress to be the progressive champion that my district needs so badly. Every single dollar you invest in us goes back into our campaign to swing this district blue. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34936537/303522486/1962750173?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjA0MjJhNS1kZDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYcK-bUJgYwsYfQ6Q-fx1yqivarTO1wiFh5NdRXB9Kc=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34936538/303522487/1962750173?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjA0MjJhNS1kZDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYcK-bUJgYwsYfQ6Q-fx1yqivarTO1wiFh5NdRXB9Kc=)

**I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: I know we can win this race and flip California’s 8th district from red to blue.** Already, our campaign has gotten to work registering new voters who are excited to vote for a progressive campaign for the first time. There are tens of thousands of folks like that out in my district, and we need to reach them. But I can’t do it on my own.

To maintain a winning campaign, I need my winning staff alongside me. And to support my staff, I need to raise enough money to keep us all going through November of next year. **That’s where you come in.** [**If you think believe we need more representatives in Congress who will fight for a bold, progressive agenda, you can make a difference RIGHT NOW by donating to our movement. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34936546/303522492/1962750173?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjA0MjJhNS1kZDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYcK-bUJgYwsYfQ6Q-fx1yqivarTO1wiFh5NdRXB9Kc=)

We don’t have any time to waste. [**We need help now. clean_body: Peter, I’ll be blunt. It’s almost the end of the month, and we’re still far away from our August target. It’s incredibly important that we continue to reach our goals every month so we can build the war chest we’ll need to successfully take on Jay Obernolte. The election may be a year away, but Every. Month. Counts. A good campaign raises more and more money every month to spend on crucial interventions like voter registration and important expenses such as our staff and our tech. If we can’t reach our goals, Jay Obernolte will easily outspend us and all of California’s 8th will lose out. = = I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: I know we can win this race and flip California’s 8th district from red to blue. Already, our campaign has gotten to work registering new voters who are excited to vote for a progressive campaign for the first time. There are tens of thousands of folks like that out in my district, and we need to reach them. But I can’t do it on my own. To maintain a winning campaign, I need my winning staff alongside me. And to support my staff, I need to raise enough money to keep us all going through November of next year. That’s where you come in. = We don’t have any time to waste. = In Solidarity, Derek Marshall * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • (760) 486-2416

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Taking back the House $1 at a time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Republicans only need to pick up a handful of seats to win back control of the House, and we need your help to do it.

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=02592207ec3c4b598ed0c2cc45321c97&_e=WmZVuCc6AFwrlTBG35ty4LhfiGXAvRav0jWLb3YhxaHHOdorWwwd-b14XHNXmA2O_Rm0J1xV8hYiqAPYEnH1NrUXDvVJmuHickBRgeX6CzgNzyAhp_JYoJj9FlW-sVRl3-GhwE04TXBh0qOKb23iQqtzIj5YmxuSQF9V91frhi-kZgZsKn4f81JLHKt6xBsUAs5xa480YW_tAHfVxmMc0GmlsNgsZ2daByzZvVAhAO8CK72JLVHZjLI3aY1GLf18R52uDrK8Gz4B-AE0oA4XiYDs6K-eQUTSbNzNlEk379_5SCsfkQNpNGB5WorsvLWSGVHVMHAgtDfMTYJRoRJC31b3Oj271A-Z23Nv1K64FSY%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

Joe Biden has embarrassed our country and made us the laughingstock of the world. A few months ago I wrote to you saying that 2021 is a repeat of 1979 – if we weren’t sure then, we definitely are sure of the comparisons now.

**Joe Biden is Jimmy Carter 2.0 - but much, much more dangerous.**

And right now, Republicans are fighting to stop Biden and Democrats from tripping over themselves and bringing further embarrassment on our great nation.

President Trump is right - what’s happening in Afghanistan is _“the greatest embarrassment in the history of our country.”_ **He’d tell you himself, only unlike the Taliban, President Trump is banned on Twitter.**

**Shameful.**

I’m writing to you because the truth of the matter is that we’re at a crossroads. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: It's not just Republicans trying to block our agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The entire Democratic agenda is on the line this fall, Peter.
#
Peter, the entire Democratic agenda is on the line this fall. But it’s not just Republicans trying to block our plans. A very small group of Democrats has threatened to stand in the way of us delivering for families and communities.
**That’s why my fight for our progressive priorities is so important right now — for securing voting rights, fighting climate change, and investing in working people across the country.**
**[Can you chip in $3 to help me lead the progressive fight in Congress?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5425?refcode=em20210830-588&t=1&akid=588%2E420207%2EpLjsKT)** _Every dollar helps me and my team hit our $50,000 August fundraising goal before tomorrow night!_
**[Contribute »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5425?refcode=em20210830-588&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=588%2E420207%2EpLjsKT)**
The **transformative $3.5 trillion spending bill** in Congress will combat climate change, expand Medicare, enact universal child care, win paid leave, invest in education, give folks a roadmap to citizenship, and much more.
**But, a very small group of Democrats have tried to block the bill.** They call themselves “moderates.” The truth is, it’s not the moderate position to be against investments in child care, paid leave, health care, and addressing climate change. This is the Democratic agenda, it is the president's agenda, and it is what we promised people across America.
**We’re going to need every single Democrat in the House and Senate to vote for this bill, because not a single GOP member will be with us.** We have a chance to enact the big, urgent, popular set of policies we promised voters — Democrats cannot be standing in the way.
**[Can you contribute $3 to fuel my progressive fight for universal child care, climate action, and so much more? I don’t take a cent from corporate PACs or Wall Street, because my fight is for the people, not corporate profits.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5425?refcode=em20210830-588&t=22&akid=588%2E420207%2EpLjsKT)**
**[Contribute »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5425?refcode=em20210830-588&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=588%2E420207%2EpLjsKT)**
**This spending bill could be the most significant piece of progressive legislation passed in decades.** While we can pass this bill with a simple majority, voting rights legislation remains blocked by the filibuster in the Senate.
If Democrats don’t come together right now to pass the $3.5 trillion spending bill AND end the filibuster to pass voting rights legislation, we may not have another chance to get this done.
My progressive colleagues and I will be fighting to ensure “moderates” don’t get in the way of passing these investments in working people, action on climate change, and urgent voting rights protections.
**[Peter, now’s the time to chip in to fuel my fight for bold, transformative change across this country. Economic relief, social change, protecting our democracy, and the fight for the environment is only possible with all of us working together.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5425?refcode=em20210830-588&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=588%2E420207%2EpLjsKT)**
In solidarity,
Pramila
**[Contribute »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5425?refcode=em20210830-588&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=588%2E420207%2EpLjsKT)**

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210830-588-footer&t=26&refcode2=588_420207_pLjsKT&akid=588%2E420207%2EpLjsKT)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

subject: I’m a little worried, folks

body:
We still need to raise almost $10,000 to reach our goal, and the deadline is tomorrow. We cannot afford to fall short when polls show Virginia TIED at the top of the ticket.
I had a meeting with my finance team and I’m a little worried, folks.
We still need to raise almost $10,000 to reach our goal, and the deadline is tomorrow. We cannot afford to fall short when polls show Virginia TIED at the top of the ticket.
[**Will you please rush in a donation so we can make up ground and keep Virginia blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34937264/303524714/-668906574?refcode=E11027-20210830-EOM6-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzE0ZTcxMS1kZjA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ype6au_rUR9OJ59UtURq9_7OJmVeakIaDqM9xolfh7A=)
Virginia is at risk of falling into the hands of Donald Trump and dangerous Republicans like my opponent Jason Miyares who support the “big lie” if we don’t fight back.
We’ve got a plan to launch ads of our own and build a ground operation that will encourage Democrats to get out the vote, but none of that is going to happen if we don’t have the resources to get it all funded. And right now, we’re falling short.
Our fundraising numbers will be going public after the deadline tomorrow and we need to make sure we show the strength of our campaign against our GOP opponent.
[**Based on our meeting today, we need a groundswell of grassroots supporters to help us catch up to our goal. Can I count on you to chip in as much as you can today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34937265/303524715/-668906574?refcode=E11027-20210830-EOM6-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzE0ZTcxMS1kZjA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ype6au_rUR9OJ59UtURq9_7OJmVeakIaDqM9xolfh7A=)
Thanks so much,
Mark Herring

We cannot afford to fall short when polls show Virginia TIED at the top of the ticket. = Virginia is at risk of falling into the hands of Donald Trump and dangerous Republicans like my opponent Jason Miyares who support the “big lie” if we don’t fight back. name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: If I lose, Democrats will lose the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Senator Rosen said I could reach out to you today and tell you the latest on the Nevada Senate race.
#
Friends,
Senator Rosen said I could reach out to you today and tell you the latest on the Nevada Senate race.
I’m Catherine Cortez Masto, and I proudly represent Nevada in the U.S. Senate. Last election cycle, I worked tirelessly to defeat Mitch McConnell and help flip the Senate as the Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, Senate Democrats’ campaign arm. Now, Mitch McConnell is making it crystal clear that he wants revenge.
In a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to split a contribution of $5 right now between my campaign and Jacky Rosen’s to defend our hard-won Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34937726/303526022/-1438083738?refcode=jr_em_nd_210830_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGQxNWYzYS1lMDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BqcHQ5NKytLscektdk61ikETlXs-rMOdxneOe3lIYHM=)** I hope you’ll let me explain -- because if I lose this race, Democrats will lose the Senate majority.
I just got some urgent news that completely changes the state of my race, and I wanted you to be the first to know: **Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate has just _officially_ announced his campaign to defeat me and take back the Senate for Republicans.**
CNN is reporting that my Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip and The Cook Political Report just shifted this race in Republicans’ favor. Donald Trump nearly flipped Nevada in 2020, and the GOP and outside groups have already spent over $1 million this year to defeat me.
**That’s why my campaign just launched an emergency rapid-response goal to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight. Reaching this goal will help ensure we have the resources to defend this critical seat -- and Jacky thought I should reach out. I’m counting on you to rush a donation to help us defend the Senate. [Please, split a contribution of $5 right now between my campaign and Jacky Rosen’s to keep Nevada blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34937727/303526023/-1438083738?refcode=jr_em_nd_210830_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGQxNWYzYS1lMDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BqcHQ5NKytLscektdk61ikETlXs-rMOdxneOe3lIYHM=)**
Nevada races are always close: Just 2 percentage points decided my race in 2016, and just 2 percentage points separated President Biden from Donald Trump last year.
Now that the GOP’s dark-money allies have a far-right, Trump-supporting extremist to throw their money behind and flip the only seat they need to regain Senate control, this race could be the most expensive in Nevada history.
I really mean it when I say the Senate majority will be decided in Nevada -- and the only way I can win is with grassroots supporters like you.
That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally. Defending our Senate majority is the only way we’ll be able to keep fighting for the progress Americans need and deserve. But defending the Senate will take considerable resources -- and right now I’m falling short of my emergency rapid-response goal. **[Please, before it’s too late, will you rush a donation to help my campaign and Jacky Rosen’s and defend the Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34937728/303526024/-1438083738?refcode=jr_em_nd_210830_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGQxNWYzYS1lMDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BqcHQ5NKytLscektdk61ikETlXs-rMOdxneOe3lIYHM=)**
Thank you so much for your support.
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34937729/303526025/-1438083738?refcode=jr_em_nd_210830_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGQxNWYzYS1lMDA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BqcHQ5NKytLscektdk61ikETlXs-rMOdxneOe3lIYHM=)**

clean_body: Let’s be clear here: If we fall short tomorrow, we’re going to have to make cuts to our voter outreach. | | = ** | | GOAL UPDATE: August end-of-month goal: $20,000 Left to raise by AUGUST 31: $6,141 = Peter, We’re coming up on our end-of-month deadline tomorrow, and we’re very far behind where we’d like to be at this point of the month. With $6,141 left to raise to meet our critical monthly budgeting goal, we’re not sure if we’ll be able to do all of the things we have planned for the upcoming months that will be crucial to beat Ron Johnson. Let’s be clear here: If we fall short tomorrow, we’re going to have to make cuts to our voter outreach. While being short by a few thousand dollars in our online grassroots fundraising program may not seem like a big deal, we’re budgeting down to the last dollar every month. Every dollar is critical in our fight to defeat Ron Johnson because he’s going to raise millions from the special interests and his corporate mega-donors. Before tomorrow at midnight, help us reach our goal of $20,000 in online donations by chipping in $5 or whatever you can >> If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Lasry | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. name: Adam Schiff
subject: please read this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/34GVF3-)
It's Adam Schiff.

This is a big deadline -- so I'll cut right to the chase: **[Our House Democrats are just 24 hours away from our critical End of Month Deadline, and we're still short of our must-hit goal. Before time runs out, I'd be so grateful if you could chip in $3 to help us close the gap and defend our House Majority.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/4E6Vs3d_ryM-)** | [END OF MONTH DEADLINE: 8/31, MIDNIGHT
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_aGxf2EV_XT-)
---

Let me explain why I'm reaching out:

**Earlier this month, Donald Trump strongly hinted on Fox News that he plans to run for president again in 2024. Something we all felt coming - but the nightmare is becoming a reality. **

I know first hand, so believe me when I say: **We cannot and must not trust this lawless, one-term president with power ever again.**

And I'm committed to doing everything I can to keep Trump and his Republicans from overtaking our slim majorities and rolling back our progress.

But to stop them in their tracks, we need to join together - because Trump and his Republican allies have big money donors and their conspiratorial far-right base rushing them MILLIONS to overwhelm our House Majority.

**[Your support today is truly important, and that's why I'm personally asking for your help. Will you pitch in $3 right now? We cannot allow Trump's House Republicans to take the majority.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/9b46T4d9jkJ-)**
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/AGmXQyp20_)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/d30Et6Lmwzc-)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)
---
| [**Or donate another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-)
---

Thank you,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45539376&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2NzM0MTY2OAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45539376&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2NzM0MTY2OAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

Derivative of Gage Skidmore [photo](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcX8VLjTNL/MUE3TjJBKzBHV1ZJUVlFL25oK0dYNUNCbnIzeGtxSEV6WWxyUWtnK1A3U204Mk00NUozaG5DRVJSR2ZnYm9Ddlp4THh6Mm03Ump1Ym1mUmVyZ2MxMUUwenZYVnUzM2FYWVpqNGJXRVBBNWZ1Vis5MXM5cDlmUT09S0/) ([CC BY-SA 2.0](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/GRD0BZKPXrcv/MUE3TjJBKzBHV1ZJUVlFL25oK0dYNUNCbnIzeGtxSEV6WWxyUWtnK1A3U204Mk00NUozaG5DRVJSR2ZnYm9Ddlp4THh6Mm03Ump1Ym1mUmVyZ2MxMUUwenZYVnUzM2FYWVpqNGJXRVBBNWZ1Vis5MXM5cDlmUT09S0/)).

Fellow American,

Joe Biden is the worst president in history.

_He is taking zero responsibility for the way he is withdrawing our troops in Afghanistan - resulting in a TALIBAN takeover - and he's even blaming President Trump for it._

Do you think this is OK, Fellow American?

The reason Biden is passing blame to President Trump is pretty simple - he knows he has FAILED the American people and is floundering.

We want to send a letter to Joe Biden DEMANDING that he resigns as President of the United States IMMEDIATELY. Will you co-sign it for us?

**[Add your name NOW to DEMAND Joe Biden resign as President of the United States. >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65236%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qbCe7BwL3trT6t61RvaN1g&sysid=1)**

* * *
| _Dear Joe Biden,

Your decision to withdraw troops from Afghanistan and then blame President Trump for your terribly executed plan is despicable. As an American, I expect better.

As Commander-in-Chief, you have failed us and I DEMAND that you officially resign as President of the United States, effective immediately.

Sincerely,
A Patriotic American_

Their latest effort is here in California, where they’re fighting to recall our own Governor, Gavin Newsom. Californians are already casting their votes in the gubernatorial recall election. It’s absolutely critical we defeat this Republican recall.

**It’s imperative that we keep a Republican out of our governor’s office —[ _that’s why I’m asking if you can take your support one step further by making a split contribution today between my campaign and Gavin Newsom’s campaign to stop the Republican recall._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34939747/303531952/-1202677532?refcode=blu-sjc-20210830-1-em&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWVlZTQwNS1lNjA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lbaZQXEPp_WxhS6PsmtiG0_eZjxzbrot6ZtkN-Xpx8M=)**

This baseless recall effort is just another example of partisan politics costing California taxpayers millions of dollars. Recent polls are showing that this will be a tight race, so we need to do everything we can to support Governor Newsom. name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: The definition of insanity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
You won't believe what's happening in Washington. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/insanity-2472842?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=e494c5dc86&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

We have hundreds of thousands of unvetted, possibly dangerous illegal aliens crossing our border every month.

We are about to have a FLOOD of refugees from Afghanistan.

And do you know what our government is doing?

It is giving work visas to illegal aliens with deportation orders.

_That is the definition of insanity_ \-- and when I found out about it, even I couldn't believe that the federal government could be so stupid.

So I introduced a bill -- The Americans not Aliens Act to end this ridiculous practice, and stop giving illegal aliens MORE incentive to cross our borders:

[__](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f657081131&e=645b3b1338)

They already have plenty of incentive as it is, with the Biden Administration waving them across without question.

I need your help to end yet another foolish government program.

[**Show me you have my back with a generous contribution to my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=18afa2a983&e=645b3b1338).

[**Anything you can chip in will help me end the Biden Administration's reckless border policies**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ca68ac91d5&e=645b3b1338).

We shouldn't be allowing illegal aliens to cross our borders in the first place.

We certainly shouldn't be giving them work visas!

And we DEFINITELY shouldn't be giving work visas to illegal aliens who are about to be deported!

What is the Biden Administration thinking? The answer is: _it's thinking only about how it can help foreigners, not Americans_.

[**With your generous contributions to my reelection campaign today, I can keep working to put America First in Congress**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=03900c5e9f&e=645b3b1338).

[**_A contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or MORE to my reelection campaign right away, helps me spread the word about these insane border policies, and keep working to end them once and for all_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=23906115b3&e=645b3b1338).

But I need your help today.

The Communist Democrats are shoving open borders down our throats.

And the dirty little secret in The Swamp is that most Republicans -- we call them RINOs -- want open borders too.

I am the _NUMBER ONE_ target of the crazy Communist Democrats and the RINOs, because I'm actually working to close the borders.

They want me gone, which is why I'm in urgent need of your support right away.

[**These are perilous times for our Republic -- we are on the brink of losing our national sovereignty forever -- and just a small gift today goes a long way towards helping me close the borders and making sure that doesn't happen**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=bfa4de3afd&e=645b3b1338).
---
| Thank you in advance for helping me end the Biden Administration's insane border security policies.

For Freedom,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=7c35ee6e48&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** Not only is the Biden Administration allowing illegal aliens to flood our borders, and giving them work permits, but they're even giving work permits to illegal aliens who have been ordered deported.

_This is one of the most insane policies I've ever encountered, and that is a long list_.

[**Help me fight the Biden Administration's ridiculous border policies with a generous contribution to my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ca30b8f8be&e=645b3b1338).
---
| |

| | | Patriot,

Rep. Jake LaTurner and Republicans in Congress are fighting for us, and _**we want to hear from you.**_

Joe Biden has been in the White House for 7 months. How do you think he's doing?

**Do you approve of Joe Biden's first 7 months as president?[Answer Now!](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=43174f5cd3&e=1050d051da)**

So far, we've seen:
1\. Record [illegal border crossings](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=dbcc9e6bfd&e=1050d051da)
2\. Rising inflation and [gas prices](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=096e6991d8&e=1050d051da)
3\. A disaster in Afghanistan, leaving Americans stranded and causing brave soldiers to lose their lives

And that's just the start of a _**long list of crises that were created by the Biden administration.**_
---

**Under Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi, emergencies are ignored, while taxes are raised and money is spent on wasteful Wishlist items to appease the radicals of their party.**

Team LaTurner

Fellow American,

Joe Biden is the worst president in history.

_He is taking zero responsibility for the way he is withdrawing our troops in Afghanistan - resulting in a TALIBAN takeover - and he's even blaming President Trump for it._

Do you think this is OK, Fellow American?

The reason Biden is passing blame to President Trump is pretty simple - he knows he has FAILED the American people and is floundering.

We want to send a letter to Joe Biden DEMANDING that he resigns as President of the United States IMMEDIATELY. Will you co-sign it for us?

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]

Friend,

Being Kirsten’s Finance Director, it’s my responsibility to have a finger on the pulse of our campaign’s financial health. That’s why I track our fundraising numbers so closely.

Here’s my current takeaway: We’re still very well-positioned in this race, but we do have some ground to make up.

Running for Congress is a Herculean task, and we need to let Kirsten know that we’ve got her back. Our campaign depends on building forward momentum among grassroots supporters like you.

So here’s my request to you: contribute what you can, and let’s ensure that Kirsten can focus on the issues at hand rather than the dollars and cents that make a campaign tick. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-for-arizona-1?refcode= X_03021_EOM_C&amount=25]

body:

---
Peter,

Gavin Newsom just launched a new anti-recall add featuring **Bernie Sanders** , which has him pedaling radical policies and attacking the voters who are fed-up with Newsom's oppressive and destructive reign over California.

This is the second time Newsom has gotten a radical leftist socialist U.S. Senator from the East Coast to appear in an ad for him - **Elizabeth Warren** being the first.

This ad is now running all over California to motivate the Left to vote against the recall, and it's working.

[**Can we count on you to rush in $25, $50, $100 or more today to help us fight back against the Left 's new ad blitz and ensure we can get our own pro-recall messages in front of voters?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58221875:JwH_rs2NI:m:1:3253819041:7CC4B305656FCDF4A902C624B678C468:r)

With leftist elites flooding in from all over the country to save Newsom, we desperately need your help top stop them. **We only have TWO WEEKS left to make this happen, so can we count on you in crunch time?**

name: Nancy Takano =?utf-8?b?KE1hcmvigJlz?= mom)
subject: re: my son
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
Your support means so much to me.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34940808/303534583/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNjODY4NC1lOTA5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nnmuBsfRrZ7U7tajuSU6nUuoher5-1YaKc_jAW-IalQ=)
---
Hi Peter,

It’s Nancy, Mark’s mom here. I just wanted you to hear from me how grateful Mark and our whole family is for your support.

When Mark told me he wanted to run for Congress I was excited — but also worried. I knew he would face incredible challenges as a gay and Asian man in politics.

But since then, we’ve seen so much wonderful support for Mark and the progressive values he stands for. And, Peter, I have to say, that means so much to me.

See, our family is no stranger to adversity. When I was young, I, along with my family, was unjustly interned in a Japanese American internment camp.

But we’ve come so far since then. My son even went from a school teacher to a U.S. Congressman! _You can’t get more American than that._

But Peter, right now Mark and his campaign are worried about a big fundraising deadline coming up tomorrow and unfortunately, they’re behind.

Mark tells me that if they can’t reach their goal, they could lose their race to the type of people who don’t want families like mine in this country.

[**Our country has been through so much in the last few years. But I know we will persevere and continue progressing forward. clean_body: Your support means so much to me. | = Hi Peter, It’s Nancy, Mark’s mom here. I just wanted you to hear from me how grateful Mark and our whole family is for your support. When Mark told me he wanted to run for Congress I was excited — but also worried. I knew he would face incredible challenges as a gay and Asian man in politics. But since then, we’ve seen so much wonderful support for Mark and the progressive values he stands for. And, Peter, I have to say, that means so much to me. See, our family is no stranger to adversity. When I was young, I, along with my family, was unjustly interned in a Japanese American internment camp. But we’ve come so far since then. My son even went from a school teacher to a U.S. Congressman! You can’t get more American than that. But Peter, right now Mark and his campaign are worried about a big fundraising deadline coming up tomorrow and unfortunately, they’re behind. Mark tells me that if they can’t reach their goal, they could lose their race to the type of people who don’t want families like mine in this country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you for your support. It means so much to both of us. Sincerely, Nancy Takano Mark’s Mom | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. ARE. SO. CLOSE. If just 25 people could donate $25 RIGHT now, we WILL hit our mark and keep our campaign’s momentum going strong! Can I tell Matt he can count on you to take us over the top here? And right now we're running out of time to hit our goal. Because we’re building an army to take down Donald Trump, we’ve got to take this seriously, so we’re going back through our records to make sure they are accurate. Here’s what we have on file for you, Derek: | | Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Supporter number: 108609855 Filing deadline donor status: PENDING Suggested action for Derek: = | = Please note, your supporter status is based on online contributions from dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you’ve contributed under a different email address, contributed very recently, or supported our campaign through another means, thank you! Here’s why your support matters, Derek. Terry McAuliffe’s opponent has already committed to spending $75 million of his personal fortune in this race. Not to mention, Glenn Youngkin’s biggest supporter, Donald Trump, announced he has $102 million in his campaign warchest. And this race is tight — that means every single dollar matters. You’re one of our top supporters, and we’re counting on you to help us reach this goal. = | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for answering this call to action. Her honesty and resilience are unmatched \-- whether it’s fighting to save the auto industry in Ohio or protecting the Great Lakes ecosystem, Marcy understands the issues that matter most to the people of the Heartland. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your support, \-- Team Kaptur Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. name: Mark Walker
subject: NO American left behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walker4NC
body:
Biden’s botched exit from Afghanistan is leaving Americans stranded. Learn More >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/8c346c6072772f13/cdd89c9fa56ad690c3d6b838967d376c/35903) Peter, The devastating events in Kabul are harrowing, disheartening, and reprehensible. My deepest thoughts and prayers go out to the families of those who have lost loved ones. What’s worse: this was completely avoidable. It’s recently come to light that the U.S. Military may not be able to evacuate ALL Americans. **That means there are hundreds of U.S. citizens who are still STRANDED in Afghanistan**. These souls have now been tasked with finding their way out of the country on their own. They will need to travel thousands of miles, cross multiple Taliban checkpoints, and remain undetected. How did we come to this? How have our leaders let these people down, and let us down as a country, to this extent?
It’s time for resignations to start. And they should start with President Joe Biden. [**HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE - ASK HIM TO RESIGN >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/8c346c6072772f13/9ed10e2157e3a595c3d6b838967d376c/35903) Peter, this isn’t even the end of the bad news. **The U.S. Government has handed over a list of remaining Americans to the Taliban, so that they can allegedly “allow them to pass through checkpoints”**. This is a RIDICULOUS notion, and we should have never thrust our fellow citizens into this horrific situation.
Multitudes of people told President Biden that this would happen. The bipartisan Foreign Affairs Committee, Generals, and common sense all pointed towards this result. I don’t know if he’s incompetent, doesn’t understand what he’s been told, or is just a poor leader... but it’s time for President Biden to go, and I need your help. [_**Please contribute $25 today so I can hold him accountable for these gross failures**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/8c346c6072772f13/bf18d32889557bbac3d6b838967d376c/35903). Sincerely,
Mark Walker | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/8c346c6072772f13/52ff87b2973c84dcc3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/8c346c6072772f13/897b242e5124740fc3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/8c346c6072772f13/6ea5df38c242bfb5c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/8c346c6072772f13/4182dbe1d989a86cc3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/8c346c6072772f13/6a0db8c5274189c5c3d6b838967d376c/35903)

name: Lindsey Graham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
Please consider contributing even $5 before 11:59 PM TONIGHT so we can stay on track and end the Democrats’ control of Washington.
| | Hey Fellow American,

Right now, Democrats are attempting to force through the most radical and progressive agenda our country has ever seen. Make no mistake - their vision would fundamentally change America forever.

We need your help to stop the Left, so I’ll get straight to the point. Senator Mike Lee (R-UT) and I have a major end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we need your help to ensure we have the resources needed to take back the Senate.

subject: Georgia on my mind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220829:JXS41s2NO:m:1:3253819041:8890D3B8B5C347CAB367BBBB12CC03D7:r)

---
Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220829:JXS41s2NO:m:1:3253819041:8890D3B8B5C347CAB367BBBB12CC03D7:r)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220829:JXS41s2NO:m:1:3253819041:8890D3B8B5C347CAB367BBBB12CC03D7:r)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220829:JXS41s2NO:m:1:3253819041:8890D3B8B5C347CAB367BBBB12CC03D7:r)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220829:JXS41s2NO:m:1:3253819041:8890D3B8B5C347CAB367BBBB12CC03D7:r)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220829:JXS41s2NO:m:1:3253819041:8890D3B8B5C347CAB367BBBB12CC03D7:r)
Herschel Walker

P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. **[Please help my campaign get off to a critically important start by donating $10, $20, or even $50 today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220829:JXS41s2NO:m:1:3253819041:8890D3B8B5C347CAB367BBBB12CC03D7:r)** Thank you.

[** CHIP IN NOW -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58220829:JXS41s2NO:m:1:3253819041:8890D3B8B5C347CAB367BBBB12CC03D7:r)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Fellow Conservative, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=66cf53854732420abe5f6bfa132bd94d&_e=vfXUM1Qkx10USkVlqFz0Zu3H1PYmcB8kdwqgPr2yYglO9Axc1Cfk3ivtZ7eQkMnqVNzCjXvBokJ2wh2qi4hL7sU-qVe-TP2E01ZkOZ52Br37mv3BE3R718aBWSqa8Dq70pheDtvohsCRFcy-PB1ekmvEW8SPaiZa3UZB3VKqFdM2fGFvZ38gjiLBmE8uACNq-JhNnvjLdl4QOK5fksM6rVmBvPwLFpnlFkuKYPK2wm-t9bOWcqJZ1T0k7jZZlPgTpFgb3arpWEhh-AFewTFtJejDB7-TehLVFzpHAqMmtzUB7Ev6U48HtTPUGBYs7LaO5EZchRkJzPxclEcDYZ9BhdHJH68DEfYTTLetLj5f1a4sVqicKYgVEcGOGVZd2S_UqPCnPalTlt8sRIfDsmzn98w9j8fURmCIXcaQiR82HO-O12z8BCv4pKPl1ZMsMZD4Yvqk100vF6KsZrgCfI70yQ%3D%3D) **

I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Fellow Conservative. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=66cf53854732420abe5f6bfa132bd94d&_e=vfXUM1Qkx10USkVlqFz0Zu3H1PYmcB8kdwqgPr2yYglO9Axc1Cfk3ivtZ7eQkMnqVNzCjXvBokJ2wh2qi4hL7sU-qVe-TP2E01ZkOZ52Br37mv3BE3R718aBWSqa8Dq70pheDtvohsCRFcy-PB1ekmvEW8SPaiZa3UZB3VKqFdM2fGFvZ38gjiLBmE8uACNq-JhNnvjLdl4QOK5fksM6rVmBvPwLFpnlFkuKYPK2wm-t9bOWcqJZ1T0k7jZZlPgToQCeRdl-kDrsC5hJ0UXYTCEtwbadAC_LUqK_P_5cUORv5_22sovIA5lKCcNdzJnvqEx6Dxe1OnvvD5hjiFg3R0LlRdKiP-78ZKfh3DVJbU8YK9Igz23-HFj9blDCB2QKpjDLjzM0dzSFMRhAnEi7X2W4ZZcCIj1xm3fwnFSEwe9NO2Vou3o7HNrjzIQ0pQYgh9xHUSM8ClovulAJn4DKQw%3D%3D) **

clean_body: If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! | Fellow Conservative, I’ve been on a lot of teams. From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, I know what makes a good teammate. We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win. Fellow Conservative, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia. I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that’s come across his desk in Washington. He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government. This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. Georgians deserve better.America deserves better. As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Fellow Conservative. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team. I’ve been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I’ve ever been a part of. Fellow Conservative, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

Friendー it’s Darin.

The other day, my team reached out to you to warn you about Democrats trying to force our children to wear masks again.

I can’t figure out why, though...

We have an effective vaccine that adults can choose to take or not, and our children are at very minimal risk to COVID.

On the flip side, we still have no idea the psychological, developmental, or educational effects that constant masking and isolation have on our children.

**But Democrats don’t care.**

**They want you to obey their ever-changing mandates and constantly be in fear. **

This pandemic has given Democrats the excuse for the thing they’ve always wanted: **central control over every aspect of Americans’ lives.**

That’s why parents around the country are making their voices heard against this decision to force our children to wear masks in schools again.

clean_body: This pandemic has given Democrats the excuse for the thing they’ve always... | | Friendー it’s Darin. The other day, my team reached out to you to warn you about Democrats trying to force our children to wear masks again. I can’t figure out why, though... We have an effective vaccine that adults can choose to take or not, and our children are at very minimal risk to COVID. On the flip side, we still have no idea the psychological, developmental, or educational effects that constant masking and isolation have on our children. But Democrats don’t care. They want you to obey their ever-changing mandates and constantly be in fear. This pandemic has given Democrats the excuse for the thing they’ve always wanted: central control over every aspect of Americans’ lives. There's been a significant dip in our fundraising, and we're slightly worried about reaching our goals ahead of tomorrow's end-of-month deadline. Why this matters: Ron Johnson attacked Democratic challenger Sarah Godlewski directly this month because he knows she can defeat him to flip this Senate seat blue and expand our majority. Our job: Raise as much money as possible from grassroots supporters like you to ensure we can fight back against Republican efforts to take back the Senate and expand our majority. clean_body: | | | | Why is California funding Alaska? Friend, This End-of-Month is so important. Lisa Murkowski has seen our fundraising report and knows we are able to beat her because Alaskans are with us! But Murkowski and her team got so scared they reached out to the Hollywood Elite Donors in Dark Blue Liberal California to help fund her campaign. And while Murkowski takes millions from outside groups, we make sure we are primarily a grassroots-funded campaign. We are here for the people! We cannot stand by as Murkowski gives away our freedoms for campaign donations. We need to fight back! Thanks, Kelly | | | | ==

subject: It’s time for Biden to resign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Biden has failed us. | ****
---
Peter,

Joe Biden is the worst president in history.

_He is taking zero responsibility for the way he is withdrawing our troops in Afghanistan - resulting in a TALIBAN takeover - and he's even blaming President Trump for it._

Do you think this is OK, Peter?

The reason Biden is passing blame to President Trump is pretty simple - he knows he has FAILED the American people and is floundering.

We want to send a letter to Joe Biden DEMANDING that he resigns as President of the United States IMMEDIATELY. Will you co-sign it for us?

**[Add your name NOW to DEMAND Joe Biden resign as President of the United States.>>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6b27cf8df0bd4508805fa8f0887f160e&_e=d2emG5gwzXcfUzaa_z5ZO4kav3srY4IU-g9VmWUuC2KKV0erARJasnoZsRVIAkBBZftmT434TJwd0bvurCH4zYOrQzIMnF6XMX_9kibHTxxS3ilrAgGmIHUN2pLq1bVBkRvrHiJwya0pI5lyY3wmBO3adbEzlfRL2BDgsJE4gHBm7ghSatnInDq1sGHWqM-AekYeffSC5UCmq0rZ4IH4vNhcaO6nNYBjwQrKQb0GKUiLhzqecA6pRPqHgZAl9n4OCTTj4Tqsnl-OfDInVnp5IZqnk3fe9tjxk8cN-ABiN-YMCsjtdaIrzcHdRFNBuhL9Hz2kOHC5JnLG9Zfkr_y68ap3mGvU5xEWXHQNBnMuWyybHYbwsjAzqGTgUXu3DYy90t3ABWuVH6ANZmiu43yjcRwt8xvjOHNS4lvsjF-aIFm9HJnx_IJ7SGrPBY-L1lqM-ythlmAc5pDjvf0tO-sXSOuIXNRs2nmPp1NNK9iSlbM%3D)**

Sincerely,
Peter / A Patriotic American_

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=724%2E3611125%2E_rSxxI ][IMG]

Hey there --

I’ll be sitting down with my team later this week to go over our campaign
strategy for the next few months, and I want to make sure I get your
feedback first.

While my Republican opponents are in a race to the bottom to try to win
Donald Trump’s blessing, my number one priority is making sure this
campaign represents YOU.

I wish I could grab a cup of coffee with every one of you to hear about
your concerns, but I’ll have to settle for the next best thing.

My team put together a short priorities survey (seriously, two minutes
tops!). [ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_2108_FR_Onboarding2Survey_A0_na_U1_X1/?t=1007&akid=724%2E3611125%2E_rSxxI ]Will you take a moment to let me know what issues matter the
most to you in this race?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_2108_FR_Onboarding2Survey_A0_na_U1_X1/?t=1008&akid=724%2E3611125%2E_rSxxI ]Take the Survey

The only way we’ll finally cut workers in on the deal is by expanding our
Democratic Senate Majority. We need to build a winning operation with
folks all over Ohio (that means you!) to flip this seat blue.

Your voice matters to me, so I’m hoping you’ll take a minute to fill out
my survey today.

Thanks,

Tim

body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.)

I'm in complete disbelief.

I just read THREE polls that show Republicans' odds of regaining the Senate are CRUMBLING.

\-- They're**LOSING** by ONE point in Ohio
\-- They're **LOSING** by FOUR points in Wisconsin
\-- They're **LOSING** by EIGHT points in Pennsylvania

[**I****need you to understand what this means: We now have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to build the BIGGEST Democratic Majorities in history and hand McConnell and all the Republicans a HUMILIATING defeat. So I 'm calling for 8,000 gifts before my End of Month Deadline to OUTRAISE them, build an UNBEATABLE war chest, and prevent a TOTAL Republican takeover. Can I count on your $5 in this historic moment to protect our House Majority? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_zQVxN3dC~)
| [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**
NAME: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**

_Suggested Support: $5_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)
---

I need to be perfectly blunt:

While the polls predict Democrats will clinch control of the Senate...

House Republicans have a $7 MILLION cash advantage to defeat our House Majority.

**I know they will use every cent to target my Democrats with attack ads, chip away at our polling lead, and ruin our best chance to win.**

Hey Peter \- It’s Jamie, the campaign manager for Team Earls.

**I wanted to fill you in on some behind-the-scenes plans our campaign has for flipping GA-06, taking back control of the House, and getting America back on track next year.**

_**[Once you’re done reading, I hope you’ll chip in $5 so we can make the early investments necessary to make it all happen.](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=3da35932f9bb423095a4480f67e774d6&_e=8ML2K6HEDdFaxvfu2w_u2-ZCvhXeTjARUMAJpHdoq2zWHYMJOSjq33MtVtflLocU2oHgYIwonArEmwzE-OKRf_GLoG7UYPdoHSyLMjflgSdbH58Ss-F-vmHxgmB1l9qwd0hDPmV80lOVS7VMRwK62NCdx-T50Q-wZl5hXGhUm3b_Rsrkk-CYDecoL1mXOjZNqM9RbN2jy0DlKiaWaA_AG01JVjo8tJRuZ79UvyrWhcQ3GoYi3IxZ-Z7bcoo7Qa7wrf8RjlGn8_UCgYxJCAIxxfupfaG_LOvzxlujhyZ-wS-VFFhVMlpfMSAdKFkVkYBvZaOSwyDT9XW3JHiP0nVcrSQDmQF3Xd7sTotCnKmX4VgRSpi9PFeGl6wjmQ9D4l107uCAvTAVBeGR1TRFpiIjTx0qwwKnurTgO3-aglkCxsxPZ8CEjKUNJnHwCXVyHneQFVOFpx6nXHfk20X3lMjS-rVIFv137ypmErog9wH_6RAlO1WQ7oMl6IChRZ7ALAeo)**_

Republicans don’t like to admit it, but Georgia is no longer a solid red state. The last election showed that Georgia voters are tired of all the party politics and infighting, so they took their votes across party lines and handed the election over to the Left.

**We can’t let Georgia be the reason Democrats control Washington...again.**

At their core, folks in Georgia don’t believe in the radical far-Left agenda Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi are pushing. You know it and I know it.

**Georgians want a new kind of conservative movement, so that’s what we’re giving them.**

But campaigns are expensive. If we want to turn the tide in 2022 and reclaim the House, here’s what we need to start investing in right now:
* _Purchasing yard signs_
* _Buying gas and snacks for our team_
* _Printing campaign and voter registration materials_
* _Building our grassroots army_
* _Running ads across the district_
* _Training volunteers_

That’s where you come in, Peter.

**Each yard sign costs us about $5 and reaches 100 people. Will you help us reach 100 more voters this month by making a $5 donation right now, Peter?******
[**CONTRIBUTE $5**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=3da35932f9bb423095a4480f67e774d6&_e=8ML2K6HEDdFaxvfu2w_u2-ZCvhXeTjARUMAJpHdoq2zWHYMJOSjq33MtVtflLocU2oHgYIwonArEmwzE-OKRf_GLoG7UYPdoHSyLMjflgSdbH58Ss-F-vmHxgmB1l9qwd0hDPmV80lOVS7VMRwK62NCdx-T50Q-wZl5hXGhUm3b_Rsrkk-CYDecoL1mXOjZNqM9RbN2jy0DlKiaWaA_AG01JVjo8tJRuZ79UvyrWhcQ3GoYi3IxZ-Z7bcoo7Qa7wrf8RjlGn8_UCgYxJCAIxxfupfaG_LOvzxlujhyZ-wS_vNDnLTOwbiUeYGyn0aLttMC2BC28H5IDkzrVnY69PV8trYO-JrLsHcd2WzMb-Mvjn0kEmwsRgcyDJ3ds2RavguFAb5VRc104engNGAuPROwpjYHs6jMzYYspgu3hrlZlNOsK-BU7hTmTmPNSApB6xWgNOOybZGzuylOuknZ1qdiPlLjJR3gFQKClTRKh5hA4FwoAO18ewSHToaDezSRWa)

Let’s make this our best month yet!

name: Team Mowers
subject: Huge Mowers’ announcement coming soon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mowers for Congress
body:
Join us on 9/8

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDU1NDA5NjUS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MjA2NzM2Mzc0NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter, Huge news - we would like to invite you to a special announcement by Matt Mowers next Wednesday, September 8th at Murphy's Taproom in Manchester. [_**You can RSVP here >>> **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/els/v2/Lyq3h2LWd8hZ/M3B0VWErTCtEZWJSMUlMcmE0QUZqYWFUa3VZMFpGS0NWa1BZcktySzczUkt3cWtRL1hQMlNjVjd4SGhYY1dEclFkbHNhQ3NYYVc4V0tzNkpSVDJGSEYzVmFZTVJTM2xYeWFiRFR3R2dLMU09S0/) **Matt Mowers, 2020 GOP nominee for Congress in NH-1 knows that it 's more clear than ever that we need new leadership in Washington to meet the challenges we face today.** We are less than a year into the Joe Biden presidency, and Chris Pappas continues to do everything Biden and his leader Nancy Pelosi asks him to do. In fact, he's cowering in fear of woke activists who want to defund our police and police our speech instead of standing up for our Live Free or Die values. Matt is appalled by recent decisions by the Biden Administration in Afghanistan that have resulted in the tragic deaths of American Service Members. In Washington, the Left continues to push their reckless spending agenda while members of Congress like out-of-touch politicians Nancy Pelosi and Pappas continue to do nothing as our border remains unsecure. Matt served as Senior White House Advisor in President Trump's administration at the State Department. He knows that because of Biden, Pelosi, and Pappas' lack of leadership on the key issues facing our country something must change. _**Do you agree with Matt that we cannot sit idly by when D.C. politicians continue to drive our great Country down the wrong path?**_ If you do, we hope you will join Matt and our team on Wednesday night. Special Announcement info: Wednesday, September 8th @ 5:30 PM
Murphy's Taproom 494 Elm St, Manchester, NH 03101
[_**You can RSVP here >>> **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/els/v2/R9V8txR2Zbsb/M3B0VWErTCtEZWJSMUlMcmE0QUZqYWFUa3VZMFpGS0NWa1BZcktySzczUkt3cWtRL1hQMlNjVjd4SGhYY1dEclFkbHNhQ3NYYVc4V0tzNkpSVDJGSEYzVmFZTVJTM2xYeWFiRFR3R2dLMU09S0/) We hope to see you then! name: Laura Loomer
subject: Is Biden’s Betrayal enough?
body:
Did you notice the coordinated headlines about Joe Biden attending the arrival of our 13 fallen Marines and soldiers?
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/i7tKUMLnTweEEzpOB763b9Rw/0jBvjL8pL3SUtRp0oa6Wtw)
Patriot,

Did you notice the coordinated headlines about Joe Biden attending the arrival of our 13 fallen Marines and soldiers? [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/i7tKUMLnTweEEzpOB763b9Rw/0jBvjL8pL3SUtRp0oa6Wtw)
> NPR: "Biden oversees **dignified transfer** of US Service Members killed in Kabul."
>
> CNN: "Biden attends **dignified transfer** at Dover Air Force Base."
>
> People: "Joe Biden attends **dignified transfer** . . . "
>
> Forbes: "Biden attends **dignified transfer** . . . "
Despite headline after headline attempting to elevate Joe Biden to a respectable Commander-in-Chief, it's not working.

To my absolute horror, Joe Biden used the bodies of our thirteen brave servicemen and women as a photo-op. He was even caught on camera impatiently checking his watch, as if he couldn't be bothered to waste a minute more of his "precious" time greeting the bodies of our American heroes.

Joe Biden is the furthest thing from dignified.

**Americans know the truth and we are furious!**

[**Help me hold Joe Biden accountable!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/i7tKUMLnTweEEzpOB763b9Rw/0jBvjL8pL3SUtRp0oa6Wtw)

Biden handed the basic security of American lives over to the Taliban -- and OF COURSE that decision ended with the murder of our young men and women!

There is no excuse for this, and we have a responsibility to hold Biden responsible.

And there is only ONE WAY to do this: [**take back Congress!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/i7tKUMLnTweEEzpOB763b9Rw/0jBvjL8pL3SUtRp0oa6Wtw)

We can talk all we want about impeaching Biden, but it's not even close to being realistic with Democrats in control of the House and Senate.

We have 14 months to identify voters and motivate them to save our Republic by flipping the House.

Fourteen months.

That's nothing, and with each day, we're running out of time.

[**Help me win today by making a final August gift so we can hit our fundraising goals.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/i7tKUMLnTweEEzpOB763b9Rw/0jBvjL8pL3SUtRp0oa6Wtw)

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

clean_body: Did you notice the coordinated headlines about Joe Biden attending the arrival of our 13 fallen Marines and soldiers? | | | Patriot, Did you notice the coordinated headlines about Joe Biden attending the arrival of our 13 fallen Marines and soldiers? NPR: "Biden oversees dignified transfer of US Service Members killed in Kabul." CNN: "Biden attends dignified transfer at Dover Air Force Base." People: "Joe Biden attends dignified transfer . . . " Forbes: "Biden attends dignified transfer . . . " Despite headline after headline attempting to elevate Joe Biden to a respectable Commander-in-Chief, it's not working. To my absolute horror, Joe Biden used the bodies of our thirteen brave servicemen and women as a photo-op. He was even caught on camera impatiently checking his watch, as if he couldn't be bothered to waste a minute more of his "precious" time greeting the bodies of our American heroes. Joe Biden is the furthest thing from dignified. Americans know the truth and we are furious! Biden handed the basic security of American lives over to the Taliban -- and OF COURSE that decision ended with the murder of our young men and women! There is no excuse for this, and we have a responsibility to hold Biden responsible. And there is only ONE WAY to do this: We can talk all we want about impeaching Biden, but it's not even close to being realistic with Democrats in control of the House and Senate. We have 14 months to identify voters and motivate them to save our Republic by flipping the House. Fourteen months. That's nothing, and with each day, we're running out of time. Thank you again for all that you do. Respectfully, Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited. Laura Loomer for Congress Inc 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465 LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
