subject: I’m fighting to keep the American dream alive
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=98a42551b3824c3e98ddfddf4a26b76c&_e=tNxUSTl03EIIEQfKFs3tHNyLJ8qSGox2oNIyXIYNWjqW3vyg4HXCCek8ikHnftDO4_fC26Ki7tZi8sc1YLdVXsx4bJRHy8P1Q3cUNnAhX6nhlEAE__9-RM-jMrzHBWZlSVDyTXNETLhCeLMbGqBqXOy-ofFOaC31hT8436ahetukCOUM60ZzbjqIcCOfa4YHhjtzUB7H1_XNBijMCukMfSBgOu5LIXfcE2QnKEFNMsMdFkBGWw0vNwzM-QK6OPpDJ0GTbCZlRjknv3LdAkcP8o1HpxvSGbRg9hL1fljhPWUvDbIJkxCJ4y7lfe_5pJGFJcMRs9Fi3ckqSueEHHMp-iFY5QAuBW2BucgjnZ4rw5ZWMRXQ2wK62p9td-gGh1DGAgqvB8aNJcskR4cAVecLaXaHivdRqTayPvQHWjxt11eeH38brzqwHD7XKKu_40Q0qIGUZwerA3j3ZcNlLikMIiek7b8_mwEkfqoDNpnGlXc%3D)

---
Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=98a42551b3824c3e98ddfddf4a26b76c&_e=tNxUSTl03EIIEQfKFs3tHNyLJ8qSGox2oNIyXIYNWjqW3vyg4HXCCek8ikHnftDO4_fC26Ki7tZi8sc1YLdVXsx4bJRHy8P1Q3cUNnAhX6nhlEAE__9-RM-jMrzHBWZlSVDyTXNETLhCeLMbGqBqXOy-ofFOaC31hT8436ahetukCOUM60ZzbjqIcCOfa4YHhjtzUB7H1_XNBijMCukMfSBgOu5LIXfcE2QnKEFNMsMdFkBGWw0vNwzM-QK6OPpDJ0GTbCZlRjknv3LdAkcP8vOupSM81l-3OWKdO0ZNEa5HNiSsgoJWC9ixWfCXgN3GQGvqoqxpVxXB2F3_3jmnsC7emtPh2uWiBFQQIlvxJMU1sy1ntr3Fq6splpV4enLTPGe122T4la4iOQo4DEOD0ds_0bU0PFCQO3DzoblJTGEgDHyLvDw7a9bo2JdC3v3jsy0feKHqnV3bVqPTBIjAaZKQvto8ESr9Fi_Te8ys7K4%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=98a42551b3824c3e98ddfddf4a26b76c&_e=tNxUSTl03EIIEQfKFs3tHNyLJ8qSGox2oNIyXIYNWjqW3vyg4HXCCek8ikHnftDO4_fC26Ki7tZi8sc1YLdVXsx4bJRHy8P1Q3cUNnAhX6nhlEAE__9-RM-jMrzHBWZlSVDyTXNETLhCeLMbGqBqXOy-ofFOaC31hT8436ahetukCOUM60ZzbjqIcCOfa4YHhjtzUB7H1_XNBijMCukMfSBgOu5LIXfcE2QnKEFNMsMdFkBGWw0vNwzM-QK6OPpDJ0GTbCZlRjknv3LdAkcP8kArWcYHuIXhdCdjAUCMcSGUqnniKPtm8NXAbeFJCohOlSQJEj5PHoZpRXs1V65psuyR3S4IBAp1g8GrVr3GParH3x8ltoJXswVMQzpCzNJNYyqPgM3vadQtkcqf6k1ytc8elyklTh0t6i6_quIESq-T_sKqU7LedeF_Ol5PVxpCVoXNhTNa7nYm1-rcp0CKtpgkE59MgSBxIx7XNcJQxsw%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=98a42551b3824c3e98ddfddf4a26b76c&_e=tNxUSTl03EIIEQfKFs3tHNyLJ8qSGox2oNIyXIYNWjqW3vyg4HXCCek8ikHnftDO4_fC26Ki7tZi8sc1YLdVXsx4bJRHy8P1Q3cUNnAhX6nhlEAE__9-RM-jMrzHBWZlSVDyTXNETLhCeLMbGqBqXOy-ofFOaC31hT8436ahetukCOUM60ZzbjqIcCOfa4YHhjtzUB7H1_XNBijMCukMfSBgOu5LIXfcE2QnKEFNMsMdFkBGWw0vNwzM-QK6OPpDJ0GTbCZlRjknv3LdAkcP8pDtgvu-krUPs1G_rcRU9SNiTovGJRgjHLD8OvOakpbejtpF0VVffOTnCi48gkBCTlce6LJ1ndZcLDbU8hiWVqNkXKUeNZyhmoB1t86C6llRdz1g2h3EdphZv7tQyyGjApsOi-1l3orgRwjoATbZ07N0xeU1WwNQVIBaphrjYWEeOWTuCmAcHfL6sGibD71NDQtqhULCJtXAz_LnCW4p4Ak%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=98a42551b3824c3e98ddfddf4a26b76c&_e=tNxUSTl03EIIEQfKFs3tHNyLJ8qSGox2oNIyXIYNWjqW3vyg4HXCCek8ikHnftDO4_fC26Ki7tZi8sc1YLdVXsx4bJRHy8P1Q3cUNnAhX6nhlEAE__9-RM-jMrzHBWZlSVDyTXNETLhCeLMbGqBqXOy-ofFOaC31hT8436ahetukCOUM60ZzbjqIcCOfa4YHhjtzUB7H1_XNBijMCukMfSBgOu5LIXfcE2QnKEFNMsMdFkBGWw0vNwzM-QK6OPpDJ0GTbCZlRjknv3LdAkcP8o330I_hB15Kn5Ke_1xoTSobrCxe9r814o8Fej6h78D41H9FpFhZWdjljylwPYqEuv9nLJ84rzu1J2Dy98Ph_rzq3RRpUlT5ZQis8e9Y2pKq657GWlpeVTCyUXFVnPYDog93tdr856ujA5L2UiFkQzWQY6exJqEnxiGrBEW7uxDKssylB_m4WOr68LgnQ01p7UKcBxy-zM0YM76r3O9FA28%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=98a42551b3824c3e98ddfddf4a26b76c&_e=tNxUSTl03EIIEQfKFs3tHNyLJ8qSGox2oNIyXIYNWjqW3vyg4HXCCek8ikHnftDO4_fC26Ki7tZi8sc1YLdVXsx4bJRHy8P1Q3cUNnAhX6nhlEAE__9-RM-jMrzHBWZlSVDyTXNETLhCeLMbGqBqXOy-ofFOaC31hT8436ahetukCOUM60ZzbjqIcCOfa4YHhjtzUB7H1_XNBijMCukMfSBgOu5LIXfcE2QnKEFNMsMdFkBGWw0vNwzM-QK6OPpDJ0GTbCZlRjknv3LdAkcP8uR0K5wyvFDgANZw8OmVI5UHZ7fGREFIYGXflqelaKmwgz7J7X4S1qdKynwQ93HgA9d2ga9rMaZb-2aY5Gea0_PGlZ-UKDnCopUckrqnXcbDXUszL3bg_1ZKwpPhaHfWG4m3xySPMWq0P0amcPH_t4Q6_b7K1Rfe62MC8f1kCO1b8dDZT_vfSFEoz4XCQfu9b-r4fNCcSXLpbuW_bhqs4dU%3D)
Herschel Walker

P.S. subject: Just a few bucks to make history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
| | |
---
Folks, I want to be honest about what’s at stake for the people of the Central Valley and across the country if Kevin McCarthy stays in power. [We’re coming up on our August fundraising deadline tomorrow and we need as many people as possible to chip in and make history here in CA-23. Can you chip in a few bucks right now to help make that history by defeating Kevin McCarthy and bring real, progressive, leadership to the Central Valley?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLoWwF4q8de3kkr7KofY-EKfg2Um73WaKMGcTptvUflrhezKigyDvCn0I2Wcd_06qa_JXu3SFyV4-WEgEqJkFEZyBJbk_3Yz62Pt85n-WDR9gMoNOL4IfjUGRbOvgxczfJjFVuBIxfWMla5k1U9xHKrIjiG0YH2v_3zj-3v7km04m2qiS3n-P5ShAZF36EL9DJCjbi3BKjMEyexovXVLtZlYBj8uABoIIsvcAHqfNaIHiepHO8ryktgFwVlVCtPtVAsv116Jluyz9H6x1yrOHRMorhcVHV1EIY83vU_mCotSxTaclX6W2DdM4MYRxzkyLFa/3ew/OaoTruEoSrugJw3WLv6sfA/h0/4ksr5ZAsJ9fYao2aJBM2pQIEc_DGNksScRA0hf_hQYI) [Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLoWwF4q8de3kkr7KofY-EKfotbBXsRKpqnxrbLaxnSBnDte9QvG405f_Fz8wBOeKi1rwOjsOIl5N-6k_xC19tKMAPmKvuAiMmn9-9Cpk73sCFffMaz4GGAMhVOdJ6ju02vXnTYq0xCjsntTbAb5rm5xZcku7pDysnieblepYCqfBnTRiYGjepIcbMmREiIm5nsfj8YgjIJCu_7k3ZXwVPc23hKYdYabQEf0ZLf73CNRCjMh6JwmeCcM6j__0-qbTQxNZtESPThHaDklwmqOP7pNCrpwtI6DEhjLfsyvv1hw30nW15M6aYSwwFVd0hjGcgZ/3ew/OaoTruEoSrugJw3WLv6sfA/h1/qmTexd-HIqGYSFZZcyvFrYM31kaZAQukc6IguVPWQI4) Folks, McCarthy’s not just another member of Congress. He’s the House Minority Leader — if Republicans were in power, he would be Speaker of the House. Actions are louder than words, folks. McCarthy’s actions speak for themselves. All he’s ever done is make broken promises, enrich his friends, and constantly change his mind based on where the political winds are blowing in the Republican Party. Meanwhile, those of us across California’s 23rd District and across the country have gotten the short end of the stick while we wait for him to do anything that would help us. That’s why I decided to run for Congress. I’m a U.S. Navy veteran and I am ready to serve this country again, to work for the great people of CA-23 to help enact policies that will bring us real support. Instead of championing workers by supporting the PRO Act or bringing much needed relief to the whole country by supporting legislation like the American Jobs Plan — McCarthy has actively worked against it by voicing his opposition and encouraging the colleagues he leads in Congress to do the same. **When****McCarthy and his friends stand to lose profit or power, he is never on the side of the people he represents.** If August showed us anything, folks, it showed us that we deserve better than Kevin McCarthy. clean_body: | | | Folks, I want to be honest about what’s at stake for the people of the Central Valley and across the country if Kevin McCarthy stays in power. Folks, McCarthy’s not just another member of Congress. He’s the House Minority Leader — if Republicans were in power, he would be Speaker of the House. Actions are louder than words, folks. McCarthy’s actions speak for themselves. All he’s ever done is make broken promises, enrich his friends, and constantly change his mind based on where the political winds are blowing in the Republican Party. Meanwhile, those of us across California’s 23rd District and across the country have gotten the short end of the stick while we wait for him to do anything that would help us. That’s why I decided to run for Congress. I’m a U.S. Navy veteran and I am ready to serve this country again, to work for the great people of CA-23 to help enact policies that will bring us real support. Instead of championing workers by supporting the PRO Act or bringing much needed relief to the whole country by supporting legislation like the American Jobs Plan — McCarthy has actively worked against it by voicing his opposition and encouraging the colleagues he leads in Congress to do the same. WhenMcCarthy and his friends stand to lose profit or power, he is never on the side of the people he represents. If August showed us anything, folks, it showed us that we deserve better than Kevin McCarthy. He has a mountain of cash from wealthy donors and corporations — so having folks like you pitching in what you can before our end-of-month deadline couldn’t be more important. We know this movement is powerful because it’s one by and for the people. It’s hard asking for money, folks, and I don’t take it lightly. I do it because this campaign is nothing without your support. I’m grateful for every single person who chips in because it means you believe in this proudly progressive movement that will defeat Kevin McCarthy. Let's get it done, folks. Bruno | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress

body:
This is NOT a drill!

| This should horrify you, Peter.

**If over 50 percent of Californians vote to oust Gavin Newsom, the next governor could be elected with just a fraction of the vote.**

**[Will you split a contribution right now between Common Good VA and Charlie Crist’s campaign to defeat Ron DeSantis?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruX1EreB5Zs7KCTCf9wPMf45_hfIk4ZorWg5rEoGexOGxzCwNry8EQGH_tsGUQEIhfWLeBPcpBLnixwaOeGlZTa8atDqCyRmGuoXi1CDqKfWpXPHqbBGsNlicAwWsYBZzdWOKQukcsi77ZOFfu4cMCHkwW4J7rlkGiAj0joLQcaeVl6xSNPgVsYzBAzUp9QphJ0VHCUwbkCdIaLv8aZq07ZTGEWNyFQF5py8QpW8QyRSNSf-i-thti61TjnYn0p5RQXPsail6DX-H4-weg8vs-Yi3Z-gQ19Gx9eQQ-1NwAB1u/3ew/c1dc6oCkRh-dP6pq8Ya0_g/h1/3W2Vge4YgVViRbzD_e7IQD_cpHSRxyfDgCG1Hxk-piU) Every dollar is critical to helping defeat Florida Governor Ron DeSantis and helping my friend Charlie raise $15,000 before his fundraising deadline.**

I’ve known Charlie for a long time. We’ve served together in Congress and worked together on critical legislation to help families across America. He and I worked side by side to pass the COVID-19 relief packages and legislation to protect voting rights. I know his character. I’ve seen his work ethic. And he would fight for Floridians in the Governor’s mansion just as he has for years in Congress.

On the flip side, I know a lot about Ron DeSantis, too. Not through working together – but by seeing him stand side by side with the most dangerous president in history. Seeing him grin while signing voter suppression bills in Florida. **And by watching him jockey to use his platform to be the successor to Donald Trump in 2024.**

Things haven’t gotten much better since DeSantis left the House to become Governor of Florida. He’s put more attention into building his profile and trying to disenfranchise voters in his state than trying to help the people of Florida recover from the worst pandemic any of us have ever endured.

**It’s absolutely critical that we defeat DeSantis.** And I believe my friend Charlie is the one to beat him next year. But knowing the modern-day Republican Party, they are going to do everything they can to keep DeSantis in office and tear down Charlie as he seeks to represent the people of Florida.

**So right now, your contribution is critical. Charlie is ready to set the tone for the race and he needs your help to do it.[Please split a donation between Charlie’s campaign and Common Good VA today to help them hit their $15,000 goal.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruX1EreB5Zs7KCTCf9wPMf47xdyV082D3n0e1mhvybmKETnr7Nf9bPk9t7JYXodMBX7wOEtY2dOfzvaeKLggbK3myjoh9ROH37DsARRc_XR7jz6OYYUCWojPpgKbX8qH4oYr4evI-BJlurOCYg9vpyTODkufJokZoEL2wmzJ7JBWClfiADgo6jQxb50hGD3Lj4sM4lXk88S-tY5g7IwhESuuVW3wGDUAiFpmI8IhbbQ3mNNud_7iw2ar8IeGCttKfU_7-WPKUqMI2o49DDhEEGPuL1A_sknGwFai7vGk-AoBa/3ew/c1dc6oCkRh-dP6pq8Ya0_g/h2/Ba4ncrn4twag3ysN_xPzS-1J732ARIj5zn-O04pKXiQ)**

We need to flip Florida blue once again. And you can play a role in that today. Thank you for all you do.

\-- Adam Schiff
| [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruX1EreB5Zs7KCTCf9wPMf45tG2U7cIvu0wdSC_1nEjzxca0PZWy2sGgtyRuctcYOJUDAHwWDITckoRf-XcMnWapOVBPV7ylhLnuWN7pdxy3n4nHtVtyuS4ZVIKXcrZ6cgXNyiHY-xKXSK12Zrfd8KuwvTD5BHGfWbas8oddUjhL9j1vsoZ8W-wgj_jcLRqAQ5HOqUJXJq_3_EgcHyQcOmpyhq7AlBDuN2tCkZyngnJO2HHvF4o-BX-9_n0u9AfG9M4JLrY-jxK3wVQ6QYjsPT7OXh2vH8OqN4zNTGIMApVIK/3ew/c1dc6oCkRh-dP6pq8Ya0_g/h3/0ZWBJ5jwx2K2HP0kJy_AdgGlFFUUboTG2GViRlr-0UY)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Morgan?=
subject: Introducing to Rio and Jelani
body:
RSVP for a Labor Day Weekend Canvass near you! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c1f711ae391b/introducing-to-rio-and-jelani?e=400a181d5a)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=747f96e22c&e=400a181d5a)
---
[CLICK TO SEE DETAILS AND RSVP](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c04de4e0c6&e=400a181d5a)
| |
### **Introducing: Russo HQ Regional Organizing Team!**
September is just around the corner, , and we’ve got a lot of exciting events coming up! From forums and festivals to knocking on our neighbors doors, we need your help connecting to OH-15 voters. Sign up for a volunteer event near you, and make sure you introduce yourself to our new regional staffers ⤵️
---
| | |
---
_“My name is Rio Aagaard-Shively, and I’m your Southeast Ohio Regional Organizing Director! I worked with campaigns in Iowa, Ohio, and Montana last year, and I’m excited to be back in the Buckeye State to elect Allison and to support the great work Democrats are doing here in Southeast Ohio! I’m looking forward to working with you to send Allison to Congress and get folks out to vote this fall!”_ **Say Hi: [Rio@allisonrusso.com](mailto:Rio@allisonrusso.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20volunteer%20in%20SEO!&body=Hi%20Rio%2C%20%0A%0AI'd%20like%20to%20volunteer%20in%20SE%20Ohio.%20How%20can%20I%20get%20started%3F)**
| |
---
_"Hello, my name is Jelani Coleman. I'm excited to be joining Team Russo as the Central Ohio Regional Organizing Director! I believe that when we organize we win. When we talk to voters and bring them to the table we change communities. This is our moment and our chance to send Allison Russo to Congress, and I need your help. I need you to knock on some doors in your community, and call your neighbors. Please sign up to build a better Ohio with us!"_
**Say Hi:[Jelani@allisonrusso.com](mailto:jelani@allisonrusso.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20volunteer%20in%20central%20Ohio!&body=Hi%20Jelani%2C%20%0A%0AI'd%20like%20to%20volunteer%20in%20SE%20Ohio.%20How%20can%20I%20get%20started%3F)**
| |
Be on the lookout for more updates and events this week, including [volunteer kick-offs](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=2b45af99de&e=400a181d5a), [trainings](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=4147dea4b4&e=400a181d5a), and [community events](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=ac744f0ce2&e=400a181d5a)!

In solidarity,

Morgan, Rio, and Jelani
Russo for Congress
---
| | | | | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=5e0439c632&e=400a181d5a)
---
[](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=29b77105ba&e=400a181d5a)
---
[](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=fc0fadf08f&e=400a181d5a)

|
---
|

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website or a campaign event.

**Our mailing address is:**
RUSSO FOR CONGRESS545 E Town StColumbus, OH 43215-4801
[Add us to your address book](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/vcard?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed&e=400a181d5a&c=b8e7040a63) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed&e=400a181d5a&c=b8e7040a63).

name: John Fetterman
subject: REALLY busy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I'd *love* to share some updates from the road with yinz.
#
Hey, Peter — it's John.
Gisele and I have been REALLY busy on the campaign trail — but with our August deadline coming up in like 24 hours, I just have to ask: [**Will you please donate your first $5 to our campaign to flip Pennsylvania's open Senate seat?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28887?refcode=em20210830-2464&t=1&akid=2464%2E434096%2ED2qHyR)
Awesome. With that important request out of the way, I'd *love* to share some updates from the road with yinz.
Last weekend, we had a blast attending Reading Pride. Hats off to the organizers of this incredible event — **what an amazing celebration of love + LGBTQ+ pride.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28887?refcode=em20210830-2464&t=2&akid=2464%2E434096%2ED2qHyR)
Then on Wednesday, we headed to meet with voters in rural Mercer County. I was blown away by the fact that nearly 100 working folks came out to see us and share their stories.
If you're not familiar with Mercer, it's a place in Pennsylvania that cynics might write off as a "deep red" county. Trump won there by 25% in 2020. But the crowd of amazing people who gathered there that night was a true testament to our campaign's motto: **Every county. Every vote.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28887?refcode=em20210830-2464&t=3&akid=2464%2E434096%2ED2qHyR)
On Saturday, we headed to Washington, D.C. for the National Cannabis Festival. Gisele joined me on the main stage to discuss the urgency around our fight for legal weed in PA and nationwide. **I've long said that legal weed would mean more revenue, jobs, and justice.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28887?refcode=em20210830-2464&t=4&akid=2464%2E434096%2ED2qHyR)
How could I not mention that, yesterday in Somerset County, Gisele and I had the *immense honor* of meeting Wally the wiener dog. Wally donates part of his treat allowance ($7 monthly) to the campaign. **How generous of Wally, right? 😂**

[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28887?refcode=em20210830-2464&t=5&akid=2464%2E434096%2ED2qHyR)
Peter, I'm so deeply proud to be able to share all of these campaign photos + updates with you. Because the truth is that YOU are the only reason why our grassroots campaign is able to travel from county to county to earn the votes of working Pennsylvanians and their families.
**Grassroots contributions — most of which come in response to emails like this one — are what allow us to travel to all of these campaign stops. You're literally keeping this show on the road!** So with just a day left until our August deadline, I must ask once more:
[**Will you fund more campaign events like these by chipping in your first $5 right now? We're aiming to raise a total of $84,172 directly into the Flip Pennsylvania Fund before tomorrow at midnight, so even a modest donation would help — even just a buck or two.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28887?refcode=em20210830-2464&t=6&akid=2464%2E434096%2ED2qHyR)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28887?refcode=em20210830-2464&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=2464%2E434096%2ED2qHyR)**
Thank you so much for all you do for our campaign.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. **We're just over halfway to our $84,172 goal for the Flip Pennsylvania Fund,** so it'd be incredible if you could chip in any amount before tomorrow's big August deadline. Falling short of goals like these makes it impossible to stay on the road meeting voters — which is where Gisele and I really need to be! [**So please chip in $5 if you can today.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28887?refcode=em20210830-2464&t=26&akid=2464%2E434096%2ED2qHyR)
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails-footer-test?refcode=em20210830-2464-footer-test-ctrl&t=31&refcode2=2464_434096_D2qHyR&akid=2464%2E434096%2ED2qHyR)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=32&akid=2464%2E434096%2ED2qHyR)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=33&akid=2464%2E434096%2ED2qHyR)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Peter,

Andrew Garbarino here. My team told me they recently reached out to you about Joe Biden’s sinking approval rating and my 2022 race for re-election.

But I wanted to take an extra minute and reach out to my top supporters personally about something else that’s on my mind.

It hasn’t dominated the news cycle lately, but the threat of the HR4 ‘voting’ bill looms large in Congress. The Senate version of HR4 will EASILY pass if the Democrats vote to get rid of the filibuster.

And if the GOP doesn’t take back the House in 2022, HR4 will be just the start.

**But if we can manage to hold competitive seats and take back a handful for the red team, we can focus on election security, voter ID, and SAVING SMALL BUSINESSES.**
[**HELP ME HOLD NY-02**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=905fe09c3f784da6b656e309a82b8a8f&_e=TEirdaDgFCGT1ABMWUvau_gw_H6Phqj3F44eQVnjEEqy6B3Np0Dj7hizv688_cYaVHZhqltRZTmsQMpNLwQvGIzFIAp7iuzSthJjz1PE5Onqllt1YMyHR7LUwPV8ro8i_3rh9-EDDi6JbQjISksENS2tQYb7gxpJNoteuVwQypq33vGGgqdZhnex_KjjotoHjFVhApHLsXqJj7wLhhrbfcven8Hfd5ubd3M1PDw_OmbP1fGcwgWrBFAA5XuMEWBMZKmsBO8kgOH7r-5R6iDVqOjcJ1DRXSp9R3QoXFYmSyHSm0QfTcskN4vV68jYrAJmLV0FvOUqtAYMmr4YTUD_BIenyOUegAcXosIGTPyVOOCIi2uIbTZ5vYEWzva4Ku_2p09iyWMZYn5Ce-PsdNtsKRkFg1A1y91eZ1-rRrBpXzhxlZrnzKt1WQ58yTgYtiyFFkZnglsXKrnKcoNUlo0aik1NYzkYzhVprwLeeU2O-LNxNQxSBP5nC0d8AGX8hsxn)
As I’ve said before, our small business community, which is crucial to our economy, has been totally forgotten by Congress and Joe Biden. And our problems will only worsen if the Democrats maintain control of the two chambers after 2022.

Peter, this is why you elected me -- to fight for you and your values in DC. While I’m busy doing that, _[**will you rush ANY amount now to help me reach my END OF MONTH goal?**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=905fe09c3f784da6b656e309a82b8a8f&_e=TEirdaDgFCGT1ABMWUvau_gw_H6Phqj3F44eQVnjEEqy6B3Np0Dj7hizv688_cYaVHZhqltRZTmsQMpNLwQvGIzFIAp7iuzSthJjz1PE5Onqllt1YMyHR7LUwPV8ro8i_3rh9-EDDi6JbQjISksENS2tQYb7gxpJNoteuVwQypq33vGGgqdZhnex_KjjotoHjFVhApHLsXqJj7wLhhrbfcven8Hfd5ubd3M1PDw_OmbP1fGcwgWrBFAA5XuMEWBMZKmsBO8kgOH7r-5R6iDVqOjcJ1DRXSp9R3QoXFYmSyGtutC8llc5qYHSA3zB3LgzFiVOEqBkag9V6vBLcHSuNC5pSJ_ZJKSRBJJj0_YKFb78eGiHRj33BgmWJByAfWosM_pHxsxe1mNwRE397Lar0_wEi9G-_2F15m5pTB82UDZ41lEt6MNqEUUWPMxiHSs_uRAWT5eK_IP-iz96UHyOIrUpFZGOMETeENFYFUgOoDaaXHgu9PsmvvaCEBw_rJmS)_
